Friend,

There is little time left, so I will keep this brief.

Our final fundraising deadline for the year 2021 ends December 31st at midnight and we might not be able to reach our goal. Abigail Spanberger and the rest of my Radical Left counterparts are reporting high fundraising numbers. One thing I know for sure is that if we don't keep pace with them, all of our hard work in Virginia will go to waste.

[**Will you chip in now to help me stop them?**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=803eee8b0e4f43fa83533a02cd71b53c&_e=ItkVYViYXpegES-FsmwEAV7SO9kMToQosPWkUEfbjkiipzjmeeh4ps0k9DgzgBUvN_6c8E0grxfbnYvkgE-ZWvi03UTW1K0uGp8UPzNRFg7ZDAKd0dWFbmoLE_Mu4-kHuwuIekFTC8Jxpz9r2KKCipP3xXTRzHB2BHdd8Hbhh_uPlMAh2waz5DP65hVdZD7MotstYXioshLw5h-0Bi1b3dFrUyS4ntMEK1KBAS_mVu_vpcLYqlE1QfqCNKrtsbJPeOg7Po6waOpPHHWos6G6MgaBDt-72n7XsmphMAuJ89R_fvwWY9Mqlh43EdMFtcUY8xECWAKD0f-gmWBvIT-tvxfOFHzjXyUacR2Of-H4CgWLj1uIt6e2kLYthJ1BEGo6CRUDiUEE18ezj7TidgR_LJXrFdWb9cUOz5bvG654eDXGPx8syrCcHqj3E8lsXmZNKI6Abipdj1PoqMqu8UXxoWAbfBhYTS8-R7hklBNpX5U5ybYXWr0uvcunPhMzikTH) [**CHIP IN $25**](http://links.mcguireforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=1646ee1789c746fa925af25ab7afd241&_m=803eee8b0e4f43fa83533a02cd71b53c&_e=ItkVYViYXpegES-FsmwEAV7SO9kMToQosPWkUEfbjkiipzjmeeh4ps0k9DgzgBUvN_6c8E0grxfbnYvkgE-ZWvi03UTW1K0uGp8UPzNRFg7ZDAKd0dWFbmoLE_Mu4-kHuwuIekFTC8Jxpz9r2KKCipP3xXTRzHB2BHdd8Hbhh_uPlMAh2waz5DP65hVdZD7MotstYXioshLw5h-0Bi1b3dFrUyS4ntMEK1KBAS_mVu_vpcLYqlE1QfqCNKrtsbJPeOg7Po6waOpPHHWos6G6Mh7XOzdhMkzrcheAzNpIJ8-yihI2OfD6SEtLgAkM0ZpEzxALqvFemOeIImzfvBxHAbZUnEKaFSmwObgMxo4S6uA4lR2-33BGYMKgMNLt83WlM7dLxYQJubZQaNu3mEUYfd1GjH7040ut3ss6e8guGEsfMIW974RWEo-qg6DBqyVRlcJv01jAcenBD_FFAByg9-jlz0QKXi1HZIEfNIPMG3GFGgh8dGg1Y3D_f1xk8jg4kD5uhNxdXurn-8iNqU9OyA%3D%3D)

Author and activist Marianne Williamson is proud to endorse Melanie D’Arrigo’s historic campaign to win New York’s 3rd District.
In Congress, Melanie will work to promote peace and stop our country’s endless wars. And, in a time of historic wealth inequality, she’ll center the needs of working families and work to pass Medicare for All, strengthen unions and raise our minimum wage to a true living wage.
[**But first, Melanie needs a BIG grassroots showing ahead of the December 31st fundraising deadline. name: Deidre DeJear
subject: I wanted to call this to your attention.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4634?t=6&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu) While no Black woman has held the office of Governor in our nation's history, _we have the incredible opportunity to change all of that next year._

I am proud to be running for Governor of Iowa, **and I’m even more proud that there are 4 other Black women running for Governor across the country.** [Friend, will you join me in making history and split $5 between my campaign and VPP? I need 500 grassroots donations by midnight to help shatter this glass ceiling »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4635?t=7&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4636?t=8&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4637?t=9&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4638?t=10&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4634?t=11&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
Black women's representation matters, not just here in Iowa, but across the nation.

_Black women are 7.6% of the population, yet they account for just 4.3% of all members of the House and 0% of the Senate._

55 years after the Voting Rights Act passed, Black women’s and _EVERY American's right to vote_ remains under attack. It’s imperative that Black women fill leadership roles so we can be on the forefront of current and future battles for voting rights.

_I know that with your support, we can break barriers together._ **And not only can we break barriers for women and people of color throughout this campaign:**
_Your support will also break barriers for the many Americans who are experiencing the toughest economic times as a result of the most divisive leadership in history._
[So I’m asking you, friend, will you join me by splitting $5 to help me become the first Black woman elected to the office of Governor and elect other women like me across the country? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4635?t=12&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4636?t=13&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4637?t=14&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4638?t=15&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4634?t=16&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)
With humble thanks,

_Deidre DeJear_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=17&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1052%2E878179%2E6aersu)

name: David Horowitz
subject: The Enemy Within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock you or scare you --_I say it because it 's true._ And I say it with confidence because when I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. **My name is David Horowitz, and 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.** I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. **[Today, I'm asking you to join me in this fight, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $45 or more to my Freedom Center.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59109894:J_1lVyENn:m:1:3298722022:D559141B21F00FC6ED4D325AA7929D2B:r)** _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck._ **It 's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making.** For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, exposing this sinister movement and warning of what was to come. America's domestic enemies have smeared us every step of the way, and worked around the clock to cut off both political and financial support to silence us for good. We've been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center, and so many more because we're willing to say and do what no one else would to expose the enemy within. That's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now - how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, de-platform, and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... name: Connor Boyack
subject: They are lying about socialism and CRT in schools
body:
There are two things you don’t mess with — people’s money and people’s children.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4ehcbshbi23je7ttpntoit9b4l720jjlt6it7o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)

Friend,

There are two things you don't mess with -- people's money and people's children.

However, socialist revolutionaries want to do both. They are lying when they say CRT or "social justice" isn't being taught in schools.

Here are two examples from last month. Emphasis is added.

"Our curriculum is deeply using**critical race theory** , especially in social studies, but you'll find it in English language arts and the other disciplines. We were very intentional about ... embedding critical race theory within our curriculum." \- Detroit Superintendent

Seattle Public Schools is "working to develop a**liberatory** curriculum for grades K-5."

What does Seattle's "liberatory curriculum" include? Critical Race Theory is named. As well as "equity" which is equality of outcomes, AKA the same indoctrination founded by Marxism.

So, what is there to do about it? I'm not sitting around letting our education be hijacked by radicals.

I am the author of the popular Tuttle Twins series of children's books. Now, I am creating the **Tuttle Twins American History curriculum. **

[**I am humbly asking for your support. Can you donate $10, $35, $250, or more to the Tuttle Twins American History? Click here to donate >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvrv7ib8rpo8n3e5ed0epromtt67mv304isj2na8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)

*****As a special offer, all donations of $250 or more will have their name honored in the credits of the textbook.*****

Here's how it will work.
1. I am working with historians, authors, and curriculum experts to create an American History curriculum that will honor our past while telling the entire truth. We won't shy away from controversy, but we will show the narrative underlying American history -- our universal fight for freedom.
2. Working with our Tuttle Twins branding and illustrators, the history will be both entertaining and intellectually stimulating.
3. **My goal is to distribute 5,000 copies of the Tuttle Twins American History curriculum and get 5 charter schools to make it their official curriculum in 2022. **

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvpmn34hprv8dnlbpqf7kvrpjdrhsd3b4096qo60_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)

This is the biggest project the Tuttle Twins has undertaken since our animated online series.

But it's imperative that we offer families and schools a positive, pro-freedom historical alternative to the radical socialist perspective.

_To achieve this goal, I 'm looking to raise $50,000 online_. ANY amount you can give goes directly towards this project, and it will be critical to our success. We do not rely on government funding. We rely solely on supporters.

**Can you donate any amount you can generously spare today towards this major Tuttle Twins project?****Remember, if you donate $250 or more, then I will personally honor your name in our textbook.**

[**Donate $10 >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3nodglto85m6v5v1991a0mbfaill60c5sfnra9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z375t159dnh7s06ble6tno2a8jaa00ck8iblo0c8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf7nvhtb90eedkc3dsvsnngp17dmhste22gn1ffg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)
[**Donate $250 >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4vafb87reab3s64g1l7h49m92gq9347opai7p0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)
[**Donate $500 >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze1pq4ih6qvdd1jvaqjt8fku5jt5ie28v2c81j18_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)
[**Donate $1000 >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu1l6otu1hrbr3k4102bnonrar49etiilpr314do_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zejg6dai6tr64pqark6r5kr83u45h7rib5gibda8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)

I hope to see your name in the credits.

My team will be reaching out to thank you for your support. If you wish to remain anonymous, then you will have that opportunity as well.

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author, Tuttle Twins

P.S. Here's our initial design for the Tuttle Twins American History curriculum. [**Please donate today and help us fight back against the socialist indoctrination in schools >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zva34dn11ji0oh77omfgahb8d6051avefhqekgkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdg64o72c1h2bs)

subject: U.S. Senate 2022

body:
Please Open [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8249%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ctExDB4e7UsKTUV%2fhfOdHA&sysid=1)

---

Folks,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**

**_Watch Announcement Video Below_**
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10441%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KH5wVpKxCvcSMRP5L6U8%2bg&sysid=1)
Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I’ve done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

**_[I’m asking for your support to keep the radical left out of your pockets and as far away from your jobs as possible.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10442%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dn9cNve4lqJicR1LmBqJ4g&sysid=1)_**

| [ENDORSE ME HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10443%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YmPGp2TZ2VJbF8WAotx3gA&sysid=1)
---

I’m looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.**What you hear in town isn’t what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that’s for certain!**

I’m trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn’t making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

**Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it’ll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country.**

[$25](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10444%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3q5hbKUl%2bvZJfYgFk1iw7g&sysid=1)
---
[$50](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z8SnruocIsgtyyIfgZI0iQ&sysid=1)
---
[$100](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11556%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zAPx2L8JpAZyAFkzk9wSdQ&sysid=1)
---
[$250](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b%2fAstHdvkTAoCwwda0h8bw&sysid=1)
---
[$500](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11558%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SWpoBr0TaEtT41apnzKoUg&sysid=1)

Thank you and God Bless,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10440%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i%2ffZ%2bkV7rt85AOlq3RT2Zg&sysid=1)

Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.

But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.

**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**

As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.

_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._

I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State. But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country. Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom. When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy. As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics. But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second. subject: 98% of folks will ignore this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Marco wrote you a note, and he really didn’t want us to reach out and bug you... &nbs; p;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?35pnm--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Marco wrote you a note, and he really didn’t want us to reach out and bug you... but quite honestly, Fellow Conservative, we can’t afford to wait another minute to reach out.
**See Marco’s note below: **
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35pnm-1qrdq-4qqlpo9/ "Header")
---

Hi, Fellow Conservative. I know this is the 4th time I’ve interrupted you this week about our End of Year Deadline, but frankly, 98% of the folks I’m reaching out to won’t give. A lot of times people think they’ll give later or wait until they’re home for the evening, but then they forget. And I don’t blame them, it’s the holidays – things are busy.

Today, though, I’m begging you to help me defend America. **[All I’m asking for is $2.83, or whatever you can afford, to secure our future.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35pnm-1qrdr-4qqlpo0/ "All I’m asking for is $2.83, or whatever you can afford, to secure our future.")** I ask you, humbly: Please don't ignore this or save for later. If you are one of our rare donors, I warmly thank you.

Feel free to use the button below to access our secure and quick donation portal:

| [PLEASE HELP >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35pnm-1qrds-4qqlpo1/ "PLEASE HELP >>")
---

Please don’t ignore this cry for help. Our End of Year Deadline is make-or-break. We need you in this NOW!
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35pnm-1qrdt-4qqlpo2/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Fellow Conservative. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35pnm-1qrdu-4qqlpo3/ "please click here to donate now.")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Alex Lasry
subject: The end of the quarter will be a big test of our team’s strength, and we need to give it all we got
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
On December 31, every Federal campaign will be up against our last end-of-quarter deadlines before the election year. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40052693/322661640/1434030581?refcode=EM_FR_211227FR_N_AL_90DA_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0YjY2Zi0xNTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66M30PWwsoWmnywSjt_-SBfhgMl37V0pvFv9n4fwY3U=)
---
Peter,

You’ve probably received hundreds of emails over the last week about the upcoming end-of-quarter deadline. And if you haven’t, you’re about to this last week of December.

On December 31, every Federal campaign will be up against our last end-of-quarter deadline before the election year – and that means we need to show our team’s grassroots strength ahead of Ron Johnson’s reelection announcement.

**[Before I go any further, I’m asking you to donate $10 or what you can to my campaign as we head into the end of the year>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40052695/322661641/1434030581?refcode=EM_FR_211227FR_N_AL_90DA_6_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0YjY2Zi0xNTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66M30PWwsoWmnywSjt_-SBfhgMl37V0pvFv9n4fwY3U=)**

Look, Peter, I hate asking for contributions to run our campaign. But it’s necessary to build a large grassroots network to take on Ron Johnson and his corporate PAC megadonors, and that’s why you’ve been receiving emails from my team and me since I launched my campaign back in February asking you to chip in whenever you can.

I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC dollars because I want you to know that I’m working for you, not the special interests. And it’s going to take all of us to win this.

**[So, I’m going to ask you today to make a contribution of $10 now. Together, we can take on Ron Johnson, flip this seat blue, and keep making progress on the issues that matter most to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40052696/322661642/1434030581?refcode=EM_FR_211227FR_N_AL_90DA_6_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0YjY2Zi0xNTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=66M30PWwsoWmnywSjt_-SBfhgMl37V0pvFv9n4fwY3U=)** clean_body: On December 31, every Federal campaign will be up against our last end-of-quarter deadlines before the election year. | | = Peter, You’ve probably received hundreds of emails over the last week about the upcoming end-of-quarter deadline. And if you haven’t, you’re about to this last week of December. On December 31, every Federal campaign will be up against our last end-of-quarter deadline before the election year – and that means we need to show our team’s grassroots strength ahead of Ron Johnson’s reelection announcement. = Look, Peter, I hate asking for contributions to run our campaign. But it’s necessary to build a large grassroots network to take on Ron Johnson and his corporate PAC megadonors, and that’s why you’ve been receiving emails from my team and me since I launched my campaign back in February asking you to chip in whenever you can. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC dollars because I want you to know that I’m working for you, not the special interests. Friend, First, I hope you’ve been having a warm and restful holiday season. I’m reaching out because **[our campaign is approaching an important fundraising deadline at the end of the year](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40053956/322665066/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227EOY1_wm_60do_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzA5OWIxNy0xOTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfviGklZX9oAjSoHTGSm_2TJPoW2M4oMFBe-mgujnYg=)** , so I hope you’ll let me explain why it matters and how you can help. It’s no secret that the race for Maryland’s next governor is a competitive one — the Democratic field is crowded with multiple candidates vying to win the primary and get on November’s general election ballot. Campaigns for office are increasingly expensive year after year, but especially in a race like this one that’s so competitive. And the stakes couldn’t be higher: we have the chance to elect a Democrat to the governorship for the first time in eight years and bring fresh leadership to Annapolis. Leadership that aims to lift every working family up and make sure everyone has a seat at the table. With my experience leading soldiers in Afghanistan, running a small business, and overseeing one of the largest nonprofits in the country, I intend to be that leader for every Marylander — and with Aruna by my side as my Lieutenant Governor, we will be ready to get the job done on Day 1. _Good-paying jobs and career opportunities, strong public education, action on gun violence and climate change, a 21st-century public transit system_ — we can achieve all of this, together, if we win in 2022. But between now and then, our campaign has to continue bringing in the resources to pay for things like yard signs, events, advertisements, and more — and the more we raise from grassroots donors like you, the stronger we stand out from the crowd. **[So, with only four days left in 2021, I’m asking: can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to help us hit our end-of-year goal and power our campaign into 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40053957/322665067/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227EOY1_wm_60do_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzA5OWIxNy0xOTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfviGklZX9oAjSoHTGSm_2TJPoW2M4oMFBe-mgujnYg=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

It’s no secret that the race for Maryland’s next governor is a competitive one — the Democratic field is crowded with multiple candidates vying to win the primary and get on November’s general election ballot. Campaigns for office are increasingly expensive year after year, but especially in a race like this one that’s so competitive. And the stakes couldn’t be higher: we have the chance to elect a Democrat to the governorship for the first time in eight years and bring fresh leadership to Annapolis. Leadership that aims to lift every working family up and make sure everyone has a seat at the table. With my experience leading soldiers in Afghanistan, running a small business, and overseeing one of the largest nonprofits in the country, I intend to be that leader for every Marylander — and with Aruna by my side as my Lieutenant Governor, we will be ready to get the job done on Day 1. Good-paying jobs and career opportunities, strong public education, action on gun violence and climate change, a 21st-century public transit system — we can achieve all of this, together, if we win in 2022. But between now and then, our campaign has to continue bringing in the resources to pay for things like yard signs, events, advertisements, and more — and the more we raise from grassroots donors like you, the stronger we stand out from the crowd. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Every donation, no matter how small, truly makes a difference for a people-powered campaign like ours. Thanks for anything you can spare to help us keep up the momentum into the New Year. name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6608%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=OSCTtF9fxu3%2bXcGU50RbEA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68105%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dt9dfdIY%2fLQRPjL%2fxi8qsw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68106%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cy6pTeDs7duyIoV%2fZ3a4qg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68107%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4yubE5PVa0pSxGnCfd8fBw&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: This email asks for money.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We can’t let Republicans win supermajorities in Raleigh. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40055220/322669217/823540626?refcode=ea.ae187648-1d67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.ae187648-1d67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE4NzY0OC0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnV4e14whcAfYOabVc5kxcpR3_KDIvFgwPfh9bT-aAY=&emci=8ac9c3fd-7d62-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ae187648-1d67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, I hope you’re having a wonderful holiday season! I hate to hit your inbox so soon, but it’s the end of the year, and I need to square our budget books. It looks like **we’re still over $8,000 short of our year-end fundraising goal** , and there isn’t much time left to close the gap. **[Can you chip in whatever works for you right now to help me out?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40055222/322669219/435245919?refcode=ea.ae187648-1d67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.ae187648-1d67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTE4NzY0OC0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnV4e14whcAfYOabVc5kxcpR3_KDIvFgwPfh9bT-aAY=)** Peter, all our work next year to support North Carolina Democrats in the legislature and beyond depends on having the resources we need. To protect North Carolinians' rights and continue delivering the progress our state needs, we HAVE to make sure Republicans don’t gain supermajorities in Raleigh. If they do, they’ll prevent Roy and his allies from achieving our priorities — **and they’d be able to override a veto to enact their dangerous, far-right agenda.** **[If you’re with us in the fight for North Carolina’s future, Roy and I could really use your help before the year is out. clean_body: We can’t let Republicans win supermajorities in Raleigh. | Hi Peter, I hope you’re having a wonderful holiday season! I hate to hit your inbox so soon, but it’s the end of the year, and I need to square our budget books. It looks like we’re still over $8,000 short of our year-end fundraising goal , and there isn’t much time left to close the gap. = Peter, all our work next year to support North Carolina Democrats in the legislature and beyond depends on having the resources we need. To protect North Carolinians' rights and continue delivering the progress our state needs, we HAVE to make sure Republicans don’t gain supermajorities in Raleigh. If they do, they’ll prevent Roy and his allies from achieving our priorities — and they’d be able to override a veto to enact their dangerous, far-right agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Best wishes for 2022, Kate Connelly Team Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. clean_body: We need your help... | = We’ve said it before, Peter: the GOP is coming after our Democratic majorities with a vengeance. And their fundraising numbers prove it: Trump has over $100 million in the bank. The Senate GOP raised nearly $8.4 million in November. House Republicans raised $25.8 million last quarter alone. The worst part is the GOP is raising MILLIONS off of Trump’s Big Lie and far-right propaganda, and the donations keep pouring in. = = We can’t afford to miss this goal. Trump and his cronies are betting on the Republicans winning big in 2022 and stopping Biden’s plans to Build Back Better in their tracks. President Biden is working around the clock to undo the havoc the Trump Administration wreaked on our country — we can’t let Trump’s cronies win and erase all of our progress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country = = * Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. name: Freedom First Project
subject: One of the best things to know
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| |
Dear Friend, In this time of uncertainty and disruption, we at Hillsdale College aim to find ways to continue doing what we love-teaching the things that will perpetuate civil and religious liberty in America. Because one of the best things to know is the story of our nation, we have organized a special eight-week study group of one of our most popular online courses, "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope." In this course, historian Wilfred M. McClay examines the story of America as a land of hope, founded on high principles. And like all of Hillsdale's online courses, it is offered free of charge. Those who enroll in this special study group will receive a syllabus that organizes the course into 24 lessons over eight weeks. They will also have the chance to engage with fellow students on a private discussion board to foster the true spirit of a "college" as a means to build friendships by learning together. Students in this study group will also receive exclusive access to a livestream Q & A with Dr. McClay. This free special study group begins on Tuesday, January 10. To secure your spot today, click on the link below. **[https://online.hillsdale.edu/study-group/the-great-american-story](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** Warmest regards, Kyle Murnen, '09Director of Online LearningHillsdale College
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIxMzYxLWU2YjNlMzRiNWQzYjRlODlhNTgxZWY5MWZjYTUxZTQyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/JFD8wWIf8CTAZcWeOtIp8w) to unsubscribe.

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. name: V. Demings (personal note)
subject: I’m never one to tire from a challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead is easy
| | |
---
Friend – it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South – the youngest of seven children who went to segregated schools.
It wasn’t easy for my parents – Dad a janitor, Mom a maid – but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate from college.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056248/322671869/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjNjM2VmNS0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfuKwc10m03r5TWO3_07wL71GSNDg8a-JrULxpgQlDQ=)
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead – taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting – is easy. **But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win.**

**That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most:** [**Will you make a grassroots donation to help me win this battleground Senate race? Whatever you contribute will build up our resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056249/322671870/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjNjM2VmNS0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfuKwc10m03r5TWO3_07wL71GSNDg8a-JrULxpgQlDQ=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056250/322671871/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjNjM2VmNS0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfuKwc10m03r5TWO3_07wL71GSNDg8a-JrULxpgQlDQ=)
---
I'm proud of this team for the momentum you've helped me build so far, but I'm counting on supporters like you to contribute just $5 or more now if we're going to keep going – together.

Thank you, as always, for your support,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056251/322671872/1581265324?refcode=jtk1993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjNjM2VmNS0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfuKwc10m03r5TWO3_07wL71GSNDg8a-JrULxpgQlDQ=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056252/322671873/1804727444?refcode=jtk1993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjNjM2VmNS0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfuKwc10m03r5TWO3_07wL71GSNDg8a-JrULxpgQlDQ=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056253/322671874/-460395862?refcode=jtk1993-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjNjM2VmNS0xZDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OfuKwc10m03r5TWO3_07wL71GSNDg8a-JrULxpgQlDQ=&emci=722badd1-c05e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1f3c3ef5-1d67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

subject: ALARMING >> “Ron DeSantis’ White House odds improve amid Republican surge”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
we’re launching a massive effort in 2022 to stop his presidential ambitions! |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056542/322673203/1137768627?refcode=20211227_f_3_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlmOTQ4Mi0xZjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qU0Pm4Tx37uGe6e5WyxKETaCpB8p8N4PYv5SyL3oLWY=)
---

Folks,
* **FIRST,** Gov. DeSantis started hinting he wants to run for president in 2024.

* **THEN,** we began seeing headlines like this from Florida Politics: **_“Ron DeSantis’ White House odds improve amid Republican surge.”_**

* **NOW,** we’re about to launch a MASSIVE effort in 2022 to DEFEAT Gov. DeSantis and stop his presidential ambitions in their tracks ... but that won’t be possible without a surge of grassroots support. Unfortunately, we’re currently behind on our fundraising around the holidays.

MONEY LEFT TO RAISE: **_$3,000_**

Hey friend,
Since it’s the last week of the year, I made some resolutions: 1) Stop pluralizing words when I’m only referring to one thing.
But I also made some resolutions for Scott Franklin, because, well, have you been watching what he’s done this year?
So before we get to my resolutions for 2022, here’re some for Scott (take note, Scott!):
* **Stop attempting to overthrow free & fair elections.**
* **Stop undermining democracy** by perpetuating dangerous conspiracy theories and supporting real-life armed insurrections (yeah, that really happened this year).
* **Stop attacking every person’s right to choose** by trying to outlaw abortions.
* **Stop voting against the _most basic_ needs of constituents**, including COVID-19 relief, expansion of worker protections, expansion of voting rights, and climate change reform (even though some of the most vulnerable areas in the country are right here in Florida! But you already knew that).

I’d go on, but that’s quite enough irresponsibility for one email, and it’s the holidays, and I have some pressing appointments with multiple pie.
**My New Year’s resolution?** Very simple: Stop insurrectionist Scott Franklin from spending another term in Congress doing all of the things I just listed above. Instead, let’s work for the things that Floridians actually want, like climate justice, universal health care, and protecting our democracy.
[**We’ve got a crucial end-of-year FEC deadline at midnight on December 31, and my team set an ambitious goal of raising $15,000 in online grassroots donations before then — can you make a donation of any amount now to help us get there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40056583/322673340/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227EOY1_EG_main_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGJhNzBjOC0xZjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pGlZuBFGySHPgiO1xosaFS1n2XV8M9iqhkVJUmIXTfs=)

clean_body: | | = We’re just a week away from 2022, but we’ve still got a ways to go to hit our goal of $15,000 in online grassroots donations — = Hey friend, Since it’s the last week of the year, I made some resolutions: 1) Stop pluralizing words when I’m only referring to one thing. But I also made some resolutions for Scott Franklin, because, well, have you been watching what he’s done this year? So before we get to my resolutions for 2022, here’re some for Scott (take note, Scott!): Stop attempting to overthrow free & fair elections. Stop undermining democracy by perpetuating dangerous conspiracy theories and supporting real-life armed insurrections (yeah, that really happened this year). Stop attacking every person’s right to choose by trying to outlaw abortions. Stop voting against the most basic needs of constituents, including COVID-19 relief, expansion of worker protections, expansion of voting rights, and climate change reform (even though some of the most vulnerable areas in the country are right here in Florida! But you already knew that). I’d go on, but that’s quite enough irresponsibility for one email, and it’s the holidays, and I have some pressing appointments with multiple pie. My New Year’s resolution? Very simple: Stop insurrectionist Scott Franklin from spending another term in Congress doing all of the things I just listed above. Instead, let’s work for the things that Floridians actually want, like climate justice, universal health care, and protecting our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = h Thanks so much, Eddie | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. name: Team ODP
subject: We could say a lot about J.D. Vance's character, but this headline sums it up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| **ICYMI: Salon: Ohio Candidate J.D. Vance Calls Out Walmart For "Slave Labor” — And Heavily Invests In Its Stock**
Team, there are a lot of things we could say about J.D. Vance's character, but we'll let him show it off himself. Vance has heavily criticized Walmart for undermining American workers while being personally invested in the company.

Vance went after Walmart for using “slave labor” but according to Vance’s personal financial disclosure, he owns between $50,000 and $100,000 in Walmart stock. Vance also participated in a “fireside chat” with a Walmart executive in 2017. This is just another example of Vance saying one thing and doing another. He criticized Big Tech while deriving a “great deal” of his income from Big Tech-related ventures. He promised to address Ohio’s opioid crisis, but instead, created a nonprofit that was nothing more than a vanity project to boost his own political ambitions and enrich his political cronies.

And this guy _still_ thinks he's the right fit to represent Ohio in the Senate? We think not.

[**Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and we need to raise $15,000 to stay on track to flipping Ohio's open Senate seat and stopping J.D. Vance (or any other Republican candidate) from winning. **We’re just 5 days away from a very important day for our campaign -- the Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline at midnight on New Year’s Eve.** We will be required to **_publicly report_** our fundraising numbers to the FEC for the first time since September, and it’s crucial that we have a strong showing of grassroots support. We’ve set a goal of raising $25,000 before the end of the month, [**so please consider chipping in today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40059618/322683364/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.27_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGMzNDlkMy0yMzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-yAqXrD0A0mMhoI_veeECE4ktINZiYvCmeoFkRQbDg=)

My opponent, Washington Republicans, and far-right special interest groups are going to be carefully scrutinizing our report to determine how strong this campaign is -- and to see what they will need to spend to try to keep this seat red.

[**It is imperative we show them how much this campaign has grown over the past few months. Peter, will you rush a donation right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40059619/322683365/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.27_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGMzNDlkMy0yMzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-yAqXrD0A0mMhoI_veeECE4ktINZiYvCmeoFkRQbDg=) | [**DONATE NOW »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40059620/322683366/-1768393238?refcode=em_fr_2021.12.27_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGMzNDlkMy0yMzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T-yAqXrD0A0mMhoI_veeECE4ktINZiYvCmeoFkRQbDg=)

This district is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country. The road to Democrats keeping the majority in the House goes directly through eastern Iowa, and **_Washington Republicans know it._** It’s a good bet that the fundraising number we report will be influencing their strategy, so we cannot falter now.

clean_body: Help us cross the finish line = Peter, We’re just 5 days away from a very important day for our campaign -- the Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline at midnight on New Year’s Eve. We will be required to publicly report our fundraising numbers to the FEC for the first time since September, and it’s crucial that we have a strong showing of grassroots support. We’ve set a goal of raising $25,000 before the end of the month, = My opponent, Washington Republicans, and far-right special interest groups are going to be carefully scrutinizing our report to determine how strong this campaign is -- and to see what they will need to spend to try to keep this seat red. = | = This district is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country. The road to Democrats keeping the majority in the House goes directly through eastern Iowa, and Washington Republicans know it. It’s a good bet that the fundraising number we report will be influencing their strategy, so we cannot falter now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Liz Mathis Candidate for Congress, IA-02 Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. subject: Important Press Release from Erik Aadland Campaign
body:
A transition is coming
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dkXUCx9s2gjqfnb4CNXjbEEEvN7AENBqZ98HTCGkOGM2B-i_zYRKUgWHC-6YahJ2DCSofWzKreFi8vz4MBIrSOxTTEmdXBMpMfkeGdkpfwraqQedBQr0uBFH0KheRCzJtjr8Rtr04Xg2EB4ckRmMFFYETQeKGL8UsFJa8_M6l76WcvgcV94yhjufpOLV0DTpwDutRrunIGi0Gag6OH5QXQ==&c=dyohE6o92yDU5R6Ygq63visRR4wImETJjK2N5qT3BoQhLY_f87RFYA==&ch=HPAlGbMn3-K40BNCwiV7vX9WWbwpoKvaiUIOigK23mrg0qppqoxQdA==)

|
# Press release from the Erik Aadland Campaign
---
| (Dec. 27, 2021) With great enthusiasm for the future of Colorado, the Aadland for Colorado campaign announces Erik Aadland will transition from the U.S. Senate race to run in Congressional District 7. The decision was made following an abundance of consideration and the garnering of wise counsel.
Erik Aadland, who has been a leading candidate in the U.S. Senate Republican primary, believes the future of the state is at stake. The move to the Congressional race gives Republicans the best advantage in stopping the tide of socialism flooding Colorado.
"When I began my journey to serve as an elected official, I did it to honor the oath I took when I served in the military," said Erik. "I learned firsthand on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan that sacrifice is required to win any fight. We are in a fight for our nation's future. In one direction lies the Progressive Socialist future, led by the likes of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Representative Ed Perlmutter; it is the wrong path for our country."
Erik said that in 12 short months we have seen how destructive the Democratic agenda is to the American way of life, and how it has made it more difficult for Coloradans to thrive.
"We must change the direction, and 2022 is not a moment too soon," Erik continued. "Fortunately, in the other direction is the Shining City on a Hill, of which Reagan spoke and our founders envisioned, putting individual rights and Liberty at the forefront. It is the path to prosperity, opportunity and freedom."
Erik, who is a resident of Jefferson County in CD7, has been campaigning statewide in his bid to go to Washington as a U.S. Senator. During that time, Colorado underwent redistricting, with CD7 changing its composition drastically, making it far more competitive for a Republican. Now is the opportune time for a Republican candidate to take this seat back.
Now that he has been redistricted into the 7th, Erik has decided to withdraw from the U.S. Senate race to pursue serving in the U.S. House of Representatives by unseating incumbent Democrat Ed Perlmutter.
"Though it was a very difficult decision after investing significant time, money and effort into the U.S. Senate race, I am motivated by duty and a desire to be of service, and after much prayer and reflection, this is the clearer path to accomplish that end," Erik said.
Key figures at the state and national level who recognize the clear opportunity to win this district are very supportive of Erik's move.
"I am not running for office to serve my own ends--I'm not a career politician," said Erik. "There is a fight for integrity, accountability, transparency and virtue in the U.S. House of Representatives and this seat represents the primary line of defense against the tide of socialism that we've seen under the Biden Administration and Ed Perlmutter."
Erik recognizes it's time for new leadership in the district and intends to defeat Perlmutter by breathing new life into CD7 with fresh ideas and meaningful solutions. As a husband, and a father to three children Erik believes he is more in touch with the needs of Coloradans than a career politician who has served in Congress for more than 14 years with no substantial accomplishments or meaningful benefit to Colorado.
In making this difficult decision, Erik said that it is more important to put the good of the country before any personal ambition.
---
|
---
|
---

clean_body: A transition is coming | | | | == | Press release from the Erik Aadland Campaign | (Dec. 27, 2021) With great enthusiasm for the future of Colorado, the Aadland for Colorado campaign announces Erik Aadland will transition from the U.S. Senate race to run in Congressional District 7. The decision was made following an abundance of consideration and the garnering of wise counsel. Erik Aadland, who has been a leading candidate in the U.S. Senate Republican primary, believes the future of the state is at stake. The move to the Congressional race gives Republicans the best advantage in stopping the tide of socialism flooding Colorado. "When I began my journey to serve as an elected official, I did it to honor the oath I took when I served in the military," said Erik. "I learned firsthand on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan that sacrifice is required to win any fight. We are in a fight for our nation's future. In one direction lies the Progressive Socialist future, led by the likes of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Representative Ed Perlmutter; it is the wrong path for our country." Erik said that in 12 short months we have seen how destructive the Democratic agenda is to the American way of life, and how it has made it more difficult for Coloradans to thrive. "We must change the direction, and 2022 is not a moment too soon," Erik continued. "Fortunately, in the other direction is the Shining City on a Hill, of which Reagan spoke and our founders envisioned, putting individual rights and Liberty at the forefront. It is the path to prosperity, opportunity and freedom." Erik, who is a resident of Jefferson County in CD7, has been campaigning statewide in his bid to go to Washington as a U.S. Senator. During that time, Colorado underwent redistricting, with CD7 changing its composition drastically, making it far more competitive for a Republican. Now is the opportune time for a Republican candidate to take this seat back. Now that he has been redistricted into the 7th, Erik has decided to withdraw from the U.S. Senate race to pursue serving in the U.S. House of Representatives by unseating incumbent Democrat Ed Perlmutter. "Though it was a very difficult decision after investing significant time, money and effort into the U.S. Senate race, I am motivated by duty and a desire to be of service, and after much prayer and reflection, this is the clearer path to accomplish that end," Erik said. Key figures at the state and national level who recognize the clear opportunity to win this district are very supportive of Erik's move. "I am not running for office to serve my own ends--I'm not a career politician," said Erik. "There is a fight for integrity, accountability, transparency and virtue in the U.S. House of Representatives and this seat represents the primary line of defense against the tide of socialism that we've seen under the Biden Administration and Ed Perlmutter." Erik recognizes it's time for new leadership in the district and intends to defeat Perlmutter by breathing new life into CD7 with fresh ideas and meaningful solutions. As a husband, and a father to three children Erik believes he is more in touch with the needs of Coloradans than a career politician who has served in Congress for more than 14 years with no substantial accomplishments or meaningful benefit to Colorado. In making this difficult decision, Erik said that it is more important to put the good of the country before any personal ambition. | | | | | | == | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

Stacey Abrams is a far-left radical, and we can’t let her anywhere near the Governor’s Mansion. [**So please, rush your best year-end gift today to help save the great state of Georgia from being overrun by Stacey’s socialist agenda.**](http://trk.listelixr.) But don’t hesitate – our End-of-Year deadline is just a few days away. And we MUST head into 2022 with the critical resources we need to DEFEAT her at the ballot box. Thanks for your help,
Jeremy Brand

---
Hey Peter.
It’s hard to believe it’s the last week of the year! But we’ve still got a ways to go to reach our critical end-of-year fundraising goal — [chip in now to help us reach $16,000 before 2022, so we can take on Bill Lee and bring compassionate leadership back to our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40061640/322693268/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227eoy1_JM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjZmZWYwZC0yNzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D_bx1N6SDqImX_YuMud2nJCXqT8xZ8po0aOoBuYm3ps=)
I also wanted to take this moment to outline the three top priorities I’ve heard from Tennesseans in the first 4 months on this campaign. These are the issues that unite us, and they’re how we’ll start making Tennessee a place that works for ALL of us:
* **Fully funding our public schools** : Education is the ultimate equalizer; by reinvesting in our public education system, we can ensure equal opportunity for all of our children.

* **Expanding Medicaid and access to affordable healthcare** : No one should ever have to choose between putting food on the table and paying their medical bills.

* **Equity in job growth and job creation** : We need to invest in our workforce and develop a 21st-century economy that provides work and fair wages for all.

Those are the stakes, Peter. We can win this race, but we’ve got to keep the pressure on. [_**Can you help us make progress towards our end-of-year goal with a donation of any amount now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40061641/322693270/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227eoy1_JM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjZmZWYwZC0yNzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D_bx1N6SDqImX_YuMud2nJCXqT8xZ8po0aOoBuYm3ps=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:

---
| Peter,
Governor DeSantis is the #1 target for the radical Left and Democrats across the country. Why? Because he's putting Florida FIRST and protecting our American values from the Left's insane agenda.
Just this year, Governor DeSantis has: ✅ Held Big Tech accountable ✅ Stood strong AGAINST the Chinese Communist Party ✅ Kept our state OPEN for business and kids in the classroom ✅ Signed anti-rioting legislation ✅ Protected women's sports ✅ Banned Critical Race Theory in schools ✅ Strengthened Election Integrity by banning ballot harvesting and prohibiting Zuckerbucks ✅ Banned Vaccine Passports
And he's just getting started.
So, our team wants to know... [What issues matter MOST to you?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AiPhzTbmtio3FMAHESf8Ah0q9Z_ZS4UjszHi_hAL-gb2CHKbziLOPOKQrytT1XRkF8_F90vFo3Pw4r_aofoEfY9Eeo-Tgc0WfkcreXhXMHoi-8QvBwTkk94ugm1iq5iFlbVaVwEFAWWJ1ogIf44DNUlbBL8SW3EZ3HSAWhnzU24=&c=93U_sQdog6wjYxUuFHZiJcRI3bHni1YrByMpNWDMVLd6uVDJykxoKA==&ch=CQjGWB-zWcseok0w8vTDtnr2n19RxTeU6Fdl19vv958UAklWBX9Ptg==)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40062397/322696176/1927938479?refcode=20211226_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ0NGU3YS0yNzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_D4IRP905GDqHYvfr0_kXPUFV4Cr1xHDl1EpTaISIY=)
Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And our December deadline is nearly here. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the December fundraising deadline comes to an end? But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. Governor Greg Abbott

name: American Defense News
subject: Math and logic
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zevhorbb10lm9g54umcg3224e0vni088tt6aqmeo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdi69o34c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s32m2on8odjc2qmct1n69r62tlmm4p75dbkm6omdc9he4pj1ophepim9dli6uo6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30phh6ipm9ptmc5j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfruvkbumj4kvv51ufjviat8v8uc3mk9ib01rt48_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdi69o34c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjmj3aok33bpesdpb2s81b3bvkbagq1mihf2b9gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdi69o34c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z358qtrd9a526ad82cgjl8pmq70d8bbmlsic5c20_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdi69o34c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: All eyes are going to be on us.

So my team and I came together to see what we need to do to make sure everyone watching knows **we mean business.**

I grew up the child of immigrants, who fled a brutal dictator in the Dominican Republic. It's not lost on me that my life could've turned out differently had I not arrived in the US where I was given the chance to succeed – it’s a huge part of why I'm running for governor.

I **refuse** **to accept** that some of our public schools are the best in the nation – but others struggle to provide for kids' basic needs.

I **can't stand by** as Marylanders get boxed out of opportunities and too many of our kids live in poverty.

I **will not accept** that opportunity is only available to certain Marylanders to succeed and create wealth to leave behind for the next generation.

**The problems we're facing are fixable, but solving them requires an experienced leader who knows how to develop a plan, bring people together, listen, and get stuff done.** I came up in the School of Get Stuff Done, where you're not doing your job if you don’t deliver for your community. **I've delivered my entire career, and I'll continue that work as Maryland's Governor.**

**_[Will you pitch in and help us hit our end-of-year goal of 7,000 contributions? Our first public filing will be here in a matter of days, and we need to make sure we can take our momentum into the new year. Hitting our December fundraising goal is a critical part of that.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064093/322703704/-875520463?refcode=bpi-em-20211227-EOY1-ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTg3YzQ3Zi0yYzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-csqVw9xOfsNGLZ4T7bjkrubHDAOOHM7fWfWoBLVsI=)_**

I've said it before – we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to solve the problems that have been neglected by executive leadership in Maryland. **We just need to sustain our momentum and WIN.**

Thank you,

Tom

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Asking for a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hello —

In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year ends on December 31. This is an all-important test of our momentum, which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain?

Every three months, candidates for federal office are legally required to report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our FEC report will show the amount of money we have raised and most importantly, the number of people who have contributed to help.

Democrats have a 50/50 majority in the U.S. Senate, but that's just not cutting it right now. We need one more vote to pass important legislation like the Build Back Better bill, restore voting rights, guarantee paid leave and affordable child care, defend reproductive freedom, tackle the climate crisis — and yes, end the filibuster if that's what it takes to get the job done. I will be that critical vote.

But we need to flip a Republican seat to get it, which is why all eyes are on Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate race. It’s going to be a steep climb to raise enough resources to take on Ron Johnson, but I believe we can do it if each and every person reading this message chips in before the end of the year. So, I'm asking:

[**Will you add a contribution of $10 or more to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? I’m the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson in the most recent poll of our race. We can flip this seat blue, but I need your help to make sure we have a strong FEC report — especially our final one! subject: Why I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charles Graham for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064590/322707863/-325589832?refcode=gra_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzZmZmEwYi0yZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XErxmgnnC7FOk63BS28Za7WMq46r1d4dzfQb5WukUfk=)

| | Hey there folks, [**I’m about to ask you to become one of the 355 donors I need to help me reach my FEC end-of-year fundraising goal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064592/322707865/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211227_FR_EOY1Congress_A0_na_U1_X7&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzZmZmEwYi0yZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XErxmgnnC7FOk63BS28Za7WMq46r1d4dzfQb5WukUfk=) – but first, I have a story to tell you. When I was just a boy, the Ku Klux Klan announced a night rally in my home county of Robeson, North Carolina – a poor farming community made up of Black, white, and American Indian folks like my family and me – proud members of the Lumbee tribe. The Klan called the Lumbees “mongrels” and “half breeds” – and, despite warnings from the police chief that our community would not tolerate their hate, **50 Klan members arrived at Hayes Pond the night of January 18th, 1958.** Not a bad turn out for a winter night –**the problem is, they were surrounded by _400 Lumbees._** Hundreds of regular folks – barbers, expectant mothers – banded together to fight back against hate and ignorance. The Klan got run out of town, and after the press ran with the story of one town beating the Klan, the Battle of Hayes Pond became a forgotten part of history. But, it’s worth remembering – especially today, when lies in Washington turn into violence – like the January 6th insurrection on our nation’s Capitol. **And the biggest lie is that America is at war with itself.** **That’s why I’m running for Congress** – because sometimes, we’re called upon to put things right. Like the folks who showed up to Hayes Pond to fight back against hate, or America today – a country that is divided and afraid. I’m running to remind folks that we can trust our neighbors, that we don’t have to live in fear. The people who stood up at Hayes Pond refused to be afraid. And I want to share that lesson with every North Carolinian and every American – **that human dignity is a human right.** It’s time to rebuild our trust in one another and rebuild our nation.[**If you’re with me, will you chip in to my campaign today and help me reach my critical end-of-year fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064593/322707866/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211227_FR_EOY1Congress_A0_na_U1_X7&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzZmZmEwYi0yZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XErxmgnnC7FOk63BS28Za7WMq46r1d4dzfQb5WukUfk=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064595/322707867/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211227_FR_EOY1Congress_A0_na_U1_X7&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzZmZmEwYi0yZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XErxmgnnC7FOk63BS28Za7WMq46r1d4dzfQb5WukUfk=)
---
The people at Hayes Pond didn’t set out to make history – they were just answering a neighbors call. **And now, it’s our turn.**
With your help, we can stand up to the extremist Republicans in North Carolina and flip this state blue, giving NC the representation and integrity they deserve.
[**Will you help me answer the call and chip into my end-of-year fundraising goal to bring dignity and trust back to the American people?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064596/322707868/892043497?refcode=EM_BS_GRA_211227_FR_EOY1Congress_A0_na_U1_X7&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzZmZmEwYi0yZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XErxmgnnC7FOk63BS28Za7WMq46r1d4dzfQb5WukUfk=)
