clean_body: | = | | Hey there folks, = – but first, I have a story to tell you. When I was just a boy, the Ku Klux Klan announced a night rally in my home county of Robeson, North Carolina – a poor farming community made up of Black, white, and American Indian folks like my family and me – proud members of the Lumbee tribe. The Klan called the Lumbees “mongrels” and “half breeds” – and, despite warnings from the police chief that our community would not tolerate their hate, 50 Klan members arrived at Hayes Pond the night of January 18th, 1958. Not a bad turn out for a winter night –the problem is, they were surrounded by 400 Lumbees. Hundreds of regular folks – barbers, expectant mothers – banded together to fight back against hate and ignorance. The Klan got run out of town, and after the press ran with the story of one town beating the Klan, the Battle of Hayes Pond became a forgotten part of history. But, it’s worth remembering – especially today, when lies in Washington turn into violence – like the January 6th insurrection on our nation’s Capitol. And the biggest lie is that America is at war with itself. That’s why I’m running for Congress – because sometimes, we’re called upon to put things right. Like the folks who showed up to Hayes Pond to fight back against hate, or America today – a country that is divided and afraid. I’m running to remind folks that we can trust our neighbors, that we don’t have to live in fear. The people who stood up at Hayes Pond refused to be afraid. And I want to share that lesson with every North Carolinian and every American – that human dignity is a human right. It’s time to rebuild our trust in one another and rebuild our nation.= | | | = The people at Hayes Pond didn’t set out to make history – they were just answering a neighbors call. And now, it’s our turn. With your help, we can stand up to the extremist Republicans in North Carolina and flip this state blue, giving NC the representation and integrity they deserve. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Together, there’s nothing we can’t achieve. Thank you for being part of my team, Charles Graham | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. subject: Why I'm asking

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064567/322707700/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjZmZmEwYi0yZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6bmnuYorHQYfvzFWA1DlUmI2u1eNpWTXhqEYlpXMrw=&emci=ff36c0d0-cb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e26ffa0b-2e67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
With the new year just days away, we’re quickly approaching our most important deadline yet. I know we ask a lot from our supporters, but we do so out of necessity. I wanted to take a few moments today to remind you why I’m running and just what’s at stake in this important election.
**Bringing good, high-paying jobs to our community** \- Clean energy jobs are the way of the future. And these jobs help provide economic mobility for Southern Arizona families. But tax incentives alone won’t attract these high paying, skilled jobs we need to move our economy forward. Which is why, as your next Congresswoman, I will focus intently on workforce development programs that will attract the jobs of tomorrow.
**Securing clean, reliable water for generations to come** \- There is no resource more important, and more scarce, in Southern Arizona than reliable, clean drinking water. As your next Congresswoman, I will use my lifetime of experience in water policy to develop new approaches to securing our water future.
**Making healthcare more affordable for everyone** \- Healthcare is a right, not a privilege. We must do everything in our power to lower the price of prescription drugs, lower premiums, and ensure every Arizonan has the coverage they need.
As a professor at the University of Arizona, as a state legislator, and most importantly as a working mom, I have the experience to deliver for Southern Arizona. I would be honored to represent our community just as Gabby Giffords and Ann Kirkpatrick have in the past. But I need your help to make it happen.
[**With our most important deadline a few short days away, I’m asking: can I count on you to make a contribution to help send me to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40064572/322707703/558373307?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_122721_EOQ_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjZmZmEwYi0yZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6bmnuYorHQYfvzFWA1DlUmI2u1eNpWTXhqEYlpXMrw=)

| | Peter, As the year draws to a close, I’ve been reflecting on why I decided to run for Congress. I’m running because I want to be part of creating the future our kids deserve. I’m running because I believe that elected office is both a way to serve and to make a difference. I’m running because there is a lot that is broken in our country and politics right now and I believe that we will find our way forward together by doubling down on the values we hold most dear – love, hope, empathy, and justice. Folks just like you have stepped up with us because you want to make a difference, too. I’m going to share more about what this all means to me in just a moment – but first, I want to talk about our FEC deadline. [**We set a goal of $50,000 and we’re $29,370 away from reaching it. Before I launched my campaign for Congress, my wife, Meghann, and I had a lot of conversations about what this would mean for us and our kids as a family. Especially for our kids.
To be completely transparent: campaigning can be an intense experience. It means a lot of time on the road. Early mornings getting ready to travel and knock on doors across different counties and late nights huddling with our team to assess our daily progress toward fundraising goals. Meghann and I both work and this would mean even more juggling.
But what ultimately convinced me to begin this journey was that I could picture a better future for my kids and kids across WNC**with** me in Congress. The reality is that WNC is not being represented in Congress right now, and we haven’t been meaningfully or well represented for quite some time. Countless opportunities to fight for and pass policies that will help people have been lost because of this.
I want my children to grow up in a world that’s safe. Where people can be who they are, can love who they love, can build the life they dream. Where everyone has access to affordable healthcare, and where climate change isn’t an overwhelming threat to our future.
But none of these things exist under Madison Cawthorn’s extremist vision for North Carolina – and they won’t. His brand of politics is focused on toxic division, spreading lies, and building his brand.
It’s not about service, leadership, or making a difference.
**I’m running for Congress because we owe it to our kids to create a future that’s worth fighting for. Our end-of-year goal is critical to making sure we have the resources we need to take extremism head-on.**

name: Bristol Garrett
subject: David Perdue for Governor Campaign
body:
Hello there, Peter! Thank you for contacting Team Perdue. I would love to help you get plugged in to our campaign.

David’s mission is to be a bold conservative for Georgia, and we’re excited to have you join us in this fight.

In order to get you connected with the campaign, please provide the following information so we can get you started working with Team Perdue:

Peter, we look forward to fighting with you!

\--

Bristol Garrett

Intern for Field Coordination

name: ICYMI News
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcj99bafr9ps0mmj7j43fsm27u1jc6i18k8tld20_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdh60o74s3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6ve235p1b3i2pta089tm2cs6i2lrhfe9jqggsho_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdh60o74s3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2mmm9h1vn1f4qpgko99so7ntqnfmjjnbi32rda8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdh60o74s3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Friend, **Right now,[there are just four days left until our campaign’s biggest deadline of the year](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40066267/322715488/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211227eom2_ae_od_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjEyNDVmNS0zMTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjA_BCZCaOuhDQgsJgAbHfeYRBN6lBpw1Pqf55EJK8Q=), so I hope you’ll let me take a minute to explain why your support matters now more than ever.** Growing up, I never in a million years imagined I would someday run for office. But that changed when I witnessed the violent attack on our Capitol last January and the deliberate attempt to undermine our democracy. Even worse, our own Representative Brian Fitzpatrick did little to address it, refusing to vote to impeach Donald Trump for his incitement of the insurrection. But that’s just one of many problems our district, our state, and our country face. It’s 2021 and people are still struggling to feed their families, give their kids a good education, and pay for their health care. The minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 here in PA, and for the first time in years, young people have it worse off than their parents did. With Fitzpatrick failing to deliver for working families here in PA-01, I decided to run and be part of the solution. And even since I launched this campaign, we’ve witnessed alarming attacks on our rights to vote and reproductive choice by the GOP. It’s got to stop. Together, we can change things for the better and create a government that actually works for the people. But we have our work cut out for us going up against an incumbent with $1.5 million in his war chest. **That’s where you come in. This campaign depends on small-dollar grassroots donations from everyday people like you, and right now, we’re $4,732 short of our end-of-year goal.** **[Please, if you can, chip in $10 or more today to help flip this seat, defend our House majority, and send me to fight for you in Washington next November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40066268/322715489/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211227eom2_ae_od_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjEyNDVmNS0zMTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IjA_BCZCaOuhDQgsJgAbHfeYRBN6lBpw1Pqf55EJK8Q=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: Real, progressive policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | I started this campaign to fight for real, progressive policies that will make a difference for working families, not billionaires and Wall Street.

For years, average American families have been struggling to make ends meet because of a lack of initiative and care from both corporate Democrats and Republicans. While politicians like Ron Johnson continue to cash in checks from billionaire donors and corporate PACs, voters are begging for change.

**I’m determined to bring that change to Washington — but I can’t do this alone.**

[Our crucial final FEC filing deadline of the year is just a few days away — and we set a goal to raise $20,000 by the end of the month. Can you chip in today to help us finish strong and keep our momentum going into election year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40066399/322716171/1877363767?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211227_1_1&refcode2=053c8e39-3267-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTNjOGUzOS0zMjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnRkH1uFT7bU6pc68N15B1qdVRXF3N_JBqgZMn8QrFg=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

I hope you had a restful and meaningful holiday weekend spent with friends and family. **[I know it’s a busy Monday so I’ll get right to the point: I’m up against a critical end-of-year deadline, and I’m asking for your support of just $3 >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40066449/322716226/-300780600?amount=3&refcode=ea.033c8e39-3267-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.033c8e39-3267-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzNjOGUzOS0zMjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emENe_AKbCILd-MBNeHXfEtZ_mVVmhjCa69qpAwXLJ8=)**

**Why just $3? Let me explain:**

Next month, my team will file with the FEC, and everyone (allies, opponents, and political pundits alike) will be focused on one number: how much our team raised this year and if it’s enough to win our district for Democrats.

**But I’m focused on a different number: the number of individual contributions our grassroots campaign has received.**

Because, unlike my Republican opponents, I will not be trying to shake down Big Oil and Pharma PACs or wealthy Trump-aligned donors.

Instead, together, we’re building a grassroots movement, one fueled by working Coloradans — teachers, nurses, fellow pediatricians, librarians, engineers, and so many other workers. To me, it’s the number of individuals donating, not how much they can give, that determines the strength of our campaign.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in just $3 before our rapidly-approaching end-of-year deadline. clean_body: This is the kind of campaign I am building: | | = Peter, I hope you had a restful and meaningful holiday weekend spent with friends and family. = Why just $3? Let me explain: Next month, my team will file with the FEC, and everyone (allies, opponents, and political pundits alike) will be focused on one number: how much our team raised this year and if it’s enough to win our district for Democrats. But I’m focused on a different number: the number of individual contributions our grassroots campaign has received. Because, unlike my Republican opponents, I will not be trying to shake down Big Oil and Pharma PACs or wealthy Trump-aligned donors. Instead, together, we’re building a grassroots movement, one fueled by working Coloradans — teachers, nurses, fellow pediatricians, librarians, engineers, and so many other workers. To me, it’s the number of individuals donating, not how much they can give, that determines the strength of our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = Thank you, Dr. Caraveo | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. subject: Abby's birthday surprise (shhh!)

body:
| | |
---
Hi, Peter. Today is one of my absolute favorite days of the year. **It's Abby's birthday!**
I'm incredibly grateful that I was lucky enough to marry my best friend. Abby is one of the best people that I know. She truly cares about bettering the lives of working families like the one she grew up in, and over the last few months, I've watched Abby pour her entire heart and soul into this campaign so she can _win this_ for working families.
This grassroots team, Peter, does so much to keep her going. Knowing that there are thousands of people standing behind her, ready to fight for this campaign and the values we share really does mean so, so much to her – and that's why I'm emailing you today.
I know how happy it would make Abby to hear from you today and be reminded that you have her back through thick and thin.** I put together a special birthday e-card for Abby, and I'd appreciate it if you could add your name to wish her a happy birthday!**

body:
I’m SO SORRY I’m bothering you the day before Christmas Fellow Conservative, but I have some bad news I need to share with you ASAP. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?35ree--fgxr-4qqlpo9&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

---
| | | I’m SO SORRY I’m bothering you, Fellow Conservative, but I have some bad news I need to share with you ASAP.

**BAD NEWS:** Our biggest deadline of the year is only one week away and I’m not sure we’ll be able to reach it. I know everyone’s busy with festivities and preparations, but I just wanted to check in one last time before the holidays to see if you could help out. Democrats are eyeing Florida’s Senate seat because they know what I know: this race is incredibly tight and the future of the Senate runs right through Florida. My race is neck-and-neck but things could change at any moment.

**HOW YOU CAN HELP:** Can you rush in a donation before 11:59 PM? Florida’s last Senate race was decided by 0.1% so every dollar makes a difference. Your donation could make or break my campaign. Please, whatever you can spare would be greatly appreciated.
**[SEND MARCO IMMEDIATE HELP>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35ree-1qsnd-4qqlpo2/ "SEND MARCO IMMEDIATE HELP >>")**

---
---

Thank you for your help,

Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35ree-1qsne-4qqlpo3/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Fellow Conservative. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35ree-1qsnf-4qqlpo4/ "please click here to donate now.")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

body:
Peter -

The new year is just a few days away, and before you know it, our friends and neighbors from across the 114th District will start casting their votes and making their voices heard. Charlie is running to build a better Texas for everyone - where all of our neighbors are welcomed, loved, and included.

But he can’t do it without your help - can you chip in today to help us win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Over the last few months we have been block walking, knocking doors, and having conversations with our neighbors about the future we want for Texas. Texans are tired of the political games, misplaced priorities, and senseless bullying they see from extremists like Greg Abbott, Dan Patrick, and Ken Paxton, and Texans know that we have the opportunity to elect strong leaders like Charlie who will fight for our community and focus on the issues that matter most – restoring reproductive rights, fully funding our public schools, and fixing our power grid, to name a few.

This campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you. Can you donate $12 or more today to help us meet our goals? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

With your support, we can continue to reach voters all across our communities and bring this campaign home.

- Team Gearing

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

body:
| I’ll get straight to the point: **I need your help**.

December 31st is my FIRST Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline since I announced my campaign for Congress.

Let’s show everyone that we are serious about sending a pediatrician to Congress.

**The team and I have set the bold goal of raising another $25,000 online before midnight on Friday.**

Political pundits, the media, and Nancy Mace’s allies will scrutinize what we report closely. They will look for one thing: **Do we have what it takes to go all the way and win in 2022?**

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: consequences of the new NJ-07 map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40067017/322719208/-911644977?amount=10&&refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_211227_1_1&refcode2=be09e02b-3567-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA5ZTAyYi0zNTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpcVJy1-XcTW9bn_fKMQqGAl9rM70kvO2aH5ebh1wN8=)

| | Team,

Last week, New Jersey’s Redistricting Commission approved its maps, and we learned the new lines of New Jersey’s 7th District.

**The bottom line is that redistricting hasn’t made things easier for us.** But as every one of you know, I’ve only ever won hard races. And my likely opponent, Tom Kean Jr., has only ever lost them — for good reason.

So now is the time to show that we’ve got what it takes to win this race. [Can you double down on your support before the end of the year?

This is the first FEC deadline since our new lines were announced so all eyes are on us. Everything we raise will go public and what we report will be used as a benchmark of support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40067018/322719209/1474767726?amount=15&refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_211227_1_1&refcode2=be09e02b-3567-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA5ZTAyYi0zNTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpcVJy1-XcTW9bn_fKMQqGAl9rM70kvO2aH5ebh1wN8=)

The other obvious consequence of the new map is that every other Congressional district in New Jersey has now been made safer for its Democratic or Republican incumbents. So we can definitively say that **our race will be the one true wild card in New Jersey in 2022 — the one race most likely to decide control of the House.** I’ve always said that by knocking on doors and donating dollars in our little corner of America, we can have outsized impact on the direction of the country — and that’s never been more true than today.

Over the last few days, so many of you have reached out to say you’ve never been more fired up to defend this seat. I'm incredibly moved by the messages of support from so many folks in my current and new district. Everything I do is done with your interests and input in mind.

Meanwhile, I will continue to do everything in my power to defend our democracy and to deliver for New Jerseyans. [I need you to join me in that fight and help us have the strongest showing before our FEC deadline on December 31st.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40067019/322719210/1474767726?amount=15&refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_211227_1_1&refcode2=be09e02b-3567-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTA5ZTAyYi0zNTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lpcVJy1-XcTW9bn_fKMQqGAl9rM70kvO2aH5ebh1wN8=)

The stakes have never been higher. And I’ve never been prouder to be a part of this team.

Tom

---
|
---
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: 2021 Has Been The Most Interesting Year Of My Life
body:
What An Interesting Year... Last year at this time I was preparing for 2021 as a husband, father, pastor and business owner. I had no idea what 2021
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2066655.1204.1.c8c5a100a417af653c199a81bdb106e8) |
---
## What An Interesting Year...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2066655.1205.1.ca3949af3f34dd38e794a9f74b3878e7)
---
Last year at this time I was preparing for 2021 as a husband, father, pastor and business owner.
**I had no idea what 2021 would have in-store.**
After January 6, I began to complain _quite a bit_ to my wife Kendra about the problems in our country and the failures of RINO James Lankford (R-OK). She said, **"Stop complaining and run for the US Senate."**
I was not for that idea. However, she kept pushing along with several others I trusted. In February, I received a call from America's General, **Michael Flynn** , and I was blown away. The General and I had a beautiful conversation with him nudging me to run and telling me he would do everything he could to make sure we would win.
With that final nudge I made the official decision to run for the US Senate in Oklahoma and what a journey it has been.
In 7 months, my world has totally changed.
I have met some of the greatest Patriots in our country such as **President Donald J. Trump** , **Eric Trump** , **Roger Stone** , **Mike Lindell** and so many others.
I have been privileged to speak all across the country to hundreds of thousands of Americans and sign over 50,000 [COVID19 Religious Exemption forms](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2066655.1206.1.638163943d6fa3f09a526009b0b3d544).
With all the good things there has also been personal attacks from the **#FakeNews** and online trolls. The NY Times, CNN, MSNBC and the trash Washington Post have all written hit pieces on me but that has only fueled my fire.
2021 has been incredible. I believe 2022 will be even better.
2022 marks the official start of **RINO hunting season** in Oklahoma and we have to remove a RINO of the highest order, James Lankford.
We have **5 days left** of 2021 and the 4th Quarter to hit our [goal](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2066655.1207.1.0d3b53107f6998c3761cf7ce03533a53) of $50,000.
These funds will be used in 2022 to begin mass advertising to let the people of Oklahoma know they do not have to settle but can have an America First fighter represent them in the US Senate.
In order to win, I need your help. Every dollar helps us reach a person to let them know that I am an option in 2022.
Our message of America First resonates with the voters of Oklahoma but we need the resources to get that message out on a mass level.
Please _consider_ making a [donation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2066655.1208.1.b96fabd9f68786139c865cabc45cacf5) of $5 or more to the campaign before midnight on December 31.
Together we will take back our country if we will use our **TIME, TALENT & TREAUSRE** to do so.
Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

clean_body: What An Interesting Year... Last year at this time I was preparing for 2021 as a husband, father, pastor and business owner. I had no idea what 2021 | | | What An Interesting Year... | Last year at this time I was preparing for 2021 as a husband, father, pastor and business owner. I had no idea what 2021 would have in-store. After January 6, I began to complain quite a bit to my wife Kendra about the problems in our country and the failures of RINO James Lankford (R-OK). She said, "Stop complaining and run for the US Senate." I was not for that idea. However, she kept pushing along with several others I trusted. In February, I received a call from America's General, Michael Flynn , and I was blown away. The General and I had a beautiful conversation with him nudging me to run and telling me he would do everything he could to make sure we would win. With that final nudge I made the official decision to run for the US Senate in Oklahoma and what a journey it has been. In 7 months, my world has totally changed. I have met some of the greatest Patriots in our country such as President Donald J. Trump , Eric Trump , Roger Stone , Mike Lindell and so many others. I have been privileged to speak all across the country to hundreds of thousands of Americans and sign over 50,000 . With all the good things there has also been personal attacks from the #FakeNews and online trolls. The NY Times, CNN, MSNBC and the trash Washington Post have all written hit pieces on me but that has only fueled my fire. 2021 has been incredible. I believe 2022 will be even better. 2022 marks the official start of RINO hunting season in Oklahoma and we have to remove a RINO of the highest order, James Lankford. We have 5 days left of 2021 and the 4th Quarter to hit our of $50,000. These funds will be used in 2022 to begin mass advertising to let the people of Oklahoma know they do not have to settle but can have an America First fighter represent them in the US Senate. In order to win, I need your help. Every dollar helps us reach a person to let them know that I am an option in 2022. Our message of America First resonates with the voters of Oklahoma but we need the resources to get that message out on a mass level. Please consider making a of $5 or more to the campaign before midnight on December 31. Together we will take back our country if we will use our TIME, TALENT & TREAUSRE to do so. Also, if you live in Oklahoma and would be willing to host me at your home or business with 10+ friends for a meet & greet in 2022 that would be incredibly helpful. If you live outside of Oklahoma but would be willing to host a fundraiser that would be great. To arrange a meet & greet or a fundraiser please email caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com Thank you, Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on , , , , GETTR & ). | | | Jackson Lahmeyer with President Donald J. name: Tobias Read
subject: Spread cheer, not COVID
body:
It’s the end of another COVID year. It’s hard to believe that we’ve lived two years of this.
---
| | Dear Peter, It’s the end of another COVID year. It’s hard to believe that we’ve lived two years of this. Unfortunately, nearly 1 million Americans haven’t lived through it, and millions more have been emotionally, financially, and physically impacted. 2022 doesn’t need to be another COVID year. As Oregonians, we’ve always worked together to overcome adversity, and right now that means **we need to get everyone vaccinated (and boosted!), wear our masks, and protect our communities.** My campaign to become Oregon’s next Governor is about getting back to the issues that impact our future. Investing in and strengthening our education system, leading on climate change, giving more Oregonians a secure retirement, providing more housing options to those who have been left out in the cold, and creating more good paying jobs throughout Oregon. I know that our state government can do much more to help families and communities. **Together, we can make it happen.** As we close out this year, let’s not succumb to cynicism and pessimism. There is light at the end of the tunnel, but we must redouble our efforts to beat back this pandemic and protect our friends, family, and neighbors. I’m optimistic that we can take care of each other, still responsibly and safely see family and friends over the holidays, and keep our schools and businesses open in the New Year. It begins with getting vaccinated and boosted. **[You can learn more about vaccination and COVID here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40067191/322721562/164648953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODhkOTE2ZC0zNjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grnkCk2KweQwX9R9FIWj-C5LkICanTMfHbE0S78-6d0=&emci=c5210784-2e67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d88d916d-3667-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126#/)**. And to learn more about COVID testing, please **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40067192/322721564/-993323449?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODhkOTE2ZC0zNjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=grnkCk2KweQwX9R9FIWj-C5LkICanTMfHbE0S78-6d0=&emci=c5210784-2e67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d88d916d-3667-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=30662126)**.
Thank you,

name: Mikayla Ridley
subject: ICYMI: Don we now our gay apparel, fa-la-la-la-la, la-la-la-la
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mikayla Ridley for Congress
body:
| |
---
Dear Peter, Merry Christmas to all those celebrating this weekend! The holidays are my favorite time of year, and it is always especially fun for me to "don my gay apparel" for the festivities!
---
|
---
I mean, arguably, all of my apparel is "my gay apparel," but during the holidays it's fun to go all the way with it. Whatever your "gay apparel" is--whether it's rainbow pride, red and green, blue and white, or any other colors--we hope you have been enjoying a very happy holiday season this year! We wish you and your family health and good cheer as we wrap up 2021 and we know that 2022 is going to be a big one! In solidarity, always,
Mikayla Ridley and the whole Ridley for Congress team

name: Kara Hahn
subject: They're going to look at one thing in particular:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40067709/322722666/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGM2OGU4Yi0zNjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ff5aHG_9FCztV9rbOvdm3yQoWVVKwF6nI5tC02zTXI=)

Hello,

Having the support of grassroots activists is the key to flipping New York's 1st District blue -- so when I ask for your support, I believe you deserve to have all the same information that I have.

Every three months, campaigns are required to report their fundraising numbers to the Federal Elections Commission (FEC). At the end of every quarter, Zach (my team's Finance Director) and I are responsible for reporting **[how much our campaign has raised,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40067710/322722667/1650274123?refcode=em21_211227_eoq1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGM2OGU4Yi0zNjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ff5aHG_9FCztV9rbOvdm3yQoWVVKwF6nI5tC02zTXI=)** who contributed, and how much we've spent.

This month, we'll submit our filing report for the _final_ quarter of 2021. When our report gets published by the FEC, **we want everyone to see** what we see on the ground every single day -- that grassroots Democrats are ready to take back this district in 2022. **And by everyone, I mean all the potential supporters, stakeholders, and media who will be analyzing our fundraising numbers after this deadline.**

**[On December 31st, the final quarter of 2021 ends. As of this email, with only four days left to reach our goal, we're $11,651 short. I'm counting on grassroots activists like you chipping in whatever you can to help close the gap -- even if it's just $5. clean_body: | = Hello, Having the support of grassroots activists is the key to flipping New York's 1st District blue -- so when I ask for your support, I believe you deserve to have all the same information that I have. Every three months, campaigns are required to report their fundraising numbers to the Federal Elections Commission (FEC). At the end of every quarter, Zach (my team's Finance Director) and I are responsible for reporting = who contributed, and how much we've spent. This month, we'll submit our filing report for the final quarter of 2021. When our report gets published by the FEC, we want everyone to see what we see on the ground every single day -- that grassroots Democrats are ready to take back this district in 2022. And by everyone, I mean all the potential supporters, stakeholders, and media who will be analyzing our fundraising numbers after this deadline. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much, Kara Hahn Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. Friend, the bipartisan investigation into the Jan. 6 riot is uncovering new evidence against Donald Trump every day, **and I need you to hear the most important details as this case rapidly evolves:**
In his final days in power, Donald Trump repeatedly tried to pressure the Department of Justice into overturning the Georgia election results, and he even asked his advisors about **sending the military to the states he lost** in an attempt to stay in power.
These plans didn't come to fruition. Instead, his son's girlfriend raised $3 MILLION for the Jan. 6 rally, where Trump told a group of agitated protesters that, **"If you don't fight like hell, you're not going to have a country anymore." **
We all know what happened next, friend. I'll never forget the moment that Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol and fought their way through Capitol police officers. **I was in the House gallery, ducking for cover and fearing for my life.**
This is America, friend, and in this country, we abide by peaceful transitions of power – no matter who wins. No one is above the law, which is exactly what I said when I managed Trump's first impeachment trial. **But some far-right Republicans, including Marco Rubio, are trying to let Trump off the hook.**
**Trump loyalists like Rubio want you to forget that Trump nearly destroyed our democracy. They want you to forget that Trump bribed a foreign official, pressuring him to interfere in the 2020 election.** And, they want you to let Trump run for president all over again. **I won't let that happen, friend, but I can't overcome Trumpism alone, so I have to ask you:**
**Do you believe that Donald Trump and his associates should be held accountable for their misdeeds?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40068338/322725271/2072693167?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1995-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjBjY2UyMC0zNzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JHpV7S1XJTPfwGbrKnRgs8CNvQA9rQH94N93gThYgY=&emci=111331f5-c25e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d20cce20-3767-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta for Senate
subject: The fate of the Senate is going to come down to Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
This race is going to be close
#

Friend,
The fate of the Senate is going to come down to Pennsylvania. And this race is going to be close.
Close enough that it's a toss up whether we win this race and give President Biden a real Democratic majority he can work with — or kiss our chances of making progress goodbye.
Sorry to put that dark thought into your head, but that's the reality we’re facing.
That’s why we’re asking for $3 ahead of our federally mandated fundraising deadline on Friday.
Now, you’re probably thinking – how can $3 make any difference this far away from the Democratic primary?
Well, new polling shows Malcolm surging to second place in the final vote when voters hear more about him, so our path to victory is clear. The more voters we can get to hear Malcolm’s story, the better our chances of winning this primary will be.
[So we’re politely asking: Could you please make a $3 contribution to help Malcolm Kenyatta win this race and take our fight for working families to the U.S. Senate? Grassroots donations from real working people are how we fund this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40068746/322727590/-360183459?refcode2=6a0328f7-3967-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211227-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTAzMjhmNy0zOTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Y-d0qM9x_OJAj0EkC6tSwT7oUA_RdoIyS8DzJkttb4=)

We’ve been emailing you quite a bit this month, and you deserve an explanation as to why.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40068764/322727746/-650650479?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211227-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjdiZGIyYy0zYTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAkUCz9R70jK9QGJ8HXBlFqxmaJeFqdbDXsWe8kq8Fw=)

| Peter,

We’ve been emailing you quite a bit this month, and you deserve an explanation as to why.

Last year, Claudia Tenney won our district by just 109 votes! She squeaked by with $3,126,230 she raised from corporate PACs and other donors.

Peter, she’s leaning on these same special interests to get re-elected in 2022, reportedly raising more than $1,741,598 in just the first nine months of this year alone!

**But, here’s the good news:** we’re building a grassroots operation that can outraise Claudia Tenney in the next year through small contributions, $5, $25, $50 at a time. We’re not accepting any corporate PAC money in this election, but that’s ok because this campaign has YOU.

In the first 48 hours of our campaign, we raised over $200,000, and our support has been growing every single day with your help.

But now we’re up against our very FIRST end-of-quarter deadline and we have to keep the momentum going. Our goal is to raise $10,000 through our emails (including this one) from grassroots supporters (including you, Peter) to build a campaign that can go toe-to-toe with Claudia Tenney’s corporate cash. The more contributions we receive, the louder the statement we make.

**And Peter, that’s why you keep getting emails from my team.**

[_**So now that you know why we keep emailing, can I count on you to donate before the deadline and help us hit our $10,000 goal before Friday night?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40068767/322727751/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211227-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjdiZGIyYy0zYTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAkUCz9R70jK9QGJ8HXBlFqxmaJeFqdbDXsWe8kq8Fw=)

clean_body: We’ve been emailing you quite a bit this month, and you deserve an explanation as to why. | = | Peter, We’ve been emailing you quite a bit this month, and you deserve an explanation as to why. Last year, Claudia Tenney won our district by just 109 votes! She squeaked by with $3,126,230 she raised from corporate PACs and other donors. Peter, she’s leaning on these same special interests to get re-elected in 2022, reportedly raising more than $1,741,598 in just the first nine months of this year alone! But, here’s the good news: we’re building a grassroots operation that can outraise Claudia Tenney in the next year through small contributions, $5, $25, $50 at a time. We’re not accepting any corporate PAC money in this election, but that’s ok because this campaign has YOU. In the first 48 hours of our campaign, we raised over $200,000, and our support has been growing every single day with your help. But now we’re up against our very FIRST end-of-quarter deadline and we have to keep the momentum going. Our goal is to raise $10,000 through our emails (including this one) from grassroots supporters (including you, Peter) to build a campaign that can go toe-to-toe with Claudia Tenney’s corporate cash. The more contributions we receive, the louder the statement we make. And Peter, that’s why you keep getting emails from my team. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = The resources we can raise now help put us into a stronger position next year. Together, we will unseat Claudia Tenney in 2022 and work to create a better future. Jahana Hayes in CT-05 is toward the very top of that list! | | I’ve been working hard to keep our House Majority in 2022, which means putting together a list of some of the most targeted seats we MUST win. Rep. Jahana Hayes in CT-05 is toward the very top of that list! On Capitol Hill, I watched as Jahana worked tirelessly for her constituents – her diligence and energy were critical in our efforts to take bold action on the people’s priorities, including a strong infrastructure package just last month. But I’ve also seen firsthand how the GOP blankets her district with attack ads and sends trackers to follow her every move and attempt to corner her with spin. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = This is the LAST fundraising deadline of the year, and a critical opportunity for Jahana to prove that she is not going anywhere in 2022. GOP operatives will comb through these fundraising numbers to see if Republicans can seize the momentum in the new year and flip this seat red. If they see any weakness, you better believe they will flood CT-05 with even more divisive attack ads funded by national money groups. = Control of the House will come down to districts like CT-05 – that’s how serious this is. Over time, a democracy with political campaigns funded by a small number of people who can contribute a lot of money looks very different from a democracy with campaigns funded by a large number of people who chip in a little at a time. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40069135/322729369/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ2P_EOQ_E_20211227_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhYmQ3NS0zYjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nPTWCtwXhOJ1kZNrMD4hMgGcdGx4Q-9g_9DPOt3PbxY=&emci=c3a1256f-3b67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f4aabd75-3b67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908)

I’m deeply grateful for every grassroots donor who chips in to help power our movement — because funding our campaign from the grassroots level makes a powerfully important difference. Over time, a democracy with political campaigns funded by a small number of people who can contribute a lot of money looks very different from a democracy with campaigns funded by a large number of people who chip in a little at a time. It’s the difference between a government that works great for those at the top and a government that can work for everyone. With a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against powerful interests like the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel giants who've used their deep pockets to block change. And every three months, when we publish our fundraising numbers after the quarterly FEC deadline, we get a chance to show that grassroots donors like you are still in this fight. [_**If you’re able to, will you pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense by the December 31 deadline? Your donation will support our re-election campaign and help elect champions for working people up and down the ballot.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40069138/322729371/-198736398?refcode=EMZ2P_EOQ_E_20211227_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFhYmQ3NS0zYjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nPTWCtwXhOJ1kZNrMD4hMgGcdGx4Q-9g_9DPOt3PbxY=&emci=c3a1256f-3b67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f4aabd75-3b67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=9027908) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Over time, a democracy with political campaigns funded by a small number of people who can contribute a lot of money looks very different from a democracy with campaigns funded by a large number of people who chip in a little at a time. | | | I’m deeply grateful for every grassroots donor who chips in to help power our movement — because funding our campaign from the grassroots level makes a powerfully important difference. Over time, a democracy with political campaigns funded by a small number of people who can contribute a lot of money looks very different from a democracy with campaigns funded by a large number of people who chip in a little at a time. It’s the difference between a government that works great for those at the top and a government that can work for everyone. With a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against powerful interests like the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel giants who've used their deep pockets to block change. And every three months, when we publish our fundraising numbers after the quarterly FEC deadline, we get a chance to show that grassroots donors like you are still in this fight. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | In the last election cycle, grassroots donors raised record amounts of money to flip the Senate and White House. Now, our toes are on the line to make big, structural change — to loosen the stranglehold of big money on our democracy. But we have to keep up the fight. We need to defend and expand our razor-thin majorities in 2022 — because everything we’re working on in Washington right now would be a whole lot easier if we had more Democrats in office. And it would all come screeching to a halt if Republicans take back the House or the Senate. **** Hi there! Let me introduce myself: I’m Conor McGuire, Gabe’s finance director. Basically, it’s my job to make sure the Gabe for Congress campaign has the resources we need to get Gabe on the ballot, spread the word to voters, and flip this critical House seat from red to blue next November. **Right now, we’re just four days away from our last and most important FEC fundraising deadline of 2021.** You might be wondering, _what even is an FEC deadline?_ Every quarter, the Federal Elections Commission requires congressional campaigns like ours to report our fundraising numbers. Then, they go public for everyone (the public, our opponent, and the GOP) to see. It’s not just the total amount of money we raise that matters: our fundraising numbers represent how many people believe in Gabe by pitching in their hard-earned dollars towards our movement. The number of grassroots donors and their average contribution all go to show how strong our people-powered campaign is, and how ready we are to go up against Yvette Herrell and the GOP machine next November. **Especially now that Cook Political just officially labeled our race a TOSS-UP!** [**So, with only four more days to go, will you rush $10, $25, or whatever you can today to support Gabe for Congress ahead of our critical end-of-year deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40069282/322729905/282571568?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227EOY2_CM_full_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjc2ZDdjOC0zYzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-EMBgG4b8vrU6kC2Z3PocZ3-zi099x46lQ9CmUC7D1M=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = ** Hi there! Let me introduce myself: I’m Conor McGuire, Gabe’s finance director. Basically, it’s my job to make sure the Gabe for Congress campaign has the resources we need to get Gabe on the ballot, spread the word to voters, and flip this critical House seat from red to blue next November. Right now, we’re just four days away from our last and most important FEC fundraising deadline of 2021. You might be wondering, what even is an FEC deadline? Every quarter, the Federal Elections Commission requires congressional campaigns like ours to report our fundraising numbers. Then, they go public for everyone (the public, our opponent, and the GOP) to see. It’s not just the total amount of money we raise that matters: our fundraising numbers represent how many people believe in Gabe by pitching in their hard-earned dollars towards our movement. The number of grassroots donors and their average contribution all go to show how strong our people-powered campaign is, and how ready we are to go up against Yvette Herrell and the GOP machine next November. Especially now that Cook Political just officially labeled our race a TOSS-UP!** = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do to power this campaign! — Conor | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. **It has almost been almost one full year since the January 6 attack on our Capitol.**

With 2022 right around the corner, it's important to remember that:
* **Dangerous members of the treason caucus** like Mark Gaetz and Paul Gosar will be up for reelection in the midterm elections.
* **Seven Republicans** who were present at the January 6 "Stop the Steal" rally won seats on Election Day in 2021.
* There are still elected officials in office who will stop at nothing to push the **BIG LIE**.

The 2020 presidential election was the first time in American history where the runner-up denied the popular vote and spread misinformation to undermine our democracy.

Never Again PAC was created to stop this from ever happening again, and next year's midterm elections will be key in holding the treason caucus accountable. We can't let Trump's lies become a tradition in the American election system, and we can't lose momentum.

With the new year just a few days away and the anniversary of January 6 next week, we want to end 2021 on a powerful note and start 2022 on the right foot.

We at Never Again PAC are working day and night to ensure that those Republicans in Congress who helped instigate the January 6 insurrection are removed from office.

**[Will you chip in before the end-of-year fundraising deadline and help us hold the treason caucus accountable? Friend,

I hope you’re enjoying the holiday with family and friends.

In a moment, I'm going to ask if you'll **[chip in your first contribution of $50, $25, or even just $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40069925/322733069/-209993060?refcode=em-122721-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFlODBjZC0zZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2Csi3S1d6AbZT8gw5N73UjNAUH73M8JBrjRnQqEu5Y=)** toward my final FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year that hits on New Year's Eve. But first, let me explain why it's critically important, especially right now.

**California's redistricting commission just approved final maps. Say hello to the new boundaries for the 1st Congressional District:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40069927/322733070/-209993060?refcode=em-122721-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFlODBjZC0zZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2Csi3S1d6AbZT8gw5N73UjNAUH73M8JBrjRnQqEu5Y=)
**My team has been pouring over the map, running analytics, and the good news is that the share of voters who identify as Latino in our district has almost doubled from 12% to 20%.**

I'm confident that we can reach Latinos -- and all CA-01 voters for that matter -- with our positive message of economic opportunity and bringing new, family-sustaining jobs to our district. LaMalfa’s record on these issues falls completely flat. And for my future constituents who only speak Spanish -- _I happen to be fluent!_

Now that we have new lines, it's important that we meet the mark on our end-of-year goal to show the pundits and the press that we have what it takes to flip CA-01 to blue. We outraised LaMalfa last quarter, and I know we can do it again.

**[If you were waiting for the best time to make your first contribution to unseat LaMalfa, this is it! Please chip in $50, $25, or even just $5 before midnight to help us raise the $5,511 we need to keep up the pace and hit our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40069933/322733073/-209993060?refcode=em-122721-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFlODBjZC0zZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2Csi3S1d6AbZT8gw5N73UjNAUH73M8JBrjRnQqEu5Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40069944/322733084/-209993060?refcode=em-122721-nopens-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjFlODBjZC0zZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2Csi3S1d6AbZT8gw5N73UjNAUH73M8JBrjRnQqEu5Y=)

name: Team Franchot Digital
subject: Follow Peter on Instagram!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Hi Peter,
If you haven’t had a chance to follow Peter Franchot on Instagram yet, now is a great time to do so as our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum. Every week, Peter uses social media to reflect on the news, provide updates from the campaign trail, and share his bold vision for the future of Maryland with his followers.
2022 is right around the corner, and we want to make sure that you never miss an update! Click here to follow Peter Franchot’s Instagram page. [https://www.instagram.com/peterfranchot/]
We’d love for you to join the discussions about the future we are building together. Hundreds of fellow Marylanders are currently following Peter on Instagram, so make sure you aren’t missing out! Together, we’re going to build the critical mass of online support needed to secure a better and stronger future for Maryland in 2022.
Stay Connected,
Team Franchot Digital
P.S. After you’ve followed Peter on Instagram, make sure to forward this email to five of your friends. Peter is building an inclusive people-powered movement to change the way that government does business, and everyone’s invited.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em122721&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z43sdfhinl6i72o996fmfr9211kk3orcdpro53q8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5j64s31m5gmat73mdpb0oj16soj7c70elqb4tr4e2qj5c3km9qeaohncdp36dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcspm6ptim1j78o5jchjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1c1hm4o70c9ge49fg)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zof8qvu68eigvt6um32j40qg2rtgdf16mb5bv76o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdh61o32c3h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znl5uq1md272g0kss6r91c55o44dpgcjb86t6n4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdh61o32c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5ffnfberop213n57p2v0niukhkmnfippldndtco_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdh61o32c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Before the new year, let’s send one last message to our legislators.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We hope your holidays have been happy and safe. We’re writing today because this is our last chance to contact our legislators this year.

Please support progressive legislation and fight with us for equity in PA by visiting our website to easily connect with lawmakers on HUGELY important issues, like abortion rights, gun laws, and opportunities for jobs and other support. [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/]

CLICK HERE
[https://keystoneprogressaction.com/]

We are suffering and our lawmakers are stalling. We need to move out of these difficult times and make America BETTER.

We need your help in bolstering all of our efforts to make this a progressive state. Your giving will allow us to organize and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote for lawmakers who will find solutions to the challenges they face in their lives.

Thank you,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: The Last Week (Urgent!)
body:
Dear Patriot,

I hope you and your family had a good Christmas this past weekend. We enjoyed a beautiful white Christmas here in Washington State to celebrate the birth of Jesus.

I want to let you know this is the last week before the end of the financial quarter when we have to report our fundraising totals. If you can help with a contribution, please make one today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

I realize this comes at a difficult financial time for many. The Biden Economy’s record inflation has been a real wage cut for working families.

My opponent, Jaime Herrera Beutler, isn’t funded by donors who have to make hard choices between gifts for children, putting food on the table, or making rent.

Her campaign is funded by international corporations who have seen record profits as a result of Covid lockdowns and mandates while regular Americans fall further and further behind. They are arming her with an endless supply of $5000 checks from their corporate political action committees.

I’m confident that our campaign of door knocking, phone calls, direct mail, radio, TV, and digital ads will prevail because of our unapologetic, America First message. My vote and my voice in Congress will belong to you, not the corporations or the permanent ruling class.

But all of this requires funding. I am grateful for whatever you can spare. Please donate today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

Thank you.

Respectfully,

Joe Kent
==============================================

Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com from this list:
https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4a7c82fdc2&e=00856e661d&c=0895ab56f2

body:
In 2022, we’re getting ready to go full speed with our people-powered campaign | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40071163/322737558/321445822?refcode=fl_email_su_20211227EOYsurvey_TD_30da_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTcyYzJhYy00MDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKjc_RSW7spVeYRRh5JK0HkCP_u0FnDRh3qTdBpf1DU=)

I have a request, Derek — In 2022, we’re getting ready to go full speed with our people-powered campaign. We’re already looking forward to meeting voters on the campaign trail and building a broad, winning coalition of communities across our district. Supporters like you play a significant role in our campaign. The only way to grow our team is through grassroots organizing around the issues that matter most to Pennsylvanians. It’s going to take all of us to deliver meaningful change in Washington and fight for our common good. So, we would love to hear from you on what matters to you and what issues we should prioritize in the new year. [If you have a moment, our team wants to know your top issues going into 2022. Take our End of Year survey today to help us set the stage for our campaign strategy next year:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40071164/322737560/-269893784?refcode=fl_email_su_20211227EOYsurvey_TD_30da_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTcyYzJhYy00MDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKjc_RSW7spVeYRRh5JK0HkCP_u0FnDRh3qTdBpf1DU=&emci=fd776c82-6863-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f972c2ac-4067-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13185894) | [Take Our Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40071165/322737561/-269893784?refcode=fl_email_su_20211227EOYsurvey_TD_30da_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTcyYzJhYy00MDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKjc_RSW7spVeYRRh5JK0HkCP_u0FnDRh3qTdBpf1DU=&emci=fd776c82-6863-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f972c2ac-4067-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13185894)

Team Deluzio

clean_body: In 2022, we’re getting ready to go full speed with our people-powered campaign | = I have a request, Derek — In 2022, we’re getting ready to go full speed with our people-powered campaign. We’re already looking forward to meeting voters on the campaign trail and building a broad, winning coalition of communities across our district. Supporters like you play a significant role in our campaign. The only way to grow our team is through grassroots organizing around the issues that matter most to Pennsylvanians. It’s going to take all of us to deliver meaningful change in Washington and fight for our common good. So, we would love to hear from you on what matters to you and what issues we should prioritize in the new year. | Thanks for filling out our survey. Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. name: Heidi St. John
subject: This Friday Night
body:
Dear Peter,

We're almost there!

With less than five days to go until my campaign's December 31 end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, **I'm pleased to report that we're 86.7% of the way to reaching our $50,000 fundraising goal**!

**That means we still need to raise $6,650 from 374 people across the country . . .**

. . . after last week, my campaign now has financial supporters from all FIFTY states!

[**Our goal is within reach -- please consider chipping in at least $17.76 today to help us get there**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59387758:s8fKOIHLN:m:1:2503513073:5520E63D9E706140D9E16610E7EF09C2:r)!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59387758:s8fKOIHLN:m:1:2503513073:5520E63D9E706140D9E16610E7EF09C2:r)

**For liberty,

So a little bit about me...I was born and raised between Florida and Puerto Rico where I was taught to put love for my community and my family at the heart of everything I do. That's exactly why I got into campaigns. These races come down to understanding our communities and really connecting with people to fight for the issues that matter. That's why I'm proud to be working for Josh - he shares that same belief in the power of grassroots organizing.
I know I'm joining this campaign at a super important time. On one hand, Josh has the most amazing group of grassroots supporters I've ever seen. _Seriously, you guys are awesome!_ And yet on the other hand, GOP Super PACs have spent all year attacking Josh and we see the attacks are working. Plus the end-of-year FEC deadline is rapidly approaching this Friday!
With stakes this high, we don't have a second to waste. [**That 's why in my very first email, I'm challenging this grassroots team to raise the most we've ever done in one email - $10,000 - but we need your support! Will you please chip in as much as you can today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/iSLggigJowulhFGJoFqtnKf5uxR5t19fq-ZqM_AOQ0A=/uQKI30kczXei7XVBgt1OdCIUIpBA-64t_CSiON1_BUE=?refcode=E13162-20211227-CamilleIntro-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

Camille Torres,

| Peter,

In just a second, I’m going to ask you to [_**contribute to my campaign for governor**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40071493/322739061/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211227-nd-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=f9c59700-4367-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWM1OTcwMC00MzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QFNDYezGDyAjJCLrMmSRM_r4P0nSs0moPVU4CkS_yb8=) – but first, please give me a moment to explain why this request, at this moment, is so important.

With 2022 right around the corner, our campaign needs to finalize our on-year campaign strategy and budget, and to be perfectly honest with you: this is going to be an expensive race. Building a grassroots movement for real progressive change in Maryland — backyard by backyard, living room by living room (and yes, Zoom by Zoom) — takes resources, and [_**I’m hoping that I can count on your support to pull it off.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40071494/322739062/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211227-nd-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=f9c59700-4367-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWM1OTcwMC00MzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QFNDYezGDyAjJCLrMmSRM_r4P0nSs0moPVU4CkS_yb8=)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: It's Up to Us, the American People!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BQ78da&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EBVh9yL&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/c0bb6fa4-4603-4489-881f-416037cc5501.png]

This year has made it clearer than ever it's up to us, the American People, to stand up for our country!

We have Republicans who were elected to be public servants, cutting deals and bailing out the Leftists who want to destroy our country! We need them out of office.

I'm taking on Dan Newhouse because he continues to vote against you, but I can't defeat him without your support!

We need to show Newhouse, the Leftists, and all the other RINOS that "We the People" have had enough!

Will you step up and help me defend America by donating any amount today? [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SPRvbS&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EFdQQ56&]

The RINOS and Radical Left are doing everything they can to stop America first candidates from being elected, but I know that with the grassroots movement, and the help of the American people, we will take back Congress and steer America back to her principles.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/abf3682d-5314-42ba-987e-d849cd32b60c.jpg]

Whether you’ve chipped in $10, $15, or more, or have been following our campaign through these emails or on social media, thank you. We’re in a critical end-of-quarter crunch, and we need to make sure we hit our goal of raising $6,000 before our deadline on December 31. We set this goal because that’s the amount we know we need to raise to stay on track and build a winning campaign we. = | ******=**** As we approach our deadline, I’ve been keeping an eye on the list of our team’s grassroots supporters: Folks like Annie from Flagstaff, or Michael from Eloy, chipping in a little bit at a time to help us get closer to our fundraising goal. I’m hoping that the next time I look, I will see your name on the list, too. = Thank you for your support, Tom O’Halleran Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

It's Austin's first chance to send a Democrat to Congress in decades. And not just any Democrat, but a champion for the working class and understands technologies that will deliver solutions for the next generation.

It's also an opportunity for us to turn out voters at historic levels. If we do that, we'll be able to flip Texas blue from the top of the ticket on down. With Beto O'Rourke running for governor, our race is the key to breaking the GOP's ironclad grip on Texas and helping close the 215,000 gap by getting Democrats in the bluest city in Texas to the polls.

95% of the population growth in Texas in the last decade was Hispanic, Black and Asian Americans. We need leadership that represents the diverse community that Austin has become
