body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40071964/322740843/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2I4ZDE5Yy00NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3PruVA9Vv4DnEVZWm746yRtg-epSJY3sMk-UieZNQA=)
Friend,

If you celebrated Christmas, I hope you had a nice time with family and friends. _We sure did in the Smith Household!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40071965/322740844/-73891749?refcode=em-122721-nopens&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2I4ZDE5Yy00NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3PruVA9Vv4DnEVZWm746yRtg-epSJY3sMk-UieZNQA=)
It's back to work before our biggest fundraising deadline of the year Friday. Here are some quick updates on where things stand. It's important to me that you're in the loop: **• I'm running against far-right Governor Kim Reynolds.** Morning Consult ranked America's 9th _least_ popular governor.

**• Earlier this year, she reported over a million dollars.** She's taking checks from corporate executives to the tune of tens of thousands.

**• When push comes to shove, she'll side with corporate and special interests over working Iowans.** She refused to intervene on behalf of striking workers at John Deere.

**• Friday marks the end of the year, which is also our biggest fundraising deadline yet.** I need to put up the biggest number possible in order to show everyone that we have what it takes to defeat Kim Reynolds. That's why I'm asking: [**Will you please chip in $3 or whatever you can before 11:59 pm tonight? How much we raise, and from whom becomes public early in the new year for all to see. clean_body: | = Friend, If you celebrated Christmas, I hope you had a nice time with family and friends. We sure did in the Smith Household! = It's back to work before our biggest fundraising deadline of the year Friday. Here are some quick updates on where things stand. It's important to me that you're in the loop: • I'm running against far-right Governor Kim Reynolds. Morning Consult ranked America's 9th least popular governor. • Earlier this year, she reported over a million dollars. She's taking checks from corporate executives to the tune of tens of thousands. • When push comes to shove, she'll side with corporate and special interests over working Iowans. She refused to intervene on behalf of striking workers at John Deere. • Friday marks the end of the year, which is also our biggest fundraising deadline yet. I need to put up the biggest number possible in order to show everyone that we have what it takes to defeat Kim Reynolds. | | Team, It’s been six months since we launched our historic campaign for Governor of Massachusetts. I’m beyond grateful for everything folks like you have done to get us to this point, because we’d be nothing without this grassroots coalition. Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is coming up in just four days. Our numbers reset come midnight January 1, which means this is a critical moment to pitch in to our campaign. These numbers will go public, so if we’re going to show everyone watching — from our opponents to the political press to potential supporters across the state — that we’re the campaign that has what it takes to win, we need you to join us right away. [_**Will you donate $15 to build your 2021 Team Sonia supporter record before Friday’s deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40072008/322741134/676662639?refcode=em_20211227_f_s_eoy1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE2N2RmNi00NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hPFz4DwBUtFdo6xVUShPwhyaapOpgRvzaQzFa7yM_mI=) We’re trying to build the strongest foundation for this campaign as we can — a foundation that reflects the diversity of the Commonwealth, and sets all of us up for success. That’s a huge reason why this end-of-year fundraising goal is such a big deal to us. This governor’s race is as wide open today as it’ll ever be, but if we can prove our strength in numbers now, that will speak not only to the power of our grassroots movement — it’ll make clear that we have what it takes to win. [_**A $15 gift today helps set the stage for everything we’re planning for next year. If you can, please consider pitching in before your 2021 supporter record resets on Friday.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40072009/322741135/676662639?refcode=em_20211227_f_s_eoy1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjE2N2RmNi00NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hPFz4DwBUtFdo6xVUShPwhyaapOpgRvzaQzFa7yM_mI=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is coming up in just four days. Our numbers reset come midnight January 1, which means right now is a perfect time to pitch in to our campaign. | | | | | Team, It’s been six months since we launched our historic campaign for Governor of Massachusetts. I’m beyond grateful for everything folks like you have done to get us to this point, because we’d be nothing without this grassroots coalition. Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is coming up in just four days. Our numbers reset come midnight January 1, which means this is a critical moment to pitch in to our campaign. These numbers will go public, so if we’re going to show everyone watching — from our opponents to the political press to potential supporters across the state — that we’re the campaign that has what it takes to win, we need you to join us right away. = We’re trying to build the strongest foundation for this campaign as we can — a foundation that reflects the diversity of the Commonwealth, and sets all of us up for success. That’s a huge reason why this end-of-year fundraising goal is such a big deal to us. This governor’s race is as wide open today as it’ll ever be, but if we can prove our strength in numbers now, that will speak not only to the power of our grassroots movement — it’ll make clear that we have what it takes to win. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq04h6tr911dckehvb2hb8kqdmhip7rfsbhmp0gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdj68or6c1h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4gabhs1ofnocpf23dobq34j9sr8b37q8g6832ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdj68or6c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zetcsu743rps0fgpmfhgfvrolipihhni3d59u0a0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdj68or6c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: 3 things you ought to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|

We hope everyone was able to spend some quality time with loved ones over the holidays — everyone here at Collier HQ sure appreciated some time off! But with our biggest fundraising deadline of the year in just **five days and a fundraising deficit of almost $8,624** , we had to get right back to work. Here are 3 things you ought to know about the current state of our campaign:
* **First, we had an AMAZING start of month fundraising spree.** After Mike officially filed for the 2022 ballot, we saw our numbers really tick up.
* **Then, our pace really slowed down.** Maybe because so many of you donated at the beginning of the month? We’re not sure.
* **Now, we face our major filing deadline.** It’s the first time we’ll publicly report our fundraising numbers to the Texas Ethics Commission since we officially launched our campaign.

This is a big deal. If we can’t pick up our pace, the media and our opponents will think our campaign is not as strong as we know it is. Or worse — Dan Patrick and his rolodex of shady special interests will think our campaign is vulnerable. So we really need help: [**Can you make a $5 donation before our official end-of-year filing deadline? name: Adam Schiff
subject: Derek, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, Over the past few weeks, Donald Trump, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and the Fox News Misinformation Machine have leveled countless attacks and threats against me — even going so far as to call for my removal from office and prosecution for standing up to them. Even though their attacks don’t have an ounce of truth to them, they still put a huge target on my back with their radical base. The threats will be multiplied, amplified, and used to target me both in Congress and on the campaign trail as I run for re-election. In 2020, my Republican opponent, a right-wing Trump supporter, raised over $4 million in his effort to defeat me. Now that the GOP’s attacks on me are ramping up again, it’s almost certain their dark money and billionaire donors are going to pour in donations to my challenger in an effort to oust me. At the same time, as a result of redistricting, I have many tens of thousands of new constituents with whom to introduce myself. While it’s increasingly frustrating to listen to Trump’s and Greene’s blatant falsehoods and threats towards me, it only strengthens my resolve to defend our country’s democracy from ever falling into their hands again. There is simply too much on the line with the GOP’s authoritarian, anti-democratic turn heading into a midterm election of massive consequence. But I can’t do this alone, Derek. The only way that we can successfully stand up to Trump and his cronies is with your support. From now until next November, the GOP is only going to accelerate their attacks, their conspiracy theories, and their coordinated assault on our democracy. With all that is going on and what is at stake, will you consider making a monthly donation to my reelection campaign? So far, over 5,000 grassroots supporters, just like you, make a small recurring donation every single month to support our campaign and defend our democracy. **Will you take the next step and make a recurring monthly donation and join this grassroots movement committed to upholding our democracy in the face of right-wing attacks? name: Carole King
subject: A message for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it's Carole King. I’m reaching out to you today because I care so deeply about our country.

While our Democratic senators are working night and day to bring positive change to struggling families this year, Mitch McConnell and his do-nothing Republican conference are scheming up new ways to regain control of the Senate in 2022.

**We cannot let Republicans regain the majority.**

They’re also using _old_ ways to regain control, raking in huge amounts of money from undisclosed deep-pocketed donors. And they’re OUTRAISING us by a lot!

But we can overcome their dark money. Last year, we were part of a massive grassroots movement, and we won. If we all stay engaged and pitch in with $5 or whatever we can afford, WE CAN WIN AGAIN!!

**[Can I count on you to stand with me in the fight to meet the DSCC’s critical year-end fundraising goal so we can hold and potentially expand our razor-thin Democratic majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)**

We’ve seen how a McConnell-controlled Senate spells COMPLETE AND UTTER DISASTER for the American people. While Senate Democrats are working night and day to lift us and our neighbors in the American community, Republicans won’t even lift a finger to help.

Think about what Democrats have accomplished so far:

* Delivered CRITICAL pandemic relief
* Passed a HISTORIC infrastructure bill
* Cut taxes for over 35 MILLION families
* Created millions of good-paying jobs
* Voted to ensure everyone’s sacred right to vote

Every Republican senator voted AGAINST the Freedom to Vote Act.

**What are they afraid of?**

If we lose the Senate... well, you saw the blatant misuse of raw power when Republicans were in charge. We are NOT going there, and I know we can win if we all pitch in.

**Your donation could make the difference between a Democratic Senate majority that’s dedicated to delivering what you and your family need—and Mitch McConnell, who will stop at nothing to become Majority Leader again.**

**[Please join me and other grassroots donors in this fight to make sure that Mitch never has the word “Majority” in his title again without the word “former” in front of it!](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)**
We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=7&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=8&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)
---
Over the years I’ve spent time with a lot of Democratic senators, and I want to assure you that Democrats really are dedicated to making the world a better place. Your support will mean so much to them and will allow them to keep fighting for you and your family.

Thank you so much for all _you_ do.

\- Carole
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority in 2022. And yes, Carole really did write this email.
| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/3818?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20211227-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)

* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2311_9716520_odyfcN&akid=2311%2E9716520%2EodyfcN)**.

name: John Gibbs
subject: Voted to impeach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gibbs for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

One of RINO Peter Meijer's first acts in
Congress was voting to impeach President Trump.

Meijer chose to receive accolades from the
fake news media and D.C. swamp over the constitution and
conservatives.

That's why I'm running for Congress with
Donald Trump's endorsement to make sure RINO Peter Meijer's first
term in Congress is his last.

Will you join Donald Trump in supporting my
campaign to retire RINO Peter Meijer by chipping in a
contribution today?

You can look up my name.

I've been slandered and attacked by CNN and
the fake news media ever since I served in the Trump
administration.

I fought day and night for Donald Trump's
agenda working for Dr. Ben Carson.

name: Mike Ortega
subject: An interesting fact about me is in this email →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40073794/322751127/938621104?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227didnteven_MO_full_SLB_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDFiYjM2Yi00ZjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9v9tQjPO1Rgw_clf6OikPBo2T2TFN0q_HPdcvNlWcik=)
---
Amiguis, If you were to tell me five years ago that I would be running for Congress, I’d laugh in your face and call your bluff. But here I am, doing exactly just that. I mean, can you blame me though? I was born in the southside of Chicago — Humboldt Park to be exact — and raised in a tough neighborhood in Newark. Drug dealing and trafficking, gang activity, and gun violence were just a part of everyday life where I’m from. The only way I was able to escape was when I got into a local magnet school — **overnight, I was presented with opportunities beyond what I could ever imagine.** And that’s exactly what I want to do for the residents of district 46. For too long, the people who represent us are either incredibly out-of-touch with what constituents want, or lead with special interests in mind. [**We’re running up against another critical fundraising deadline — and it’s our end-of-year grassroots fundraising goal. Your $4.97 contribution is a lifeline for my campaign, friend:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40073796/322751131/938621104?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211227didnteven_MO_full_SLB_l1&amount=4.97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDFiYjM2Yi00ZjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9v9tQjPO1Rgw_clf6OikPBo2T2TFN0q_HPdcvNlWcik=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Amiguis, If you were to tell me five years ago that I would be running for Congress, I’d laugh in your face and call your bluff. But here I am, doing exactly just that. I mean, can you blame me though? I was born in the southside of Chicago — Humboldt Park to be exact — and raised in a tough neighborhood in Newark. Drug dealing and trafficking, gang activity, and gun violence were just a part of everyday life where I’m from. The only way I was able to escape was when I got into a local magnet school — overnight, I was presented with opportunities beyond what I could ever imagine. And that’s exactly what I want to do for the residents of district 46. For too long, the people who represent us are either incredibly out-of-touch with what constituents want, or lead with special interests in mind. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = In solidarity // En solidaridad, Mike | Our campaign is fueled by every day people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our December campaign costs? = | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Derek Kilmer Finance Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

We're coming up on our last FEC deadline of the year, and in a moment, [**we 're going to ask you to contribute to support Derek before the end of the year.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ClN-FHVzjqCCIiw48g0fEDAKtnW2s5NUrcmEvbBnvOc=/A1AgANoIECo9URlZdaNbsgSBrGxa8m-07FZCTD2IryQ=?refcode=em21_211227_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211227_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email
) Here's why this deadline is so important:

All the progress Derek and his colleagues in the House have made this past year could be turned back next year if we lose the House majority. The truth is defending the House majority next year isn't going to be easy.

With a Democratic president in the White House, history shows that the House majority will be at its most vulnerable in 2022. **We have to prepare now to overcome the odds.** This grassroots team has always been there for Derek, and we're grateful for your steadfast support. Peter, can we count on you to step up one last time before the new year?

[**Please consider rushing a contribution before our end-of-year deadline to defend our House majority and keep Derek fighting for us in Congress in 2022 >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ClN-FHVzjqCCIiw48g0fEDAKtnW2s5NUrcmEvbBnvOc=/A1AgANoIECo9URlZdaNbsgSBrGxa8m-07FZCTD2IryQ=?refcode=em21_211227_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211227_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email
)

Thank you,

Derek Kilmer Finance Team

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ClN-FHVzjqCCIiw48g0fEDAKtnW2s5NUrcmEvbBnvOc=/A1AgANoIECo9URlZdaNbsgSBrGxa8m-07FZCTD2IryQ=?refcode=em21_211227_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211227_EOY1_fnd_gq_act___DKFT_ettx&utm_medium=email)

Your contribution is critical to ensuring Doug can continue to travel around the state, fund special events, and spread the word about his bold agenda next year. Marylanders know how important 2022 will be for our state. We'll have the opportunity to elect new leadership and re-imagine our future. To do that, it's essential we elect an experienced leader who can hit the ground running on day one to guide our state's recovery in a way that improves the lives of every Marylander -- **and that leader is Doug.** With your grassroots support, I know we can reach our important fundraising goal by the end of the year. But we have to work together. **[Can you make a donation of $25 to our campaign today to help us get that much closer?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-Dzug0tASJjxK97V89g24F71e--By0VMlVmmH-g4DkdSlWa41NAYywv1kyeykDCKBnQ1BAzyR6VirwX8bbCVU5Eudz8W1qXqEu7w3AmDIsRHFMkKStO6Iw0gSq7ZLBcKukmyXu5fSsMcns053NyH95j28zzGN8rXcCNRxArGKxgJqO9bNI-BfQjxlrL_VknAixJ1aqzfzdTwpTSI4nNVHWS_l_tC2VH3j3uVoe0p6BF8XWQD1q6QSirFqgWoRh8x91g4h6vLEJgEraIRqQJWFFf04hpTflHuCAoYtb4wdnkXs7l/3i7/N6Tp1XBuRZqL4sIh7q63jA/h5/3QIhuRON-RU97lMkxsmobwJ9EI-lG0i5o5Be8X3E0PY)**

But we have to work together. | | Hi friends, With 2021 coming to an end, our team is doing everything we can to enter the new year in the best position possible. So, we 've set an ambitious end of year fundraising goal and need just 18 more people from 20910 to make a donation of any amount to help us achieve it! Your contribution is critical to ensuring Doug can continue to travel around the state, fund special events, and spread the word about his bold agenda next year. Marylanders know how important 2022 will be for our state. We'll have the opportunity to elect new leadership and re-imagine our future. To do that, it's essential we elect an experienced leader who can hit the ground running on day one to guide our state's recovery in a way that improves the lives of every Marylander -- and that leader is Doug. With your grassroots support, I know we can reach our important fundraising goal by the end of the year. But we have to work together. | Randy never missed a vote and always showed up to vote in person. **He voted 100% pro-life** , introduced legislation to protect our 2nd Amendment rights, passed legislation to hold the Chinese Communist Party accountable, passed legislation to help our students access apprenticeships, helped secure relief for our family farmers recovering from last year’s derecho, and defended our rural main streets. name: Tom Norton
subject: One Week Left
body:
Dear Friend,
I had a wonderful Christmas celebrating the birth of Christ with my family and hope that you did the same.
I'm writing because this is the last week of the financial quarter for my campaign for Congress to defeat Rep. Peter Meijer, a Republican who nearly one year ago voted to impeach President Trump and thought he could get away with it.
Can you help me out with a donation at [https://tom.gop/donate](https://contacts.tom.gop//l/Oxl6a1Fvy59S6763vIEQrTBw/MN73sv2892yc5J892I6EjbPIqw/xldTn9h21hT5UbKwUJuMGQ)?
While Peter and I grew up not far from each other, our campaigns could not be more different.
My message is common-sense, West Michigan conservatism and putting America First.
Peter's message is... well, we don't know. He's been in hiding since casting his impeachment vote.
I have held countless public events, recruited an army of volunteers, and never miss an opportunity to speak to conservative organizations in the district.
Peter hasn't held a single town hall or other public event.
And while I'm funding my campaign with contributions from regular, working Americans like you, Peter was born into a billionaire family and can fund his entire campaign with a personal check.
While many of my donors have to choose between contributing to my campaign and other household expenses like rent and food, this equation never enters Peter's mind.
I know expenses may be tight in your household and I can relate. My family, like yours, is also suffering in this Biden Economy where inflation has caused a real pay cut and forced real belt tightening for many of us in Western Michigan and around the country.
That's why I'm especially grateful for anything you can spare. Please, chip in what you can before the deadline at the end of this week at [https://tom.gop/donate](https://contacts.tom.gop//l/Oxl6a1Fvy59S6763vIEQrTBw/MN73sv2892yc5J892I6EjbPIqw/xldTn9h21hT5UbKwUJuMGQ).
Thank you.

Tom Norton

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Derek, I urgently need your help
body:
Derek, a new poll came out showing me tied with a far-right Trump Republican. With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, we cannot afford to fall behind in this campaign.

If we're going to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we have to win here in New Hampshire. But the GOP has endless resources, and they're pulling out all the stops.

So far, national Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence have visited the Granite State to rally their far-right base. And just this month, a Republican super PAC placed a $1.2 MILLION ad buy in New Hampshire, bringing the total spent against me to almost $7 MILLION.

If this recent poll indicates anything, it's that these attacks are starting to break through. It's clear that this race will be an uphill battle, but I'm no stranger to tough fights. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history.

I know we can turn these polls around and pull ahead, but we urgently need your help.

If we're going to win, it will take an army of grassroots supporters. We don't need megadonors like Republicans, but we do need people like you, Derek, to give $25 whenever you can. Please, can you split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood today?

[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20211227_CGVA_Hassan]

New Hampshire is a real swing state, and news outlets across the country are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign, and it's vital that we have the resources to hold this seat.

Your support is so important to my campaign and me, and we're counting on you. So please, if you can, split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood today to help protect our vulnerable Senate majority.

[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20211227_CGVA_Hassan]

Thank you for being on our team!

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e685165e-3d67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/bf4132e4-4f67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjQxMzJlNC00ZjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lSEU97Dh8aHYapsWJQ8VG8zpEUqVqZBLAIDyZW79H_A=&id=108609855 .

subject: ICYMI: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene Owns Stock in COVID Vaccine Manufacturing Companies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ae30e43c8b42/businesswoman-jennifer-strahan-announces-challenge-to-marjorie-taylor-greene-in-ga-8668309?e=daf3f68050)
---
| |
---
| | *** IN CASE YOU MISSED IT ***

**Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene Owns Stock in COVID Vaccine Manufacturing Companies**
---
| Despite her claims to be unvaccinated and largely anti-vaccine, Marjorie Taylor Greene is personally profiting from vaccine manufacturers as a stockholder in three of the four major vaccine manufacturing companies.

In a comment, Greene's opponent, Jennifer Strahan, states, "**Our district deserves someone who practices what they preach.** Marjorie Taylor Greene is not who she tells Georgians she is. Her ownership of vaccine stocks is just the latest example."

** IN CASE YOU MISSED IT... **

[Chattanooga Times Free Press](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=39d4252760&e=daf3f68050): "Greene owns stock in Pfizer, AstraZeneca and Johnson & Johnson."

[Rome News Tribune](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=150335571d&e=daf3f68050): "[Greene]** ** also owns shares in Gilead Sciences, maker of the remdesivir drug Veklury, and COVID researcher Amgen Inc."

[Newsweek](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=70bc75e5d4&e=daf3f68050): "The financial disclosure report, signed by Greene on August 13, reveals that among the more than 100 companies she had stock in, at least three were COVID-19 vaccine manufacturers."

[Business Insider](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=840af9c4f0&e=daf3f68050): "Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, who has boasted about being unvaccinated against COVID-19, owns stock in three major vaccine makers, [financial-disclosure filings analyzed by Insider show](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9f4200cf52&e=daf3f68050)."

Her ownership of vaccine stocks is just the latest example." IN CASE YOU MISSED IT... : "Greene owns stock in Pfizer, AstraZeneca and Johnson & Johnson." : "[Greene] also owns shares in Gilead Sciences, maker of the remdesivir drug Veklury, and COVID researcher Amgen Inc." : "The financial disclosure report, signed by Greene on August 13, reveals that among the more than 100 companies she had stock in, at least three were COVID-19 vaccine manufacturers." : "Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, who has boasted about being unvaccinated against COVID-19, owns stock in three major vaccine makers, ." | | Paid for by Strahan for Congress | | | Copyright © 2021 Strahan For Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Deb and Jerry Finkenauer
subject: Our little girl's birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
📎 photo attachment
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074589/322756181/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk567-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyNzMxMS01MzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n0m27kYhLF2nS6tNPg0huOm870hylNiUonZ-FJM_-YQ=)
Hi Peter,

That's our little girl, Abby, you're looking at – and today is her birthday!

Back then, if you had told us our little girl would grow up to be elected to Congress and go on to challenge Sen. Chuck Grassley (who, by the way, was our senator even all those years ago!), well – we _absolutely_ would have believed you.
You see, Abby's always stuck up for what she believes in and fought for what's right. Since the age of 10, she has sat at the kitchen table with her grandfather and uncles – some of them Democrats, some of them Republicans – and talked politics. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college, but what we did give her was her work ethic.

So as Abby grew up and saw work to be done, she signed up and _did_ the work. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours.
We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley. But we've seen how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment will pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like our daughter – and right now, they have $30 million in the bank to protect Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby will win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [So on our daughter's birthday, will you help her raise another $10,000 before the most important FEC deadline of the year? Donate $5 or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074590/322756182/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk567-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyNzMxMS01MzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n0m27kYhLF2nS6tNPg0huOm870hylNiUonZ-FJM_-YQ=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074591/322756183/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk567-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyNzMxMS01MzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n0m27kYhLF2nS6tNPg0huOm870hylNiUonZ-FJM_-YQ=)
---
It means the world to our family to have you on this team. Thank you so much for supporting our daughter.

Deb and Jerry Finkenauer
(Abby's parents)

To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074592/322756184/496662621?refcode=jtk567-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODUyNzMxMS01MzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n0m27kYhLF2nS6tNPg0huOm870hylNiUonZ-FJM_-YQ=&emci=1b85e846-3367-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c8527311-5367-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13784334#!).

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: I want to hear from you –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
2022 is almost here, and I want to know where you stand.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074625/322756466/2056366191?refcode=EM_C_2112273MinSurv_N_Maggie_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWIzYzAwZi01NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZo7Z6iBHEYSBtYWQXJ5hzsqpgt18SDifylyIpTdG-c=&emci=c2382cbe-aa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=49b3c00f-5467-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)
Team,
**What do you care about? I want to know the issues that matter to you.**
There are **_so_** many issues important to all of us here in New Mexico. **I want to know what matters to you for 2022.**
[**Can you take just three minutes to help us with my survey? I want your voice to be heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074626/322756467/2056366191?refcode=EM_C_2112273MinSurv_RE_Maggie_A_5_NG_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWIzYzAwZi01NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZo7Z6iBHEYSBtYWQXJ5hzsqpgt18SDifylyIpTdG-c=&emci=c2382cbe-aa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=49b3c00f-5467-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)

I work hard every day to protect voting rights and keep our government transparent, and it’s important to me to hear where you stand on election issues.
[**Don’t sit on the sidelines – allow your voice to be heard!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074629/322756470/2056366191?refcode=EM_C_2112273MinSurv_RE_Maggie_A_5_NG_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWIzYzAwZi01NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZo7Z6iBHEYSBtYWQXJ5hzsqpgt18SDifylyIpTdG-c=&emci=c2382cbe-aa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=49b3c00f-5467-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)
Sincerely,
Maggie
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver
New Mexico Secretary of State_
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy!**_ _**______[FIND OUT MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074630/322756471/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_2112273MinSurv_RE_Maggie_A_5_NG_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWIzYzAwZi01NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZo7Z6iBHEYSBtYWQXJ5hzsqpgt18SDifylyIpTdG-c=&emci=c2382cbe-aa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=49b3c00f-5467-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=3583156)**_

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: America is not a racist nation.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I’m personally asking you to renew our commitment to putting America and our values first
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?35tah--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35tah-1queo-4qqlpo7/)
---

I’m going to say something that no politician ever will: The answer to our nation’s problems isn’t politics. It’s affecting change in the hearts of people. That takes leaders of principle who won’t put their finger in the wind of politics to make decisions, but will adhere to principle, even when it’s not popular.

As Secretary of State in the Trump Administration, I was determined to demonstrate how my faith and our Judeo-Christian founding could improve our world. Shining our light and evangelizing are biblical requirements, not challenges to the so-called separation of church and state.

Leaders are in people-intensive lines of work. They appeal to hearts and minds to change behavior. And as believers, we draw on the wisdom of God to help us get it right...to be a force for good in the lives of human beings.

I know some people in the media will break out the pitchforks when they hear that I ask God for direction in my work. But that isn’t a new idea. I really relied on God when I was a fifth-grade Sunday school teacher, and my job was to keep the boys in their seats. It was the best preparation for international diplomacy you can imagine!

I say all this because our nation is truly at a crossroads. It is up to people like you and me to lead in championing American values. If we’re going to win this battle, we need you to step up, stay in the fight and defend the America we love. If we don’t, we’re going to lose it.

So, I’m personally asking you to renew your commitment to putting America and our values first—because when we put America and Americans first, we prosper and the whole world prospers. **When America leads from the front and not from behind, we are a better nation.**

I believe America has a bright future. Why?

Because of the promise in Jeremiah that God has a plan for us; a plan that will prosper and not harm us. A plan for hope and a future if we will follow Him.

**That is why I believe in America—I believe we are a good and great nation.**

Not a defeated nation.
Not a racist nation.
We are a God Blessed nation—and I want to keep it that way.

If you share these concerns, then I'm inviting you to join my Conservative Cavalry of patriots who love America and are committed to championing the core values that make our country great.

---
| | [JOIN THE CONSERVATIVE CAVALRY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35tah-1quep-4qqlpo8/)
---

I won’t let the woke socialists replace our American values with the religion of Marxism! Don’t complain about what’s happening—let’s fight and defeat the other side and defend our American values. Please, **[join my Conservative Cavalry today so we can work together to save America!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35tah-1queq-4qqlpo9/ "join my Conservative Cavalry today so we can work together to save America!")**

Fighting for our Future,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35tah-1quer-4qqlpo0/)
---
Mike Pompeo
70th Secretary of State
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION **to **29910**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35tah-1ques-4qqlpo1/ "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives")
---

Personal note from Mike Pompeo:

I need your help if we are going to **WIN BIG** for Republicans in the upcoming elections.

I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. **[Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35tah-1quet-4qqlpo2/ "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?")**

Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work!

-Mike

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-35tah-1queu-4qqlpo3/ "DONATE NOW")
---

Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC!
Add **[info@email.cavpac.com](mailto:info@email.cavpac.com)** to your address book!

That is why I believe in America—I believe we are a good and great nation. Not a defeated nation. Not a racist nation. We are a God Blessed nation—and I want to keep it that way. If you share these concerns, then I'm inviting you to join my Conservative Cavalry of patriots who love America and are committed to championing the core values that make our country great. | | I won’t let the woke socialists replace our American values with the religion of Marxism! Don’t complain about what’s happening—let’s fight and defeat the other side and defend our American values. Please, "join my Conservative Cavalry today so we can work together to save America!" Fighting for our Future, | Mike Pompeo 70th Secretary of State | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 | "Mike Pompeo is Calling on All Conservatives" Personal note from Mike Pompeo: I need your help if we are going to WIN BIG for Republicans in the upcoming elections. I've spent my life fighting for our American values, and I'm keeping that fight alive by supporting principled conservative candidates all across the country. "Will you chip in to help us stop the radical Left from turning America into a socialist country?" Thanks again for all that you do, and let's keep up the good work! -Mike | | | "DONATE NOW" Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! body:
| | |
---
Hi friend, I’m writing to you today about history in the making. My friend Val Demings is on the cusp of becoming the first Black U.S. Senator from Florida, **but she can't do it without our help.**
Florida Senate races are always close – the last one was won by just 0.12% of the vote. And as a born-and-raised Floridian who has dedicated her professional life to fighting for working families, Val Demings has a great shot at winning.**It's clear her message is resonating with voters – but she's still down 2 points in a recent poll. **
CNN is calling Florida a top pickup opportunity – but the problem is, the GOP is quickly coming to the rescue. The Senate Republican campaign arm has raised **$85 MILLION** this year that they'll be able to pour into attack ads against Val Demings. And the RNC is funneling **$10 million** into Florida to register a record-breaking number of GOP voters to stop Val Demings or any other Democrat from winning again.
**That's why I'm reaching out: I know that Val Demings is a tough, dedicated leader who has what it takes to flip Florida blue. But she needs resources _right now_ to reach more voters, and she's coming up on her biggest End of Quarter deadline yet. That's why I am asking you personally: Will you rush a donation to her grassroots campaign, friend?**
**[If you can spare $25 or even $5, please contribute now to help Val Demings reach her End of Quarter goal and flip Florida blue. She's facing an uphill battle against a powerful incumbent, but I know she can flip this seat if thousands of grassroots supporters like you come together to help her reach every single fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074738/322756967/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2003-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJhZjY3Ni01NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41oBkG0UlcmqxVCoyZjsEdcJ5oNnmNUo3pmRHALkghE=)**
Val Demings knows the value of hard work. Her mom was a maid and her dad was a janitor. She told me once that her parents taught her to "never tire of doing good." It's clear that she carries that lesson with her to this day – working tirelessly in the House to expand opportunities for families like her own.
**If Val Demings is elected, she'll not only make history – she'll expand our Democratic Senate majority and get right to work passing President Biden's bold agenda to build back better. I couldn't be more excited to work alongside her, but she can't win without your support. If she misses this End of Quarter goal on Friday, she will head into the new year behind the GOP.**
**[The stakes are too high to sit this one out, friend. With Senate control on the line, will you donate $5 to help Val Demings reach her End of Quarter goal and flip Florida blue? I know she has what it takes to win, but she urgently needs more funding right now to catch up to Marco Rubio in the new year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074739/322756968/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2003-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmJhZjY3Ni01NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=41oBkG0UlcmqxVCoyZjsEdcJ5oNnmNUo3pmRHALkghE=)**

And the RNC is funneling $10 million into Florida to register a record-breaking number of GOP voters to stop Val Demings or any other Democrat from winning again. That's why I'm reaching out: I know that Val Demings is a tough, dedicated leader who has what it takes to flip Florida blue. But she needs resources right now to reach more voters, and she's coming up on her biggest End of Quarter deadline yet. That's why I am asking you personally: Will you rush a donation to her grassroots campaign, friend? = Val Demings knows the value of hard work. Her mom was a maid and her dad was a janitor. She told me once that her parents taught her to "never tire of doing good." It's clear that she carries that lesson with her to this day – working tirelessly in the House to expand opportunities for families like her own. If Val Demings is elected, she'll not only make history – she'll expand our Democratic Senate majority and get right to work passing President Biden's bold agenda to build back better. I couldn't be more excited to work alongside her, but she can't win without your support. If she misses this End of Quarter goal on Friday, she will head into the new year behind the GOP. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your help, Cory Booker | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click , or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate |

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Breaking: A new threat to our majority

body:
In his relentless drive to win back the Senate gavel, Mitch McConnell is now targeting the Maryland Senate seat held by Senator Chris Van Hollen.
#
Peter,
**[I’m writing to you today to ask you to split a contribution, of any amount you can, between my campaign and Senator Chris Van Hollen’s before our end of year deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074765/322757105/996582325?refcode=dd_em_211227_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmFlMTIyOS01NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myrNsDhLwY1CuoMWPLjwSccAe2YQTmn3xen9drqcM5M=)**
But first, let’s talk about some facts.
In his relentless drive to win back the Senate gavel, Mitch McConnell is now targeting the Maryland Senate seat held by my friend and colleague, Senator Chris Van Hollen.
Senator Van Hollen has been on the front lines in the fights to reduce drug prices, advance common sense gun laws, confront the climate crisis, and build an economy, and democracy, that works for everyone.
**Senator Van Hollen has been a tireless fighter for working people and a lifelong leader in taking on powerful special interests in order to protect the public interest.**
So, it’s no surprise that McConnell and his big special interest friends are dead set on recruiting Maryland's two term Republican Governor to get into this campaign to tip the balance in the Senate. And, make no mistake, they're promising him gobs of SuperPac money to jump into this race. But we can’t let this happen, Peter.
**[Senator Van Hollen needs our help now to raise the early money to stave off Mitch and his gang. Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, between my campaign and Senator Van Hollen’s today so we can reach our end of year deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074766/322757106/996582325?refcode=dd_em_211227_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmFlMTIyOS01NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=myrNsDhLwY1CuoMWPLjwSccAe2YQTmn3xen9drqcM5M=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: If less than 20 individuals are on Rep Danny Davis’ filing, where did the money come from? | | | Team, Here are two numbers for you:19 vs 1,239 One of these is the number of individual donors that have donated to a well-funded incumbent who raised over half a million dollars in the 2020 cycle, and one belongs to a working class challenger, fighting every day to earn the support of people in their community. Can you guess which is which? If you’ve been keeping up with this campaign, we bet you can. In his end of year filing last election cycle, Rep Danny Davis filed with 19 individual donors....and 56 PACs. That is a textbook filing for a corporate Democrat. In fact, Rep Danny Davis is the 3rd most corporate-funded member of Congress. Kina has received 1,239 donations in the final quarter of this year alone. Well over 5,000 individual donations total this cycle. The result? We know who we are fighting for, and we know who Kina is going to represent: THE PEOPLE. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: If you are wondering why we care so much about Kina’s pledge not to accept corporate PAC money, the answer is pretty simple. There was only one candidate from IL-7 who showed up for , who helped lead , who will speak out for the people of the West Side and South Side of Chicago instead of the corporations seeking to profit from their struggles. How can a leader stand up to corporations if they are bank-rolling his campaign? When it comes to the future of IL-7, Kina is the only candidate with clear priorities, the energy of the people, and the values to finally bring change to IL-7. Thank you, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'd prefer not to send this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Folks – I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours. However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $50,000 by the end of the month. **That's bad under normal circumstances, but with our public reporting deadline less than a week away, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag.** As I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but **Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country have spent over $7 million to unseat me – more than they’ve spent against any other Democratic Senator.** And if my team reports weak fundraising numbers at the end of this quarter, it will invite even more dark money in New Hampshire. In a purple state like New Hampshire, that could be the difference between winning or losing. That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, friend. **[Will you please donate what you can right now to help close our fundraising gap and protect this seat -- and the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074783/322757234/-913685435?refcode=e20211227_mwh-prefer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZhYWU2ZS01NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPyHFFU3JlYteep4BW9DzFVfOTX8WRvfiAxgOloKy10=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074784/322757235/-913685435?refcode=e20211227_mwh-prefer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZhYWU2ZS01NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPyHFFU3JlYteep4BW9DzFVfOTX8WRvfiAxgOloKy10=)

[Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074786/322757237/-913685435?refcode=e20211227_mwh-prefer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZhYWU2ZS01NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPyHFFU3JlYteep4BW9DzFVfOTX8WRvfiAxgOloKy10=)
[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074787/322757238/-913685435?refcode=e20211227_mwh-prefer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZhYWU2ZS01NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPyHFFU3JlYteep4BW9DzFVfOTX8WRvfiAxgOloKy10=)
My Senate race was the closest one on the map in 2016. The only way we'll win in 2022 is if we have the resources we need to reach every voter and push back against the GOP's misleading attack ads.
I know it's easy to think that a grassroots donation won't make a dent. But I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, and your $5 makes a huge difference.
**[Friend: Please make a donation right now to help my campaign turn our fundraising around.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074788/322757239/-913685435?refcode=e20211227_mwh-prefer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzZhYWU2ZS01NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZPyHFFU3JlYteep4BW9DzFVfOTX8WRvfiAxgOloKy10=)**
Thank you -- I'm so grateful.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Justice Democrats making headlines
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, earlier
this month Bloomberg News published an article about how progressive
groups like Justice Democrats are transforming the Democratic party.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88481?refcode=em20211227-21176&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc ]Bloomberg News Headline readsProgressives Seizing Growth Opportunity in
Challenging Midterms

The article highlighted the opportunity we have to grow our movement in
2022 and elect more Justice Democrats than ever before. By electing
progressives to open seats and challenging out-of-touch incumbents, we
have an opportunity to elect six new Justice Democrats to Congress. And
people are taking notice.

The Democratic Party establishment is out of touch with the everyday
reality of Americans. Instead of prioritizing action on the most pressing
issues, they’ve prioritized the needs of their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88481?refcode=em20211227-21176&t=1021&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc ]Peter,
will you chip in $3 or
$16.98 (our average donation) to build this progressive movement and elect
new JDs to Congress? This movement is 100% people-powered, so Justice
Democrats is counting on grassroots supporters like you ahead of 2022.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88481?refcode=em20211227-21176&t=1022&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc ]Contribute

Our elected Justice Democrats have already accomplished so much. But in
order to transform a political system dominated by status-quo legislative
agendas and big corporate dollars, we need to elect more progressives to
Congress.

This is our chance to elect the next leaders who will fight alongside AOC,
Jamaal, Cori, and our other electeds to cancel student loan debt,
strengthen the social safety net, champion Medicare for All, and win a
Green New Deal.

Are you with us,
Peter? [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88481?refcode=em20211227-21176&t=1023&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc ]If so, give what you
can today to make 2022 a winning year for Justice Democrats.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88481?refcode=em20211227-21176&t=1024&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc ]Contribute

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211227-21176-footer&t=1027&refcode2=21176_1203867_lk5lIc&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=21176%2E1203867%2Elk5lIc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074836/322757619/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxMzc0Ny01NjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGYTfBA9CLk35-ruebJpLkyWDKGL_5dThyL278X-Pek=&emci=04ccd90d-d761-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e6c13747-5667-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15639879)

Hello team!

Allow me to introduce myself, I'm Sophie Norton, the new Finance Director here at Team Roe! As the Finance Director, it's my job to make sure we're on track to meet all of our fundraising goals. I'm a little nervous, since we missed our last goal in November, but **[if you make a $5 contribution right now, I'm confident we can meet this goal>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074837/322757620/1228154474?refcode=em21_211227_eoy2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxMzc0Ny01NjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGYTfBA9CLk35-ruebJpLkyWDKGL_5dThyL278X-Pek=)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074839/322757622/1228154474?refcode=em21_211227_eoy2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxMzc0Ny01NjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGYTfBA9CLk35-ruebJpLkyWDKGL_5dThyL278X-Pek=)
---

Ann laid out a lot of great reasons to give before December 31st in her previous email, but I'm a bit of an overachiever -- I'd like to be OVER our goal of $30,000 before that deadline hits. **[Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford so I don't have to stay up all night looking at spreadsheets>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074844/322757624/1228154474?refcode=em21_211227_eoy2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxMzc0Ny01NjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGYTfBA9CLk35-ruebJpLkyWDKGL_5dThyL278X-Pek=)**

I'm kidding, I won't have to do that -- but truly, it does make _such_ a big difference when you donate sooner rather than later. It allows me to build out projections and figure out where we need to be as we kick off 2022.

Thank you, we all appreciate your support.

\-- Sophie Norton

Finance Director
Ann Roe for Congress

**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
From: Ann Roe
Date: Wed, Dec 22, 2021
Subject: If we're gonna do this, I'll need your help.

Friend,

It's that time of the year! End of year fundraising time, of course.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074846/322757629/1228154474?refcode=em21_211227_eoy2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxMzc0Ny01NjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGYTfBA9CLk35-ruebJpLkyWDKGL_5dThyL278X-Pek=)
---

I'm sure you've got an inbox full of candidates asking you to chip in to their campaigns, so I wanted to break down exactly why this deadline is so important for us.

**[But first, I'll ask -- if you're able, please chip in $5 so that I'm able to keep up with the GOP's political fundraising machine>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074848/322757631/1228154474?refcode=em21_211227_eoy2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxMzc0Ny01NjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tGYTfBA9CLk35-ruebJpLkyWDKGL_5dThyL278X-Pek=)**

2022 is going to be a huge election year for Democrats running for office -- historically, the President's party loses congressional seats during the midterm elections. If that happens, the do-nothing Republicans will continue to stonewall our agenda and refuse to pass policies that will benefit everyday Americans. As we've seen from Bryan Steil's voting record, they're more interested in helping their big-money donors than making our lives easier.

This is a bit of inside baseball, but the next reason is FEC deadlines. After midnight on December 31st, every dollar we raise will be public information -- and you'd better believe our challengers are going to look. body:
we need your help
#
**URGENT** : Trump lackey Dean Heller is within SINGLE DIGITS of defeating Democratic Governor Steve Sisolak. **We need your help to fight back immediately:**
The last thing Nevada needs is Dean Heller as our last line of defense.
In the U.S. Senate, Heller _voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- which would have gutted protections for people with pre-existing conditions and returned us to the days of big insurance companies charging women more than men for the same coverage._
Heller even said he liked “what Texas did” on abortion and promised “the most conservative abortion laws we can have” in Nevada.
Dean Heller is a threat to Nevada. **[That’s why we’re asking for you to split a donation between Jacky Rosen and our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40074957/322758238/1914180332?refcode=jr_em_nd_211227_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUxZmNkMC01NzY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U36LnbTbbKCVRspIGdVTKaklSEhs6qup3QZFLGkuzgU=)**
**Steve Sisolak has been a progressive champion for women’s rights, labor unions, environmental protections, and a public health insurance option --_and he’s led with science throughout this pandemic._**

clean_body: We need to increase our goal. | Friend — I hope you had a good holiday weekend. I’ll try to keep this one short. I just got off a check-in call with Matt, our new campaign manager, and he let me know that he thinks we need to increase our 2021 online fundraising goal, but he wasn’t sure that we’d be able to hit it with only FOUR DAYS left in the year.= I told Matt that we have the best team of grassroots supporters I could ask for, and that I’m sure you’ll step up to help us meet this new challenge — just as you’ve helped me every time I’ve asked since we launched this campaign. Each day brings us closer and closer to our primary election, and then the general. With every day that passes, we have more and more expenses to meet — which means we’ll need to reach out more often to supporters like you to keep our momentum up. We can’t afford to fall behind our fundraising goals and risk having to scale back our efforts. Our new goal means we have to raise $7,500 online in the next four days. Now, I’ve done the math: If every person reading this donated just $7, we’d hit our goal with room to spare. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks in advance — and for all your support so far. \- John = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

I’m running for Congress because I learned at a young age on the farm that when you face tough challenges, you pull together as neighbors to get the job done. Today, too many people in Washington have forgotten that getting things done for us is their job.

But my opponent would rather put partisanship above the people he serves. He’ll vote with his party in mind, not what’s best for you and me.

I’m going to win this race the only way I know how: by going everywhere and talking with everyone. But I won’t kid myself. I know it’s going to be a tough race, so I need your help to build this campaign strong.

**[So as much as I don’t like asking, I wouldn’t be doing our job if I didn’t: Will you make sure you get in your first donation before my first FEC fundraising deadline? clean_body: My opponent is a Capitol Insurrectionist who has raised over $1,000,000 and came within a few votes of winning last time he ran for office. | = = Believe it or not, I dislike sending these fundraising pleas as much as you dislike reading them, but they are necessary to hit our fundraising goals. You see, we are just four days away from the election year, and we expect this Congressional race to be one of the most expensive and competitive in the country. My opponent is a Capitol Insurrectionist who has raised over $1,000,000 and came within a few votes of winning last time he ran for office. So we can’t leave anything to chance, and we can’t slow down now. = | = = = = = = I’m running for Congress because I learned at a young age on the farm that when you face tough challenges, you pull together as neighbors to get the job done. Today, too many people in Washington have forgotten that getting things done for us is their job. But my opponent would rather put partisanship above the people he serves. He’ll vote with his party in mind, not what’s best for you and me. I’m going to win this race the only way I know how: by going everywhere and talking with everyone. But I won’t kid myself. I know it’s going to be a tough race, so I need your help to build this campaign strong. = As always, thank you so much for your support, Brad | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

clean_body: | | | | The truth is shocking. | Friend, It was just reported that the never Trumper liberals who fund the Lincoln Project have now turned their eyes toward Wyoming and are now pouring money into Liz Cheney’s campaign coffers. This is the same Liz Cheney who is wasting your hard-earned money on another politically motivated, anti-Trump witch hunt. It makes sense though, The Lincoln-Cheney Project isn’t an unlikely duo. They despise President Trump and his supporters, they despise Pro-America candidates, and they want what is in their best interests, not what is in the best interest of either Wyoming or our Country. So far the anti-Republican Lincoln-Supporting Liberals have donated $55,000 to Liz Cheney. These BILLIONAIRES and California investors have given Liz Cheney and the Lincoln Project over a MILLION DOLLARS. Harriet isn’t worried about out-of-state billionaire elitists because she has YOU, and you have never let her down. But to make sure we defeat Cheney, we need you to step up when it matters most. It is the grassroots citizens like you who give us the support we need to win. Harriet thanks the Lord for your support every day, and is so grateful for it. Wyoming deserves a Congresswoman who Rides for the Brand. Not one who supports Biden and the Democrats. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

Hey Peter!

We hope you had a nice holiday weekend and that you’re looking forward to ringing in the New Year. **ICYMI: Victoria was featured in _Jewish Insider_ last week!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40075697/322761367/686715116?refcode=211227_FR_jewishinsider_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5MjcwMi01YjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LLxPGuLA3UYOu0M4y-hCOyts51-EVJAPbzNAfXypGec=) The article praises Victoria’s progressive policies, her unwavering dedication to this community, and her grassroots approach to politics. The common thread of **putting people first** is something Victoria believes is lacking in VA-8 and is what she has centered this entire movement around. **[Read the whole piece here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40075698/322761368/-597106176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTU5MjcwMi01YjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LLxPGuLA3UYOu0M4y-hCOyts51-EVJAPbzNAfXypGec=&emci=1f28d621-4867-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a9592702-5b67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15633605)**

clean_body: | | = Late last week, CNN reported that Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan is engaging with Mitch McConnell's stepped-up push to recruit him to run for Senate against Chris in Maryland. This is part of Mitch's 24/7 effort to try to win a Republican majority in 2022, and give him control of the Senate gavel. And we know that Mitch is promising virtually unlimited funding from his big money Super PACs to lure a top statewide Republican like Hogan into this race. Make no mistake: big money special interests want to stop the Democrats push to support working people, fight climate change, and strengthen our democracy. And their top goal is a Mitch McConnell controlled Senate in 2022. Former Trump communications director, Jason Miller, told CNN that even Republicans loyal to former President Trump were "ready to be enthusiastic" about a Hogan run since "everything" is on the table in 2022. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Onwards, Team Van Hollen * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.
