name: Cade Leebron
subject: Allow me to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211227-477-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=477%2E90090%2EvJIrwH ]Morgan Harper

Hi, allow me to introduce
myself — my name is Cade, and I’m one of the newest official staff members
of Team Morgan Harper! I’m Team Morgan’s new campaign manager! 👋

It’s really thanks to you,
that I’m here today. We depend on small-dollar donations from folks like
you to empower our scrappy, grassroots campaign and give us the ability to
expand our team, print materials, recruit volunteers, and literally fill
up our campaign vehicle to travel across the state and reach voters.

Now, here’s a little about me:

* I’ve worked on progressive campaigns across the country including here
in Ohio 📍
* I’m an alum of The Ohio State University 🥳 and I had the pleasure of
teaching students at OSU as a graduate student 👩🏫
* I’m so excited to be back in Ohio 🏡
* I first interacted with Morgan by volunteering with her back in the
day and got to see what an energetic and amazing candidate she is up
close and personal ✨

Now, a bit more about where our campaign is at:

We’re quickly approaching our most important fundraising deadline yet —
our final end-of-quarter FEC deadline of the year. Right now we’re still
only halfway towards our $50,000 email fundraising goal. No B.S., it’s
absolutely critical that we don’t fall behind.

# **Friend — I hope you had a happy and relaxing Christmas with your family and loved ones.**

---
We did, and now the work continues. We’re days away from the start of 2022, and if we’re going to win the Republican nomination, defeat Raphael Warnock, and take back the U.S. Senate next year, it’s vital that we finish this year in a strong spot. **Will you help us close 2021 with momentum?[Please consider donating whatever you can here. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/27624449c9f8384d/b70bc9faeb81e361c3d6b838967d376c/37793)**

| | With your help, this campaign has already accomplished B.I.G. things in 2021:
* We’ve built an unmatched grassroots team in all 159 Georgia counties and secured endorsements from hundreds of _**_Georgia_**_ leaders.

* We’ve reached more than _**_1 million Georgia voters_**_ with our digital ads.

* We’ve printed and distributed _**_thousands of yard signs_**_ and campaign materials.

These efforts have fueled early momentum, and sustaining them is what will make the difference in this race. And none of it would be possible without supporters like YOU sponsoring our efforts. I couldn’t be more thankful for that, and I’m personally asking you to dig deep one more time in 2021 to make a difference if you’re able. [**Please donate whatever you can here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/27624449c9f8384d/584a7d2b48c59f6dc3d6b838967d376c/37793) **Every dollar raised by this Year-End push will help fund and guide our strategy in 2022 — and it will help show that we have real momentum to start the year. ** I hope you’ll continue standing in the gap with us as we sprint towards 2022.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/27624449c9f8384d/99abe7d12a330f8bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/27624449c9f8384d/10fbfb53e3579b8dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/27624449c9f8384d/8c8c6edf963b412ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)

name: Charles Booker
subject: He’s a hypocrite and we deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Last week, I wrote an op-ed about the devastation I saw in western
Kentucky, and why we deserve leaders who will show up for us in moments of
crisis with love and compassion.

I’m sharing it below in case you haven’t read it yet so you understand why
the stakes are so high this election:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14243?refcode=em20211227-1373&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1373%2E346206%2ELHuKNG ]I hope that after you’re done reading, you’ll chip
in $5 or anything you can to help raise the resources our
campaign critically needs to transform the way we do politics.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14243?refcode=em20211227-1373&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1373%2E346206%2ELHuKNG ]Contribute $5

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14243?refcode=em20211227-1373&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1373%2E346206%2ELHuKNG ][IMG]Dec. 21, 2021, 2:31 AM MST
By Charles Booker, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate for the state
Kentucky

When I say the people of Kentucky are my family, that sometimes draws a
confused look.

I am a young Black man from the hood in a state that is nearly 90 percent
white, vastly rural, and that has been criticized in the media for years
as being backward and operating against its own self-interests.

We are one of the poorest states in the nation, and if I had a dollar for
every story written blaming Kentuckians for the choices of our
politicians, I would be a rich man. What these writers so often don’t know
or realize is that our leaders so often fail to show up for us — even in
times of crisis. This is one of the many reasons why I’m running for U.S.
Senate against Rand Paul.

What I love most about this commonwealth is our grit, our resilience, our
ability to come together during times of tragedy — linking arms and doing
what needs to be done, with no question about politics or partisanship as
we lean on the humanity that truly unites us all. We’ve seen this in real
time over the past several days since historic tornadoes ripped through
our state, leveling towns and taking more than 70 of our loved ones.

In times of crisis, our leaders must be present. They must provide
compassion and hope, leading with integrity and open arms. Gov. Andy
Beshear and President Joe Biden have both exemplified that this week — but
Paul, whose own hometown was ravaged by tornadoes, has done the bare
minimum.

While many Kentuckians mourn their loved ones and start to try to put
their lives back together, Paul has had to defend his record of trying to
block disaster relief. His votes against providing relief for Hurricane
Sandy in 2012, Hurricanes Harvey, Irma and Maria in 2017, and even voting
against aid for first-responders who answered the call on 9/11 shows that
he cares more about ideology than saving peoples’ lives and helping
rebuild following devastation.

Indeed, throughout his entire time in office, Paul has consistently voted
against disaster relief, even opposing urgently needed aid for Kentucky
itself in the face of the Covid-19 pandemic. At the same time, he’s sought
tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy and handouts to big corporations — who of
course fund his campaign. At last, he sharply pivoted to request aid
following the devastation of the recent tornadoes, but it merely exposes
his hypocrisy.

This is why I’m challenging Paul and fighting to give my state and the
people in it a voice at the federal level that we have long needed. We
deserve leadership that cares about our lives, that shows up for us, that
leads by example amid a crisis.

As soon as we learned about the developing storm, our campaign made plans
to provide support in case the worst happened. When our fears were
realized, I made the call to temporarily halt political activities and
focus our entire campaign on relief efforts.

We have been coordinating with organizations across Kentucky to provide
food, water, clothing, and other essential items, and shifted all of our
campaign fundraising to grassroots organizations and partners on the
ground to quickly help Kentuckians. We reached out to our volunteer
network of over 10,000 Kentuckians to coordinate actions, and updated our
website to further that effort.

We have also been engaging our national audience and supporters to help
with relief efforts and donations. For the remainder of my campaign, we
will continue to lead volunteer actions and provide fundraising support
for the people fighting to rebuild.
This is what being a Kentuckian is really about. Pulling together in the
face of tragedy no matter what and helping one another get back on our
feet. For so long, we have been the only ones out here helping each other
— left behind by the likes of Paul — and we deserve better.

My campaign is a testament to the forgotten people, communities like my
own that have been ignored and abandoned for too long. Many of us were
struggling to survive before this storm. Kentucky needs a new deal after
decades of failed leadership from Paul and Sen. Mitch McConnell — a
Kentucky New Deal that will boldly transform our state well into the
future.

No matter your party, it is essential we have someone in office who will
actually work for all of us, not mock, disrespect and disappoint us like
Paul continues to do. I am committed to that work, and my team is already
doing it. We’re not waiting for our politicians to “save” us when so often
they don’t even see us.

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211227-1373-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1373_346206_LHuKNG&akid=1373%2E346206%2ELHuKNG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1373%2E346206%2ELHuKNG

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Eric Stern, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: I was really hoping I wouldn't have to send this email today, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If even half of the people reading this decided to chip in, we'd reach our goal with time to spare.
#
I was really hoping I wouldn't have to send this email today, Derek.
In an ideal scenario, we'd be much closer to hitting our critical end-of-year goal, and it'd be smooth sailing through the holiday season from now til our December 31 FEC deadline. But it's my job as Deputy Campaign Manager to let you know **that's simply not the case right now.**
We have about five days left until our deadline, which may seem like a lot of time. But with so many folks (rightfully) spending this holiday season focusing on their loved ones instead of their inbox, we have to be more aggressive about meeting our end-of-year goal.
So here's how we close this gap over the next few days: **If even half of the people reading this decided to chip in, we'd reach our $2 million end-of-quarter FEC fundraising goal with time to spare.**
**John and Gisele are really counting on you to be one of the grassroots donors from Pennsylvania who steps up before our deadline, Derek.**
**[Will you help get ahead of our end-of-quarter goal by chipping in $5 right now? After running the numbers, I feel confident that if enough folks decide to go above and beyond by contributing for the first time ever today, we'll be on track to meet our goal ahead of this mission-critical deadline.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38942?refcode=em20211227-3975&t=25&akid=3975%2E434096%2E9YA8NG)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38942?refcode=em20211227-3975&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=44&akid=3975%2E434096%2E9YA8NG)**
John said from day one of this campaign that this was gonna be a strong, honest, and inclusive movement for all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties. So, we're always gonna keep it real with you!
**The reality we're facing right now is that we're still pretty far behind where we'd really hoped to be, with just a few days to go until our last deadline of 2021.**
The reason this deadline is so important is that it’s not just a reflection of the momentum we’ve gained this year, but a demonstration of our grassroots power in a race against self-funders like Dr. Oz. We can't afford to come up even a few bucks short of our $2 million end-of-quarter goal, and that means putting in the work now, before folks log off for New Years.
**[Please contribute $5 before tonight's deadline, Derek. Your support today will help us stay on track for the last few days of 2021 and meet our $2 million end-of-quarter goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38942?refcode=em20211227-3975&t=45&akid=3975%2E434096%2E9YA8NG)**
Just a few days to go, Derek — let's do this!!!
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211227-3975-footer&t=46&refcode2=3975_434096_9YA8NG&akid=3975%2E434096%2E9YA8NG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=47&akid=3975%2E434096%2E9YA8NG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=48&akid=3975%2E434096%2E9YA8NG)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Nelson HQ
subject: With your help, we will WIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Hi folks, I’m Justin, Michael’s campaign manager. We’re facing our final fundraising deadline of the year, so here’s a campaign update. I hope you’ll read through, [_**then pitch in $10 before Friday’s end-of-year deadline to re-elect Michael to the Senate and keep Colorado blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40076448/322765135/-625499226?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20211227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzc3YzA4MS02MDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2Doe2rLg5atRYoZ7eafQDQRcnCHT6-icaKET6zJKs8=) **WHERE WE ARE** Michael and our slim Democratic majority overcame Mitch McConnell’s obstruction in a big way this year. Michael secured a tax cut for working families in the form of monthly Child Tax Credit payments, which helped one million Colorado children and kept three million children out of poverty nationwide. Michael passed a historic expansion of high-speed internet access — the largest federal investment in our nation’s history. This will help Americans compete in the 21st century economy and bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities. While Michael fights to make our economy work for everyone, our far-right opponents are plastering the state with misleading attack ads. **THE STATE OF THIS RACE** Last quarter, the National GOP raised $25 million to flip seats like Michael’s. And at the end of this year, we will have to publish Michael’s fundraising numbers. Everyone from our opponents to Mitch McConnell will pore over our numbers looking for weaknesses, so we have to prove we have a strong base of support. The GOP primary field is stacked with eight candidates already attacking Michael to gain an edge in their primary. Including:
* An insurrectionist who’s proudly admitted to crossing the police line on January 6th and touted Trump’s Big Lie at a rally just a few weeks ago.
* A wealthy Trump appointee who opposes the expanded Child Tax Credit, which is reducing financial anxiety and the infrastructure bill that will create jobs.
* The third already gave his campaign about a quarter million dollars of his own fortune and hired a top Trump consultant to advise his campaign.

**What it Takes to Win** Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, Michael’s campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, from Mitch McConnell and from dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions, we can’t rest for a moment. **Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Right now we’re** **$6,330****short of our goal this quarter but we know this grassroots team can help us get back on track. Blue America’s mission is simple: Elect a progressive Congress that will serve the needs of ordinary American families, not the 1%, lobbyists or their own self-interest.
In NY-3, their candidate is Melanie D’Arrigo.
Melanie's rejecting corporate lobbyist money in her campaign, because _nothing_ that ever benefited working families started with a lobbyist cutting a Congressperson a check.
Melanie's fighting to fix healthcare with Medicare for All, save the planet with policies that will realize a Green New Deal.
And, Melanie will protect our reproductive rights by ending the Hyde Amendment and codifying _Roe v. Wade_ into law once and for all.
**[Stand with Blue America and thousands of grassroots donors. name: Alan Sims
subject: Local farms threatened by DC policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Alan Sims for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=OHIPe&m=iRTtOL_AD93ywoU&b=lA5u6T83OOKpELkdquWcSA)
---
| | Peter, I am grateful to have your support for my campaign! Your encouragement, prayers and financial support have helped establish viability and strength for the campaign at the starting line. [Press release.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=OHIPe&m=iRTtOL_AD93ywoU&b=xYd9FTXhXhtoj6UFACn1Nw) Beyond fundraising, our campaign has been busy across the district. Georgia has a robust agricultural sector, and the 10th Congressional District is a top producer. Eighty-three percent of Georgia’s farms are family-owned, and I come from a family of farmers. Still, there’s always more to know and more people to meet. In recent weeks I’ve been connecting with farmers and cattlemen. Recently I joined Farmer Cass, a local grower, in the field as he pulled in a record-breaking sweet potato harvest. Despite this year’s haul, Cass tells me that next year his costs will be higher because the cost of fertilizer has risen dramatically along with the price of petroleum. A local cattleman called my attention to the adverse effects of USDA policies that allow foreign beef to be deemed “American” when it is processed in the US, regardless of where it originated. This policy has driven much of our beef production “off-shore” and wrung much of the profitability out of beef production for American Ranchers. At the same time, strangling government regulation in the meat processing industry is reducing capacity and driving up costs. These inflationary pressures on Georgia’s farms and ranches are being felt in every state. Additionally, new regulations from the Department of Transportation are pressuring many owner-operators out of the market, raising transportation costs across the board, and further contributing to rising prices at the grocery store. Even at the cursory level, we can identify simple steps Congress must take to reign in these inflationary pressures, including:
* Raise energy production and promote energy independence
* Reduce regulation on processors and commercial operators
* Realign policies to promote America’s farmers and ranchers

In Congress, these are the types of things I’ll be doing to strengthen America’s agricultural production and protect our citizens. Thanks for standing with me! For Freedom, Alan Sims
---
| | | |
---

subject: One more big push
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
Christmas may be over, but our fight isn’t.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40076912/322766935/2055129904?refcode=EM_FR_211227EOQ_EOQ_TC_TC_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQ2MGVkYS02MjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yG_ormFB2-4Igp5t7yZS2T0QtwzkxLsScpWS2Y3_VY8=)
---
Friends, We hope that your Christmas celebrations this year were everything you wanted them to be. We certainly know everyone here at HQ is still working to shake off the last of that eggnog, because this week is going to be wild. **We're just $14,189 away from hitting our final end-of-quarter goal of 2021.[Will you help us go into the holiday rush with the power of grassroots families on our side?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40076913/322766936/1365033733?refcode=EM_FR_211227EOQ_EOQ_TC_TC_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQ2MGVkYS02MjY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yG_ormFB2-4Igp5t7yZS2T0QtwzkxLsScpWS2Y3_VY8=)** Before we even knew it, it’s already going to be time for the New Year. We know it's a busy season for everyone, but we cannot let all of the hustle and bustle distract us from our goals: protecting Ohio’s elections with a new Secretary of State. **You shouldn’t have to worry about your democracy this holiday season. Chelsea is going to keep fighting in the sun, rain, or snow.** So let’s all come together and head into the last month of this year with all the strength Ohio can muster. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking for a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When this deadline is over, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers and everyone will be watching.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
Thanks to almost 1 million individual donors we won my first election and are on track for another close one in the year ahead.
The overwhelming number of small-dollar donations we’ve received have made a huge difference, but with this FEC deadline just a few days away, I really need you to join them.
Because when this deadline is over, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers and everyone will be watching. They want to see if we’re vulnerable to more negative ads, or if we have the kind of support that will lead to victory.
So please — before this deadline ends. I am humbly asking:
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution to my re-election campaign before this FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end and we’re legally required to share our numbers?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1848_6688874_etLX4-&akid=1848%2E6688874%2EetLX4-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211227-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1848_6688874_etLX4-&akid=1848%2E6688874%2EetLX4-)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211227-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1848_6688874_etLX4-&akid=1848%2E6688874%2EetLX4-)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211227-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1848_6688874_etLX4-&akid=1848%2E6688874%2EetLX4-)**

****
The strength of our campaign is people. So while the amount we raise is important, the number of donations we receive is even more so.
Thank you in advance,
Mark
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1848_6688874_etLX4-&akid=1848%2E6688874%2EetLX4-)**

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: please listen closely:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-GsEb8LGM_)

It's Speaker Pelosi. **I need your immediate attention:**

**I just set my $400,000 End of Year fundraising goal -- my FINAL and most important one of the entire year.**

Before the year is out, please understand: Failure to meet this mission-critical goal is simply not an option.

\-- Republicans have shattered **EIGHT** monthly fundraising records in a row.
\-- They've amassed a staggering **$67.7 MILLION** war chest.
\-- And they've unveiled a gut-wrenching plan to defeat **70** of my Democrats.

There's no sugarcoating it: If we fail to meet my goal before the year is out, it would be a serious blow to our chances of keeping the House firmly in Democratic hands.

That's why I'm coming to you directly with my most urgent request yet.

****[Before time runs out on my End of Year Deadline in just 96 hours, can you rush in $3 to defend my House Democrats and show Republicans that our House Majority is here to stay?](https://links.e.dccc.)****

name: Giffords.org
subject: We need to dig deep and hit this goal by Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s always important for us to hit our goals, but this one is especially critical.
#

Friends,
Over the next few days, our team will be reaching out with some important requests. Will you give us a minute to explain why they are so important?
Our last end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2021 is coming up this Friday at midnight — and we’ve set an ambitious $300,000 fundraising goal.
It’s always important for us to hit our goals, but this one is especially critical. Next year’s midterm elections are right around the corner. The fundraising goal we set for this deadline is the amount we will need to make gun safety a central issue.
That’s why we need to dig deep and hit this goal by Friday. The more people who chip in and show their support, the better prepared we will be to go into 2022 ready to build on the progress we've made fighting back against the gun lobby and the politicians they pay for.
We know $300,000 is a lofty goal but we can get there if everyone who believes in our fight for gun safety pitches in. So we have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords today? Your contribution will go directly towards our fight to hold the gun lobby accountable and keep Americans safe.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21-eom?refcode=em211227-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1389_3935704_CYoOy5&akid=1389%2E3935704%2ECYoOy5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211227-1-30&t=23&refcode2=1389_3935704_CYoOy5&akid=1389%2E3935704%2ECYoOy5)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211227-1-30&t=24&refcode2=1389_3935704_CYoOy5&akid=1389%2E3935704%2ECYoOy5)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21-eom?express_lane=true&refcode=em211227-1-30&t=25&refcode2=1389_3935704_CYoOy5&akid=1389%2E3935704%2ECYoOy5)**
---
****
The NRA and NSSF will spend millions of dollars to try and stop us from making progress next year. But thanks to your support, we are able to continue our important work to save lives and fight back against preventable gun violence.
Thank you for pitching in and keeping up the fight with us.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-dec21-eom?refcode=em211227-1-30&t=26&refcode2=1389_3935704_CYoOy5&akid=1389%2E3935704%2ECYoOy5)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Roger Marshall
subject: Election takeover bill is back!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/e2d0eefaa8036e51/74e3b9d4632a6b77c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

# **Friend — I’m reaching out today with a critical update about the security of our elections.**

---
Democrats have brought back their elections takeover bill — which would cripple voter ID, implement mandatory ballot harvesting, and fund liberal campaigns with YOUR tax dollars! We stopped this power grab earlier in the year, but now Democrats are talking about **_ending the filibuster_** to get it to Joe Biden’s desk. **That means that it’s more important than ever before that Patriots like YOU speak out to stop this before it’s too late — can I count on you?[SIGN your name now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/e2d0eefaa8036e51/0a780b31d08e8611c3d6b838967d376c/37973)**
---
[**STOP THE POWER GRAB: SIGN NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/e2d0eefaa8036e51/a5d00b50a331ff00c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
One of the first things I did when I got to the Senate earlier this year was take a stand for secure elections. My commitment hasn’t faltered — and I hope yours hasn’t either. **If we don’t stop this power grab, Democrats will nationalize our elections and give themselves total power. ** [**So, please, let me know if you’re still in the fight for election integrity. SIGN your name here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/e2d0eefaa8036e51/828f3dc5dd3c5827c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

Folks, this race is statistically tied up and we’re ready to give it all
we’ve got to flip this seat blue!

But we’ve still got one loose end: our end-of-year fundraising is not
where it needs to be.

Peter, time and again this year, Kyrsten Sinema has proven that she doesn't have Arizonans' best interests at heart.
In the short time she's been in the U.S. Senate, Kyrsten Sinema has been one of the biggest obstructors of President Biden's popular agenda. She's a major reason Congress still hasn't fully passed the Build Back Better Act. She's against abolishing the filibuster, even if it comes at the expense of voting rights and a woman's right to choose. She ignores her constituents and instead chooses to prioritize the big industry and corporate donors who cut her six-figure checks. And most recently, she declared she was "done for the year" and flew to Ecuador for vacation in the middle of voting rights talks in the Senate. _That's unacceptable._
**Kyrsten Sinema must be ousted from the Senate** , and we're here to hold her accountable. Our work is only going to ramp up in 2022 — and between amplifying our message and supporting grassroots organizations on the ground in Arizona, we'll need as much support as we can get to be successful.
[**_That's why we've set a $50,000 end-of-year fundraising goal, so we can jump into 2022 with full force. Can you please chip in $3 to help us get there?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzEjMXgik-_bF0X25E7nEfBOF_jcTjJ2tDX4y7el8OnZ1LiWjMRaCf7TR0dP64xEtiyg8HJelj19QwQQrE0UeD5UigurG8j2i_bZnHtAiui7lYtA8jlfsH-7zV9i3TxRLJItJQcOYli4RR0b6iWvQgFF5n5wDc1MCVcSO1873rEsF1PqkIjnubGxEXPtb1iY43CNgklCG_mULe6y0GIrTDHA9Ser4r5kxXtq6Uxo1nionzyJFOwjHuSrsoYFSjuQWRWQQvD756ALBeRVJu2y1yghzggRGjou7KxLWtkzl8MKvG7IK6fBP9hH5VOyO1xAEkVIxcvSDODE6AkA_n67uQLkiyAiFo9plvdhXWBVxLrXrJH4XxFqYRxhXoCBcjyN1/3i7/1fGuBIYDRvCfu3hBmkz2vw/h3/ZVwwT5YlS8qQkjZY8Rt6YMngELav3SG7QL39GS5RMoU)
**[Contribute $3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzEjMXgik-_bF0X25E7nEfBOF_jcTjJ2tDX4y7el8Onaj19Y4pyd7AoFT0AQk8Z4w7R0-IGBP5_eO7kWkYzjRrYBKtB1Pek9hzt-l-BT_hO8HPyiYJvGciR8uWHQpUXS6IY6idcqJtEDQmo_1DGfrKEKsDb3p6av1xejCnXdNwRqk5ot0xcG98ECefRZ2tOZOjQSY3TImXpI50-1iIIm5goNWq_uVdWiL8fbKtmhAhLSBmEivYEi4h4FLbPmsUiJzlj7p3b4nntVSju-P2-ue6bJUMHPa2hj_k5cp-7XgRLy3UOyFEjLV8hQ4ZCcRKlDq7IUcBEJSFnkR4Tq4AZnaoip5O2ibYq8hgFUZ3KYHCGBDjc7tuR6PkRLignGTgJxH/3i7/1fGuBIYDRvCfu3hBmkz2vw/h4/NBN3Ectqmc0pdZu3ZL0LC4xFn-QYOe0mqUzzswVu5BU)**
**Thankfully, since we launched the Primary Sinema Project in October, we've received an _incredible_ response.** We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema.
And beating Sinema isn't just about replacing one of the Senate's worst Democrats — it's also about protecting the fragile Democratic majority. Kyrsten Sinema blocking President Biden's agenda could imperil the re-election chances of her Arizona colleague, Mark Kelly.
That's why we're working to hold her accountable now, and why we have big plans for 2020 — because we can't afford to wait.
[**_So we have to ask once more: Can we count on you to chip in $3 to our movement and help us reach our $50,000 fundraising goal before our first end-of-year fundraising deadline?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzEjMXgik-_bF0X25E7nEfBOF_jcTjJ2tDX4y7el8OnbWwXuo9VHF5GLBlm76xDBu1CfHIf4YEXOItuNei0VVVj391nbV5ssvn-p6CQdf0rSqEQaq2x4bKdU3x2aFK_EZsO8VdQ79QAZEiE8IAmu89tzTY-OsRFPeL-fdOCyOWc--eEIRBHH4FjuiixNLeQOhEpNSiuZNsCHZ5qCeRxwNaQbjgxXzE-Myor9nhg4bDc2vXFkKHgHyHwn0qBqZeXh6eKswHF7fXSU8A9AR_jJXXv0V-aG0OXkOd4PT7TllFHxNk48T5q56lWbl4HtO0IwKTHpCkSUmOFNlJlmISwDk8-AfOdwheUpm267A8frcU-gVsLoZtIxFjXL7_54oxaUW/3i7/1fGuBIYDRvCfu3hBmkz2vw/h5/ybg7FvfXrKo2-oLVALOxlfU1CLqTRJ1oYg-O4fR1hYY) 100% of your donation will go towards fueling the work of grassroots organizations on the ground, right here in Arizona, laying the foundation to primary Kyrsten Sinema.
Thank you,

clean_body: Our work is only going to ramp up in 2022 — and we’ll need as much support as we can get to be successful. | | | | GOAL: $50,000 raised for the Primary Sinema Project. DEADLINE: December 31 at midnight MST. Peter, time and again this year, Kyrsten Sinema has proven that she doesn't have Arizonans' best interests at heart. In the short time she's been in the U.S. Senate, Kyrsten Sinema has been one of the biggest obstructors of President Biden's popular agenda. She's a major reason Congress still hasn't fully passed the Build Back Better Act. She's against abolishing the filibuster, even if it comes at the expense of voting rights and a woman's right to choose. She ignores her constituents and instead chooses to prioritize the big industry and corporate donors who cut her six-figure checks. And most recently, she declared she was "done for the year" and flew to Ecuador for vacation in the middle of voting rights talks in the Senate. That's unacceptable. Kyrsten Sinema must be ousted from the Senate , and we're here to hold her accountable. Our work is only going to ramp up in 2022 — and between amplifying our message and supporting grassroots organizations on the ground in Arizona, we'll need as much support as we can get to be successful. Thankfully, since we launched the Primary Sinema Project in October, we've received an incredible response. We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. And beating Sinema isn't just about replacing one of the Senate's worst Democrats — it's also about protecting the fragile Democratic majority. Kyrsten Sinema blocking President Biden's agenda could imperil the re-election chances of her Arizona colleague, Mark Kelly. That's why we're working to hold her accountable now, and why we have big plans for 2020 — because we can't afford to wait. 100% of your donation will go towards fueling the work of grassroots organizations on the ground, right here in Arizona, laying the foundation to primary Kyrsten Sinema. Thank you, Primary Sinema Project This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. body:
#

Friend,
I hope you’re enjoying the holiday season with good health and joy. I’m reaching out today because our team’s end-of-year fundraising deadline is in _four_ days.
**[If you can, will you consider giving a small donation to Mondaire’s re-election campaign before midnight on December 31?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40077003/322767451/1630649093?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20211227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDMzN2E4Ny02NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jq43HZj-uc4_9s9kj-3J9W4odt0lr9s6XOv0qiazmyQ=)**
Earlier this month, we set a goal to raise $25,000 before our final fundraising deadline of the year expires. Shortly after the deadline, we have to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and then the amount we’ve raised will become available to the public.
Looking at our numbers right now — we’re falling a bit behind where we need to be if we want to hit our goal.
Potential opponents are watching closely to see what we’ll report at the end of the year, and if we don’t reach our final goal — they’ll take it as a sign of weakness and use it to their advantage to come out on top.
**[That’s why it is so important that we reach our target by our deadline on Friday. Please rush a donation of $5 or any amount to help us raise $25,000 before the year ends. Every dollar helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40077006/322767462/1630649093?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20211227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDMzN2E4Ny02NDY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jq43HZj-uc4_9s9kj-3J9W4odt0lr9s6XOv0qiazmyQ=)**

clean_body: Friend, I hope you’re enjoying the holiday season with good health and joy. I’m reaching out today because our team’s end-of-year fundraising deadline is in four days. = Earlier this month, we set a goal to raise $25,000 before our final fundraising deadline of the year expires. Shortly after the deadline, we have to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and then the amount we’ve raised will become available to the public. Looking at our numbers right now — we’re falling a bit behind where we need to be if we want to hit our goal. Potential opponents are watching closely to see what we’ll report at the end of the year, and if we don’t reach our final goal — they’ll take it as a sign of weakness and use it to their advantage to come out on top. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Friend, the GOP hasn’t wasted any time calling up donors and special interest groups to bankroll their campaigns and put them on track to take back Congress next year. I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction.
* The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing.
* We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers.
* Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country.
* And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice.

**We've got to get this country back on the right track.**

The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda.

clean_body: Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. | Fellow American, We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you. Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest. If 245 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN! I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction. The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing. We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers. Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country. And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice. We've got to get this country back on the right track. The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda. So how about it? Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zr342v6abev3ockpta7bij79oqp6srsuuqhaep80_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdgm2oj2c9h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbp1ntca3fii9h39hsos6ar04q137m25fsifoaq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdgm2oj2c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztrco2h88bg3m9gbck59drs5ih7kva9tkjilgd9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cdgm2oj2c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

body:
15,000 signatures requested >>
| **🚨 BREAKING NEWS ALERT INCOMING 🚨**
[SENATE REPUBLICANS BLOCK EFFORT BY DEMOCRATS TO ADVANCE VOTING AND ELECTION BILL](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=6&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH)

Friend, this is just the latest of a _slew_ of attacks on bills trying to ensure our right to vote -- and we’re SICK of it! [That’s why we’ve drafted a BRAND NEW open letter to Senate Republicans and need 15,000 Democrats to sign on RIGHT NOW:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=7&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=8&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=9&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH)
---
TO: **SENATE REPUBLICANS**
FROM: **[ADD MY NAME]**
DATE: **DECEMBER 27**

**_Dear Mitch McConnell and your MAGA minions,_**

How many times do we have to do this?

The American people have given you a _MANDATE_ to protect voting rights.

The For the People Act.
The John Lewis Voting Rights Act.
The Right to Vote Act.

These bills are incredibly popular with the American people and would ensure every person has the ability to vote in free and fair elections.

_Yet YOU continue to block these bills at every juncture!_

I’m sick of it, and I’m sick of you, [which is why I’m donating $2 right now to VPP so they can FUND your FIRING »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=10&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=11&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH)
---
I know why you refuse to support this legislation -- **you know that if you can’t CHEAT, you can’t WIN!**

I’m so tired of you playing games with our rights, and it’s clear you’ll never come around to do the right thing.

That’s why I’m going to do everything in my power to kick you all out of power and shrink your majority even further.

[And it starts right now with my $2 donation to VPP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=12&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=13&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH)
---
Regards,

**_A Proud American Voter_**
[***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=14&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4640?t=15&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1055%2E878179%2ECRCYeH).**

[**Ending illegal immigration should be a top priority for anyone who represents Arizona. Yet again and again, Mark Kelly has defunded the wall construction.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ca4e48d7e804ef18b2086c10af696f7&_e=ahUcHTs-r8jiitehA5wm8hrJFWcbT-bnX4aBIZjStMXw2ZxF0jpCfoPxmrsFcuAFinn0lgebqmohC4wLTH_VbIez2QpIppBmiculTPOHQFYZrUionGaM5WyV3OlJAZXDJ78kQlg5G8cK8qSEnkHALKwKKGNbeG9LExCApySOCpxS49I2pMdQ3gQuPHBeWZn8jJSAtO5Rp97heGVpMeORszsD9NyzXG3XXyhuZr9BhmPV4VxnN5GCtoo0r3t-8YwjhJfoDUY69-cpQ0qh3b5UJvlqPcqX7YlWkkoXfECBMflbmny4EVL_ds_YcOCWMFcInbrZsI9pdbGiUjeJBSS_tbBJ8Ug9MT0_jzV8-XwZCoNm-Snba3n8A6V4MBfaH0DGJcJtg4hrJ-1cBPbpr3jk_g_CBc4TOdvgQFi0UnHXLoR1MuKatDmQmHvO_C0rn7J8PfRJk72A7HkFfRaJDNd6zg%3D%3D)

clean_body: We do need to deal with these gaps | Fellow Conservative, Senator Mark Kelly and I agree on something; we need to close the gaps in the border wall in Yuma. But on February 5th, May 20th, and August 4th, Mark Kelly voted against finishing the wall. He's changed his tone now that he knows my campaign is a threat to him. Senator Mark Kelly has become the politician candidate Mark Kelly said he wouldn't, a liberal hack who says one thing in Arizona but does the opposite when Democrat party leaders in Washington tell him to. If Republicans want to close the border once and for all, we need to take back the Senate. The easiest way to do that is to take back Arizona from Mark Kelly. Arizona is the one Senate seat that will flip the Senate back to Republican control. We must win, and we need the support of every grassroots conservative to make that happen. | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Thank you, Blake Masters Republican Candidate for Senate, Arizona | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Team Jayapal
subject: The filibuster, Joe Manchin, and bloated military spending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
These big fights will continue into 2022.
#
Peter,
It’s been a busy last few weeks, and we wanted to highlight what Pramila has been doing to fight for working people, families, and our communities.
**The filibuster and abortion rights:** While the Supreme Court allowed cruel attacks on _Roe v. Wade_ to continue, Pramila continued her fierce advocacy for Democrats in the Senate to immediately end the filibuster and protect abortion rights by passing the Women’s Health Protection Act. She even shared her own story.
**Billions of dollars in defense spending:** Pramila voted NO on an excessive, bloated $768 billion military budget that is even more than Trump’s last Pentagon budget. She also championed a necessary 10% cut to defense spending to invest that money in health care, education, affordable housing, and more.
**Build Back Better:** Pramila has continued her fight for the Build Back Better Act. When Joe Manchin said he was against the President’s agenda, Pramila was not deterred. She’s continuing the tenacious work that it will take to get this bill through the Senate while also fighting for popular policies like affordable housing and child care, lower prescription drugs, paid leave, the Child Tax Credit, humane immigration reform, fighting climate change, and more.
Pramila was even on Rachel Maddow’s show last Monday night to discuss Build Back Better. Maddow said Pramila is "just willing to keep having the conversation and willing to find a way forward."
**Peter, these pivotal fights will continue into 2022 and Pramila needs you right there with her so we can deliver for the people. Are you ready to keep up the fight for abortion rights and historic investments in working people, families, and our communities?**
[**Donate $3 to support Pramila’s work and help make 2022 a winning year for the people >>**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9091?refcode=em20211227-907&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=907%2E420207%2EMu17Ww)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9091?refcode=em20211227-907&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=907%2E420207%2EMu17Ww)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211227-907-footer&t=21&refcode2=907_420207_Mu17Ww&akid=907%2E420207%2EMu17Ww)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=907%2E420207%2EMu17Ww)

name: Matt West
subject: Here’s why this race matters:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
Let’s do this! | Hi there, **I’m about to ask you to donate $25 to my campaign. But first, I want to let you know a few things about this race:** **First:** Our new district in Oregon is up for grabs. We MUST WIN HERE to keep the Democratic majority in the House. **Second:** Republicans are only five seats away from taking back the House. If we fail to win in Oregon, we can kiss the future of our democracy, health care, and our chance to combat the climate crisis goodbye. **Third:** I am not taking a cent of Corporate PAC money. That means our campaign is run by small-dollar grassroots donors like yourself, friend. And I plan to never change that. But that’s why I need your help. **[We’re just a few short days away from our FEC end-of-quarter deadline, and we need to raise $10,000 before the end of the year to prove that our progressive movement is here to win. Can you chip in $25 or more to help me be the leader Oregon needs?>>> 🛑 When Rubio ran for president, he called Trump a "con artist," only to go back and grovel for Trump's support once he was elected.
🛑 Rubio told Floridians that he would protect them from gun violence after the Parkland shooting, only to go right back to being the gun lobby lapdog.
🛑 Rubio watched Trump supporters storm the Capitol on Jan. 6, only to turn around and protect the insurrectionists from being investigated.

We’re betting Floridians are ready for a change, but we want to know what you think. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40078440/322773533/110346342?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU4Y2JmZi02ZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNdzv1gA14YZa_FDctpt9MOBXJVX7Y20M6YXkH6sItI=&emci=e6a67566-675f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=95e8cbff-6e67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)
---

Folks,

Elections in Florida always come down to the wire. But lately we’ve heard a lot of folks saying Florida has become too red for Charlie to win. The truth is they’re wrong! Here’s why:
* The _Cook Political Report_ rates this race as “Leans Red,” **just one step away from “Toss Up.”** It may be an uphill battle, but we can _absolutely_ win this race.

* Last time Governor DeSantis was up for election, **he won by less than half a point**. Voters clearly weren’t head over heels for him then, and they aren’t now either.

* Since taking office Governor DeSantis has traveled the country to court out of state donors, **planning a run for president instead of taking care of Florida** \-- and Floridians are over it.

Governor DeSantis failed us on COVID-19, signed laws to restrict abortion access and voting rights, damaged our economy and has refused to tackle climate change. **We’re positive Floridians are ready for a change.**

**[But Charlie wants to know what you think, too. He’s surveying supporters about this race and wants your input. Will you take a minute to tell us whether you think we’re ready to win in Florida, and why?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40078441/322773534/110346342?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU4Y2JmZi02ZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNdzv1gA14YZa_FDctpt9MOBXJVX7Y20M6YXkH6sItI=&emci=e6a67566-675f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=95e8cbff-6e67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40078442/322773535/110346342?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU4Y2JmZi02ZTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNdzv1gA14YZa_FDctpt9MOBXJVX7Y20M6YXkH6sItI=&emci=e6a67566-675f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=95e8cbff-6e67-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)
---
Thanks,

Team Crist

P.S. There’s one thing that you can do to help us win next year: Contribute before the end of 2021. Your donations this year help us talk to voters early -- and that can make all the difference.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin?=
subject: Let's Keep America Free
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevindellickerforcongress/introducing-kevin-15242028?e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

I hope you and your family had a blessed Christmas! As you know, I’m not a politician. That alone has set me apart from the other candidates in this race.

I’m not wealthy enough to self-fund my campaign. I’m not famous. I’m not an incumbent officeholder. I’ve never run for office before and I’m not seeking a new profession. I just want to go to Washington, work to make things better, and then come back home to Germansville, where I belong.

I don’t hold the characteristics that most political insiders desire. Instead, I offer myself as a family man, military veteran, and small business owner. I think those qualifications are more important that fitting the establishment mold. More importantly, those qualifications match the values of our community.

[**If you agree, I need your help please.**](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f2c4b353aa&e=1090c5c412)

Running for office takes a lot of money. While my opponents may have an advantage by their wealth and incumbency, we don’t need to match their cash. We do, however, need enough money to let people know about my candidacy.

Just one mailer to targeted Republican primary voters costs about $20,000. We will need much more than one mailer to raise enough awareness to win.

Would you please consider a donation to my campaign? Any amount is appreciated. As a small business owner, I know the value of every dollar and will be a good steward of your contributions.

The most convenient way is to visit my website and [donate online](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=eb02471611&e=1090c5c412).
Or you can mail a check to:

Kevin Dellicker for Congress
P.O. Box 86
Germansville, PA 18053

On the check, please write your profession and your employer to comply with federal election requirements.

[**We have a filing deadline of December 31 st, so it would help my campaign even more if you could please contribute before the end of the year.**](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=50922afa5b&e=1090c5c412)

If you would like to volunteer with our campaign or just learn more about my candidacy, please visit my website at [https://dellickerforcongress.com/](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e50cd73aa9&e=1090c5c412) or send me an email at [kevin@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com).

I don’t mind being the underdog. In fact, I kind of like it. But that means I need extra support from people like you. I am confident that we can win this election and restore hometown values to Washington. Let’s all work together to Keep America Free.

Thank you and God Bless,

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friends and Neighbors, I hope you and your family had a blessed Christmas! As you know, I’m not a politician. That alone has set me apart from the other candidates in this race. I’m not wealthy enough to self-fund my campaign. I’m not famous. I’m not an incumbent officeholder. I’ve never run for office before and I’m not seeking a new profession. I just want to go to Washington, work to make things better, and then come back home to Germansville, where I belong. I don’t hold the characteristics that most political insiders desire. Instead, I offer myself as a family man, military veteran, and small business owner. I think those qualifications are more important that fitting the establishment mold. More importantly, those qualifications match the values of our community. Running for office takes a lot of money. While my opponents may have an advantage by their wealth and incumbency, we don’t need to match their cash. We do, however, need enough money to let people know about my candidacy. Just one mailer to targeted Republican primary voters costs about $20,000. We will need much more than one mailer to raise enough awareness to win. Would you please consider a donation to my campaign? Any amount is appreciated. As a small business owner, I know the value of every dollar and will be a good steward of your contributions. The most convenient way is to visit my website and . Or you can mail a check to: Kevin Dellicker for Congress P.O. Box 86 Germansville, PA 18053 On the check, please write your profession and your employer to comply with federal election requirements. If you would like to volunteer with our campaign or just learn more about my candidacy, please visit my website at or send me an email at mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com. I don’t mind being the underdog. In fact, I kind of like it. But that means I need extra support from people like you. I am confident that we can win this election and restore hometown values to Washington. Let’s all work together to Keep America Free. clean_body: Illegals to vote in 2022? I couldn’t believe the headline. | Friend, Radical leftists will likely never understand this, but growing up in Texas, we value the security of our borders and our elections -- and after seeing this headline from Fox , I was speechless... The Democrats are seeking to completely undermine our Republic if that’s what it means to save Pelosi’s doomed House majority. At this point, we can’t rely on the polls or the pundits to tell us we’re poised to flip the House. We must FIGHT BACK now before it’s too late. Make no mistake Friend, the Democrat’s plan is already underway. New York City is now letting non-citizens vote in their elections.This is no longer a hypothetical. And we cannot wait to act... We need to beat the Left so badly next year that no scheme or last-ditch effort will stop us from winning the 5 seats needed to FLIP the House. As 1 of those 5 MUST-WIN races, we have to fight twice as hard to close out 2021 strong and ensure we’re in the position to WIN next year. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chief=20Jarome=20Bell?=
subject: Retire Pelosi and fight to keep the Swamp honest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
thank you for taking the time to read my emails this Christmas season! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/retire-pelosi-and-fight-to-keep-the-swamp-honest?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=68aaaae237&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Loyal Conservative Patriot,

As the year comes to an end, I wanted to thank you again for reading my emails, supporting our fight for election integrity, and supporting our effort to Drain the Swamp with your generous contributions.

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are making it a tough year for everyone, so it's more vital now, more than ever, that we fight back against the communist Democrats.

It ticked me off to see Kamala and Joe Biden inaugurated as commander-in-chief and then see both of their approval ratings start in the 50s even though he’s borderline senile. But, we conservatives fought back!

[After months of COMPLETE FAILURE from the Communist Democrat leaders in Washington D.C. and in blue states like Virginia and Michigan, Conservatives from across America made our voices heard in Virginia](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=0b962bc692&e=af4b86f5c6).

After the Biden Administration botched the Afghanistan withdrawal during the summer, Biden’s approval ratings tanked and they never recovered in large part because of
* skyrocketing inflation,
* a weak economy,
* out-of-control crime,
* a broken supply chain system,
* critical race theory,
* closed schools, and more.

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=0d0f180bac&e=af4b86f5c6)
Kamala and Joe woke a sleeping giant in the disaffected America First army.
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=69c112b89f&e=af4b86f5c6)
And then, in November, a red wave hit Virginia.

Republicans won THREE statewide elections in Virginia -- a state Biden won by 10 points in 2020!

And on top of all that, Republicans flipped control of the Virginia House of Delegates by netting 7 seats!

[Now, it’s time for conservatives to take back control of the U.S. Senate (fire Schumer) and the House of Representatives (fire Pelosi) in the 2022 election cycle](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=61c8715882&e=af4b86f5c6).
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=86db7e33a2&e=af4b86f5c6)
This year, Virginia's grassroots, along with my team and I have fought hard
* for election integrity and a full, nationwide audit of the stolen November 3rd, 2020 election;
* to stop CRT and far-left anti-white racism in Virginia's schools;
* to end the unconstitutional mandates Racist Ralph Northam has pushed down onto Virginia's parents and students in our schools;
* for those imprisoned in Gitmo-like conditions in the jails in D.C.
* for Justice for Ashli Babbitt, who was shot and murdered unceremoniously on January 6th.
* to continue the funding of border security on our Southern Border
* against the totalitarian control Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci brought to D.C. and America with their tyrannical mask mandates

All of that fighting for America has made me a target.

The Big Tech Censors are after me. Twitter just announced they're removing my official congressional campaign Twitter account PERMANENTLY.

And Facebook has been censoring me for most of the year.

SO WE'RE SUING FACEBOOK.
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=206ad5c01d&e=af4b86f5c6)

[To Retire Pelosi and fight to keep the Swamp honest, I'm running for Congress in Virginia's 2nd district -- a seat that a Republican won by DOUBLE DIGITS in 2016](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d2f18b07b0&e=af4b86f5c6).

I need your help, Loyal Conservative Patriot.

Before Christmas, can you please rush in a donation of $30, $25, $20, or at least $5 to help me in my re-election and help me continue to fight Chuck and Nancy in D.C.?

Loyal Conservative Patriot, thank you for taking the time to read my emails this Christmas season! **[By contributing to my campaign today, you will be DIRECTLY responsible for spreading my America First message, and electing the strongest candidate to beat a socialist Democrat in November](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=213da39922&e=af4b86f5c6).** Thank you in advance for your generosity. Respectfully,
******Chief Jarome Bell**
Republican Candidate
Virginia’s 2nd U.S. House District **P.S.** If we want President Trump and Conservatives to take back Congress we need to unite before the primaries. **[I am ready to be a fighter for conservatives in Congress, and I need your support right away](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a72a1bfa08&e=af4b86f5c6)!**
---
| | | | | | | [](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=0a104a4d82&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=b04185c8d4&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=56a4997ab0&e=af4b86f5c6)

Jarome BellPO Box 6775Virginia Beach, VA 23456

You can [update your preferences](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=ab6b857c57&e=af4b86f5c6&c=10fd56bde0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=ab6b857c57&e=af4b86f5c6&c=10fd56bde0).

name: Doug White
subject: Why Central Washington is so important to me, and why we have to win this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug White for Congress
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93505/images/White-FullColor-Logo-RGB.jpg]

Friend,
I was born and raised in Yakima. I’m a 4th-generation farmer. My great grandparents were hop farmers and railroad workers. My grandparents were fruit and cattle ranchers. In many ways, we are a very typical Central Washington family, but we’ve always rebelled a bit against the status quo.
I grew up working on the family farms. On Grandpa White’s farm, I pulled sprinkler lines, bucked hay, and tended cows. At Grandpa Vander Houwen’s farm, I walked the drip-irrigation rows, grafted trees, and — of course — picked fruit.
I learned how to fish with Dad in the Yakima and Naches Rivers. I learned respect for firearms from Dad and my uncles. My Dad was always involved in farming, but his main job was as a union pipefitter at Hanford.
After college, I worked in international business. I’ve helped people solve tough problems around the world, but I always knew I would wind back up at home, hoping I could help solve the tough problems we face here in Central Washington.
I'm back now, helping run the family farm and my farm-to-table restaurant. The restaurant and the farm are allowing me to stay connected with my community. My time away provided me with a global perspective that makes me appreciate how this place is so special. This campaign has helped me connect with many other communities and understand what’s important to you. This is a large district and there’s so much work that needs to be done.
Working together, I know that we can make our communities in the 4th District better places to live. Where we're connected and more energy secure, and where ample water supplies support a balanced economy, comprising both a thriving agricultural sector and high-technology jobs.
To do that work we need to win this race though. And the first step to winning that race is showing we have the support necessary in our first quarter in the race.
That is why this huge end-of-the-year at the end of this week is so important. We need to raise another $15,000 to hit our goal. We need your support to bring back sensible leadership in Central Washington that can start the process of improving our community. Can you donate to my campaign right now to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem]
Thank you,
Doug White https://www.dougwhite4congress.us [https://www.dougwhite4congress.us]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem]

Paid for by Doug White for Congress

Doug White for Congress
PO Box 9674
Yakima, WA 98909
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fcf9b532-7367-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/1ae025fb-7567-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWUwMjVmYi03NTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UpwOcRTI8egQTRMlOQsEsKoZfQt7pqTOdIvdtBKlrVU=&id=109942110 .

clean_body: | | | This is alarming, everyone – The Boston Globe says that Maggie Hassan is “the most vulnerable Democrat up for reelection,” but Democrats in states like Arizona, Georgia, and Nevada outraised her last quarter. We’re confused because Maggie’s last race was the closest in the country. And, it was the most expensive in state history. We’ll be blunt: the Senate majority hinges on New Hampshire, and our LAST quarterly deadline of the year is just 4 days away. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = We don’t need to match other states’ fundraising dollar for dollar - there are a lot of important races! But the deficit we’re seeing is alarming, and it makes us VERY nervous that we’re about to lose this seat. Here’s the donation link again: = Thanks for helping, Maggie’s fundraising team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Fred Keller
subject: There is a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress
body:
But the government doesn’t want that for you
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=17dd6045824f49adb311d4e3d8f6ff2b&_e=S0bsSrkFmzfJ7Bl-lIPFH7InHrenSrxAuM4264BceLCttX4rxSvzDXDdepi1SKQg5PCx3x5Ksy-BNaxmqWTE1u89eV40qOoSbJQ8peOmMOYPZ1Gyc8d63dcIdBY82uHogm16BXGYpWKSIaX2lUpwovHPyGfsyvRqBZwCWs2o14g3rjrTuP6dsN2jqdTmfr66uM2G7hbH03OOGq3kcBD7fn1GCE1v8hcjMtiRTVs9NZzilyVdUAK2HZI5meVOj-06DF6c13V8x8q8fZZcaDER5-BUfkgDCuDH8uPCrYPk9OydT2ama8CW9tV7RcHUs1SoOA1FxXGN7OwYEkRB0SGoEE0cmerA7YKrwnIryZcLpMi2952Sm0ABEzCf3MHn3-2Pf8ztNsqPF32hTHAbkkvlmumrFSBVRUdflDwOuCeBewkvN74ZqE-Nd4a5mjoEWrxKryJsKRSD7WFSwg8AqPscDnMvbMuGEa4FMWefO55WawmsEAAZv7vt3cVKeVQw_H7f)

Dear Patriot,

**This is not whether somebody should or should not be vaccinated.**

This is whether or not the government should tell somebody to be vaccinated. It’s important for the American people to know that we trust and respect them! It’s their government, and I am making sure that no executive thinks they have the power to rule over you!

This fight to protect you will not be easy. Peter -- we can't hold onto the House majority without winning WA-08, but we have another tough fight ahead of us. Republicans have named Kim's seat a top target to flip and election experts at _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ said Kim is "in for a close race" after redistricting.

We need to hit our end-of-year goal to start the election year strong, but Kim doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money. That's why we need the support of this grassroots team to step up and have Kim's back right away.

**[Will you chip in before our end-of-year deadline to help us protect Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40079803/322795253/-249048792?refcode=em21_211227_eoy1_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211227_eoy1_fnd_gq_act___dks4c_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2NiZTU3OC03OTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vG7MqvTq1EEKUdPtVxRvB2JxF5UHRDnxJ1RrwQvyyo8=)**

Team Schrier

name: Team Christy, Rapid Response Team
subject: BREAKING NEWS: New maps released
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40079751/322795142/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNiZTU3OC03OTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jdqN3rpzwQBsiLG4S4-Y1tQvrEh2K36r_pQxu-lTfc=&emci=0b4219a3-b162-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=02cbe578-7967-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

We have some huge news. The redistricting maps are final and it looks GREAT for Christy. Just like we thought, the district has become more blue, with conservative strong-hold Simi Valley moving into another district. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40079753/322795145/-941512608?refcode=em21_211227_eoq2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNiZTU3OC03OTY3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jdqN3rpzwQBsiLG4S4-Y1tQvrEh2K36r_pQxu-lTfc=)
---

**And nowhere are we more on offense than in this district.** In 2020, we saw this district get a whole lot bluer -- it shifted two points more Democratic -- and Mike won by only 333 votes.
