name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Required by federal law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

There are only four days until the FEC fundraising deadline. After Friday,
our campaign is required by law to file a public fundraising report.

Everyone will see how much money we raised since we launched our campaign
for Congress — that includes our opponents and every political journalist
and pundit in the country. They're going to use these numbers to gauge the
strength of our movement and Erica's competitiveness as a candidate as we
head into the election year.

We must have a strong showing of grassroots support — that’s why we set a
goal of raising an additional $15,000 before midnight on Friday.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31729?refcode=em20211227-715&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=715%2E3698%2EOdldgv ]We need to show everyone that a grassroots, people-powered campaign for
NC-02 can win. You can do your part to help out by chipping in
$5 or anything you can today.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31729?refcode=em20211227-715&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=715%2E3698%2EOdldgv ]Donate $5

In addition to sending a powerful message, we need to hit this goal so
that we have the resources to overcome everything the GOP is throwing our
way.

Remember, North Carolina Republicans recently racially gerrymandered NC-02
into one of the only swing districts in the entire country to make it
easier for them to flip the U.S. House in 2022. And Madison Cawthorn — a
far-right extremist and January 6th insurrectionist — is now backing our
Republican opponent.

If we can raise $15,000 by midnight on Friday, we'll be able to reach more
voters, recruit more volunteers, make more phone calls, send more text
messages, run more ads, and do everything we can to stop Republican
attempts to steal this seat and elect a progressive Democrat like Erica to
Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31729?refcode=em20211227-715&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=715%2E3698%2EOdldgv ]$15,000 might seem like a lofty goal to hit but, if everyone reading
this email chips in, we'll get there in no time. Will you make your
donation today and help us close the gap?

Together, we will win this seat for the people.

Thanks,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211227-715-footer&t=1022&refcode2=715_3698_Odldgv&akid=715%2E3698%2EOdldgv

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=715%2E3698%2EOdldgv

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: slow down
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
There are more eyes and pressure on our campaign than ever before.
#

Friends -
I hope you had a restful weekend — I was grateful for the chance to celebrate and recharge with my family. But our team is back at it today because it is critical we reach our fundraising goal before this week’s final FEC deadline of 2021.
Can I have a minute to explain why this is such an important moment for our campaign and why your $3 donation makes a difference?
As we now ramp up for the general election, there are more eyes and pressure on our campaign than ever before.
This is a big test for our grassroots movement, and we have to meet this moment by coming together to show that we’re ready to do the hard work necessary to win.
That starts with hitting our most ambitious fundraising goal yet — to prove we will have the resources to compete with all the super PACs who are already flooding North Carolina with their dark money.
And that’s where you come in!
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign ahead of this week’s end-of-year FEC fundraising deadline? We cannot slow down at this critical moment if we’re going to flip this seat.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-subs&refcode2=187.357359.h14W1i&t=1&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211227-1-subs&refcode2=187.357359.h14W1i&t=20&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i)**
---
****
| **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em211227-1-subs&refcode2=187.357359.h14W1i&t=21&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i)**

****
| | **[Donate $20.22](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode=em211227-1-subs&refcode2=187.357359.h14W1i&t=22&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i)**
---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211227-1-subs&refcode2=187.357359.h14W1i&t=23&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211227-1-subs&refcode2=187.357359.h14W1i&t=24&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211227-1-subs&refcode2=187.357359.h14W1i&t=25&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i)**
---
****
Thank you again. I’m grateful for every single person on this team.
\- Cheri Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=187_357359_h14W1i&akid=187%2E357359%2Eh14W1i) today to help us make history.

name: Josh Harder
subject: The best email we’ve ever had
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| | Peter, I'm blown away by the support of our amazing grassroots team! Our new campaign manager Camille told me that her first email to the team (below) is on track to be our highest raising email ever - we are only $2,500 away! [**Can you rush in a donation to help us make today the best fundraising day we 've ever had ahead of our most important FEC deadline at the end of the year?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Really excited to have rockstar Camille on the team! \- Josh

**\----FORWARDED MESSAGE----**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Hey Peter, My name is Camille - and I'm so excited to be introducing myself as Josh's Campaign Manager! This race is literally the top battleground for Democrats to hold the House, and I'm so excited to work my heart out to win. **I 've won some of the closest races around the country, so I know what a tough race this is going to be - and it's going to take everyone's support!** [**I want to show Josh that he made the right choice choosing me to lead this campaign by having this be the highest raising email he 's EVER had, but we can only do that if you donate as much as you can right now to help us keep this seat blue!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

| **[$22](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

| **[$50](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=50)**
---
| **[$100](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=100)**

| **[$200](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=200)**
---
| **[Other](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-EG-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA)**
---
So a little bit about me...I was born and raised between Florida and Puerto Rico where I was taught to put love for my community and my family at the heart of everything I do. That's exactly why I got into campaigns. These races come down to understanding our communities and really connecting with people to fight for the issues that matter. That's why I'm proud to be working for Josh - he shares that same belief in the power of grassroots organizing.
I know I'm joining this campaign at a super important time. On one hand, Josh has the most amazing group of grassroots supporters I've ever seen. _Seriously, you guys are awesome!_ And yet on the other hand, GOP Super PACs have spent all year attacking Josh and we see the attacks are working. Plus the end-of-year FEC deadline is rapidly approaching this Friday!
With stakes this high, we don't have a second to waste. [**That 's why in my very first email, I'm challenging this grassroots team to raise the most we've ever done in one email - $10,000 - but we need your support! Will you please chip in as much as you can today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
Thank you for helping us reach this goal, and I'm so excited to be joining the team!
Camille Torres,
_Campaign Manager_
_[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)_
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/AHX1V2TgsElcOjEm1DHyOpE-2Ys19FDfPtzyS51qYak=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/R_ID5oNNxKxQzur-PWNTPtutNE-RdMnEyEurW8569s8=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-13 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/wudZSnKYmab8zSGi1xfZ0TMyzjeJ_uAgJ8SAMc1-Ahc=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/YPCsY96fwpTzosGVEwXrVe7nBv0b_igjaYSgIdR4OrI=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/nV5YlH_QY-Aw8YQdLpb5SKAxjhDLCAsNBjz7WLsV-VA=/K5FEOr5n88FmcxQo4e3LSSkPhhiJBi8L3i6hBNGMDsc=?refcode=E13163-20211227-CamilleKicker-footer-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)**

subject: URGENT deadline approaching!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
See how you can help stop Biden HERE >> Friend, I wanted to reach out to you personally. 2021 is coming to a close. That means we are approaching our end-of-year deadline, the most important deadline of our campaign so far! [**Chip in ASAP to help us in this fight!**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=9d8beb0376874d93a76e224a2aad21a0&_e=Hb99B5iZM47x5y6rB9vDb2ht1g56J-kK8O4wX7kMGJvkTZDy5J_QXKd40wolFQb6ZB0g9chrXLshXXnAq1mHLuUeXOFW1S_Dxn92LxOkoSum2ob_Oz012cjgzh7sHP0mygJwGxq_I4zUTK37RZZkXmGQBa0kLVyniSaDt2zK2Nh31zrlrqZxPq80jAqGtKja6kPsZH_SWkWRUrzcGi3bpQscDZyQb41CeETE_5nHhKCbD09oiaNAZ4T73772Qh7PT0WikA5tszENAjFwtQffpEvjLmBRpvEP-HYUv3koy3QtoHF9h4rV0prNE7Rn2ryhfIpoCuTK1XkG9baqMbLFLo1PMwL6EeSfOK5DjUC072FDFANeWfKDkCyn3JhmS-z6_lHvDoA3ijmvEyjwFUlp3-ESDHXC48mHSuc3uRmRWI82U9MJHZzHVaqUqViISbc1hsP0VKEP3mkpKZSj4Xn-Ow%3D%3D) If we fail to reach our fundraising goal, we risk losing all of the progress we have made in Arizona over the last year. clean_body: See how you can help stop Biden HERE >> Friend, I wanted to reach out to you personally. 2021 is coming to a close. That means we are approaching our end-of-year deadline, the most important deadline of our campaign so far! If we fail to reach our fundraising goal, we risk losing all of the progress we have made in Arizona over the last year. We can’t afford to have an Attorney General who will stand idly by as Joe Biden tramples on our rights, opens our borders, and encourages lawlessness. Friend, I’m running for Attorney General because this is personal to me. I’ve seen firsthand the damage that Joe Biden and his administration have done to our communities in Arizona. I’m not a politician and I didn’t become an attorney to join the elitist crowd. I became an attorney to stand up for our community. That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Could you to help us reach our CRITICAL end-of-year goal? Our campaign is dependent on patriots like you to spread our message far and wide. It has already been a tremendous fight, Peter, and one thing I know for certain is that it’s only uphill from here. But I am ready for this fight and I am more confident than ever with you on our team. These fundraising numbers are the ones our opponents will look at and use to judge the strength of our campaign, so we MUST report strong numbers. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Five days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
This is a big deadline! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a8b7cddc99&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
[We have just under ONE WEEK left! ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a62afc7bd6&e=44b8c466b0)

**My name is Mark Finchem, and I am the Election Integrity, America-First Patriot running for Secretary of State in Arizona.**

_I have been endorsed by President Trump and have done as much as anyone in the country in pursuing freer and safer elections for all._

We are pushing for three key things the end of this year.
* First, Audit Pima County – we began this task by holding a critical election integrity hearing.
* Two, Pressure Mark Brnovich – we must demand perp walks for those responsible.
* Three, Secure victory for Republicans in 2022.

These tasks are simple, but they are not easy, especially with the mainstream media acting like Election Integrity is some fringe movement, when it is the very same movement that launched the United States – freedom from tyranny and freedom from oppressors.

**Isn’t that exactly what this movement is?**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a3de196d6c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _And this is why I just introduced new legislation to this effect._

**I just introduced legislation to launch the Ballot Fraud Countermeasures Program. This puts a watermark on the ballot that is counterfeit-proof.**

**_This provides a paper-trail and also makes ballots as secure as US currency – the way they should be!_**

Check out an example of this ballot here below:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=26196b9161&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| There will also be QR codes which allow voters to set a PIN and actually see their ballot and what happens to it.

**Folks, this has never been done before. This is what I am pushing for every day and will continue to push for as Secretary of State of Arizona!**

And this is going nationwide.

We already have 7 states we are working with that have demonstrated an interested in protecting their ballots with this technology.

**This bill will also go back to paper ballots and hand counting as the primary means of counting. Let’s go back to what we KNOW works.**
**_This brings people BACK into the system, instead of separating elections from the people._**
These are all things that I am working on now, and I will fully bring to fruition as Arizona’s Secretary of State. But I CANNOT do it without your help.

[**We have to raise $50,000 by the end of the month and we are only $29,850 away. Please help my campaign with a generous donation today!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1a54f65d14&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Every dollar you donate helps us push for Election Integrity and push for more extensive, nationwide, ballot-protection measures._

_Please help with a generous contribution to Election Integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8a60f87cdf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=836b22dc66&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f896fc8e7f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I have a big goal by the end of the year and I must [raise $50k](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b161e34d7c&e=44b8c466b0) by then to win this Secretary of State race and to secure Arizona's elections in 2022. I am also working to fix 2020. [Please contribute today before the deadline](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2d5e4d8b49&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=af6374b866) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=af6374b866).

Peter,

I hope you and your family had a merry Christmas.

I am thankful for you and your steadfast support.

I can hardly believe it has almost been a year since Joe Biden took office. His socialist agenda is a nightmare for our country.

Critical Race Theory is being forced on our kids, a crisis is raging at the border, inflation is crippling the budgets of so many American families, and more.

This is the sad reality of Joe Biden’s America.

Joe Biden and the Radical Left just won’t stop. They are coming after our freedom in new ways every day.

**But I won’t back down. Not now, not ever.**

December 31st marks a major end of year deadline. **[Can I count on you to make a contribution before midnight on 12/31?](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=a200ec5f6f684dc7842ff11199de6d5d&_e=F3R0KHulJCfkiV16-3CV5WHzVVXxHlvReXG5D3usbN-v4ITCH6j83aerrb8zI7ifUGJIVTQquI64lCVT5umuz87YUYNStAhDTVuZCdLCeeQ64JW8OODtUfCZNN_uImwbrM8BS6Er4lrctQzJFxJIixN6JlhR8x1OPdXEmKjx9hnRaI0NW8yiMhxzeUmAF95f8MckMWVWMcW7cgCQiAKYdwJ2Rajg6Kh9EIV4JzJxjllt0pU5WP83wtsBjFsLZZPdhY9eeEDALTIs_f8yDmvUAyw4gyA92_kJKxCS0Zm7hMp0HSbO-K03qqaNxGLeYFjzYj8O5I7nRgc58i6szztH7OJxk_fImo0CXsexkK0ilGOnwBBG640BOAvfZVYyYom5C1FN7HtIti4Ze-h613G5ENkF_1xIMoPRZShwlx1_7D8%3D)** I can’t do it alone. I need every single patriot to stand up and fight with me.

Together we can show the far-left that the American people are sick of their mandates and socialist “solutions.”

_As a Republican governor, I will be the last line of defense against the Radical Left, and I’ll never quit in the fight for our freedom._

**[Join me in the fight.](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=a200ec5f6f684dc7842ff11199de6d5d&_e=F3R0KHulJCfkiV16-3CV5WHzVVXxHlvReXG5D3usbN-v4ITCH6j83aerrb8zI7ifUGJIVTQquI64lCVT5umuz87YUYNStAhDTVuZCdLCeeQ64JW8OODtUfCZNN_uImwbrM8BS6Er4lrctQzJFxJIixN6JlhR8x1OPdXEmKjx9hnRaI0NW8yiMhxzeUmAF95f8MckMWVWMcW7cgCQiAKYd_HTMTdEaCt7wxklX6YTO7R144VxDeOC96v0uEHp8ErXUh_dicPTY4gj0VfdtMhItGNCxCh_G-fgvLuMuzOr3f2ZAQGoqVgXDaYkXmhkmXSNuKA-2vLSvgzzxepWgQ4ddVN9TyYCCqoetL_pLkli_iJst20tPEj5wTep3B9B7ilXV9o8nWpsq9DgXu2Fx16MK7bsxbZo2gDd0-TtD2h_7bQ%3D)**

This is the sad reality of Joe Biden’s America. Joe Biden and the Radical Left just won’t stop. They are coming after our freedom in new ways every day. But I won’t back down. Not now, not ever. December 31st marks a major end of year deadline. I can’t do it alone. I need every single patriot to stand up and fight with me. Together we can show the far-left that the American people are sick of their mandates and socialist “solutions.” As a Republican governor, I will be the last line of defense against the Radical Left, and I’ll never quit in the fight for our freedom. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Together we will win this battle for freedom. Thank you, Sarah Huckabee Sanders PS - Every patriot who contributes to my campaign before the end of the year will receive an exclusive election-year strategy preview! | | | | | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
| | | We're in complete disbelief.

We just read THREE polls that show Republicans' odds of retaking the Senate are CRUMBLING.

\-- They're**LOSING** by ONE point in New Hampshire
\-- They're**LOSING** by FOUR points in Nevada
\-- They're **LOSING** by SEVEN points in Arizona

**[We need you to understand what this means: We now have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to build the BIGGEST Democratic Majorities in history and hand McConnell and the Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. So I'm calling for 16,500 more gifts before our End of Year Deadline to OUTRAISE them, build an UNBEATABLE war chest, and prevent a TOTAL Republican takeover. Can we count on your $3 in this historic moment to protect our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_aGxf2-)**

While the polls predict Democrats will clinch control of the Senate...

House Republicans have a **$68 MILLION war chest** to defeat our House Majority.

We know they will use every cent to target our Democrats with attack ads, chip away at our polling lead, and ruin our best chance to win.

**We will not allow Republicans to outspend us and sabotage this opportunity to build the biggest Democratic Majorities in history.**

Before we get into the highlights, = | | | = 4 Days until our End-of-Quarter Deadline $13,781 Needed to reach our goal $5 What we need from every person reading this email to reach our goal Susie Lee is going up against four far-right Republican opponents who are preparing to funnel money into this race to drown out our voices and turn this district deep red. We can keep NV-03 blue and hold our Democratic House Majority but with just four days left until we hit our quarterly deadline,we really need your help to make this happen. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for stepping up in a huge way for this campaign. We can do this! Team Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

| | Team,
We hope you had a fantastic holiday, and while we know taking the holiday decorations down is time-consuming, we wanted to pop in and ask a small favor before the year ends.

**You know how important it is that we hold onto our seat. The people of Northern Ohio rely on Marcy Kaptur to protect their jobs, stand up for their families, and help restore our Great Lakes.**

Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is approaching in **just _4 days_.** We need to report our totals for the fourth quarter and the entire year to the FEC - we have to show we’re ready for 2022.

Pundits and Republicans will be looking at our numbers to gauge the strength of our campaign.

**[We need to make a strong case. We need to raise $3,000 by midnight Friday to reach our end-of-year goal. name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: before Friday's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

**24,819,858.**
That’s the number of eligible voters in California.
**$20.**
[**That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today — before our FEC deadline on Friday — to ensure we have the resources to reach out to every single one of them in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-45&t=1&refcode2=534_159979_Ckd1HT&akid=534%2E159979%2ECkd1HT)
**[DONATE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-45&t=2&refcode2=534_159979_Ckd1HT&akid=534%2E159979%2ECkd1HT)**
The truth is, we did an incredible job coming together and standing against the Republican Recall attempt this year. But in 2022, the very same anti-mask, anti-vaxx, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to replace Governor Newsom are going to be coming for Alex.
They’d love to replace California’s first Latino senator with a right-wing Republican who would vote in lockstep with Mitch McConnell.
So they’re going to be looking _very_ closely at our FEC report. They want to see if we have the kind of energy and enthusiasm it’s going to take to win in what is likely shaping up to be a tough year for Democrats.
But as long as we continue to stand together and do our part, we are going to win this race and hold this seat. **So with just days to go until our official deadline, we are asking:**
[**Can you make a $20 contribution to Alex’s campaign today? Do it before our FEC deadline hits Friday night so we can report a LOT of donations and show everyone watching that our campaign has what it takes to win in 2022.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-45&t=3&refcode2=534_159979_Ckd1HT&akid=534%2E159979%2ECkd1HT)
**[DONATE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-45&t=4&refcode2=534_159979_Ckd1HT&akid=534%2E159979%2ECkd1HT)**
Our fight to reform our immigration system, tackle climate change by passing a Green New Deal, and ensure access to quality and affordable health care by passing Medicare for All means there are a lot of powerful interests who want to stop us.
But that’s okay because our people-powered movement is ready to put in the work during the tough fights ahead.
Thank you for your support!
\- Team Padilla
**[DONATE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211227-1-45&t=5&refcode2=534_159979_Ckd1HT&akid=534%2E159979%2ECkd1HT)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=534%2E159979%2ECkd1HT)

subject: Peter, you can be one of the 341 people we need today

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace

name: Congressman John Garamendi
subject: Happy Holidays and Exciting News
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Garamendi for Congress** |
body:
From our family to yours we wish you a warm, restful, and safe holiday season. I’m honored to announce I will seek re-election in CA-08.
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---

| | | | | | | |
---
Dear Friend, From our family to yours we wish you a warm, restful, and safe holiday season. I hope you are able to spend time with your friends and loved ones and enjoy your time together. While our family celebrates the holidays together, we are also excited to announce that the California Redistricting Commission has completed its hard work and created Congressional District 08, which includes portions of Solano and Contra Costa Counties. It’s a district similar to the one I represented in 2009-2012. I’m honored to announce I will seek re-election in CA-08. I’m excited by the opportunity to continue my work in the Contra Costa cities of El Cerrito and Richmond in the west, Pinole, Hercules, Martinez, Antioch, and Pittsburg to the east. In Solano, my district office in Fairfield anchors the eastern wing of CA-08, and I’ll happily seek election in Vallejo and Benicia as well.

I will miss representing Yolo, Lake, Sacramento, Colusa, Glenn, Sutter, and Yuba Counties. They are all wonderful, hardworking people. My love for agriculture will never end. I’ll continue to work on behalf of the residents and communities in these counties that I’ve had the honor to represent for 10 years. I will work to ensure there is a smooth transition to their new Representative. To the residents of CA-08—I seek your vote and I promise that I will do everything in my power to address the many issues that exist in your community. As a State Legislator, Insurance Commissioner, Lieutenant Governor, and Congressman I have learned how to work with all leaders and interest groups in the community. I’ll apply my proven progressive policies to create a future of opportunity for every residence in the district and beyond.While I am thrilled at the prospect of representing this district, I will need your help to make it a reality. It will take a lot of resources to establish myself in this district, and I can use your help. clean_body: From our family to yours we wish you a warm, restful, and safe holiday season. I’m honored to announce I will seek re-election in CA-08. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, From our family to yours we wish you a warm, restful, and safe holiday season. I hope you are able to spend time with your friends and loved ones and enjoy your time together. While our family celebrates the holidays together, we are also excited to announce that the California Redistricting Commission has completed its hard work and created Congressional District 08, which includes portions of Solano and Contra Costa Counties. It’s a district similar to the one I represented in 2009-2012. I’m honored to announce I will seek re-election in CA-08. I’m excited by the opportunity to continue my work in the Contra Costa cities of El Cerrito and Richmond in the west, Pinole, Hercules, Martinez, Antioch, and Pittsburg to the east. In Solano, my district office in Fairfield anchors the eastern wing of CA-08, and I’ll happily seek election in Vallejo and Benicia as well. I will miss representing Yolo, Lake, Sacramento, Colusa, Glenn, Sutter, and Yuba Counties. They are all wonderful, hardworking people. My love for agriculture will never end. I’ll continue to work on behalf of the residents and communities in these counties that I’ve had the honor to represent for 10 years. I will work to ensure there is a smooth transition to their new Representative. To the residents of CA-08—I seek your vote and I promise that I will do everything in my power to address the many issues that exist in your community. As a State Legislator, Insurance Commissioner, Lieutenant Governor, and Congressman I have learned how to work with all leaders and interest groups in the community. I’ll apply my proven progressive policies to create a future of opportunity for every residence in the district and beyond.While I am thrilled at the prospect of representing this district, I will need your help to make it a reality. It will take a lot of resources to establish myself in this district, and I can use your help. If you can volunteer your time please sign up at , and if you can help us financially please visit . Thank you for your years of friendship and support, and I hope to connect with you after this holiday season. Sincerely, | | Congressman John Garamendi | | Your support means the world to me. If you 'd like to continue supporting me, please consider contributing today. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for and Authorized by Garamendi for Congress | | | | | | PO Box 440, Walnut Grove, CA 95690 |

| | Get ready to fight in 2022.

| | Major legislative agenda announcement: Rebekah has developed a plan to deliver a VA hospital to Northwest Florida to serve our current and former military personnel with emergency, long-term and in-patient care. The bill will be submitted on Rebekah's first day as Florida's next congresswoman from the 1st District! The nearest full-service VA hospital in Florida is all the way in Lake City - more than four hours away. The nearest out-of-state facility is in Mississippi. Northwest Florida needs its own VA hospital, and Rebekah will make it happen.

| | Recap from Christmas: Rebekah delivered hundreds of presents to children in the district before Christmas, stopping by the Santa Rosa Kids House to drop off candy, gifts, books, gift cards and a check for $500. Rebekah also brought gifts for every child in DCF care through the Deliverance Tabernacle Child Development Center, and mailed gifts randomly to 50 in-need families from a list of more than 2,000 provided by local community leaders. While Rebekah brought Christmas to those in need here at home, her opponent was at an out-of-state high-dollar fundraiser where he mocked COVID-19 again- a week before Florida set a new record for cases. In a surprise Christmas endorsement, one of the faculty members[ taking on Ron Desantis' censorship of experts](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/b3Ntud7B1/c?w=JfLglwQ3p-1p6XxQo0r9ir4oMnFPHjlWqnO6SYateMU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFtcGFiYXkuY29tL25ld3MvZWR1Y2F0aW9uLzIwMjEvMTEvMTUvdGhyZWUtbW9yZS1wcm9mZXNzb3JzLWpvaW4tbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LXVmLW92ZXItYWNhZGVtaWMtZnJlZWRvbS8iLCJyIjoiY2Q5MzI2NjAtYWQwMS00Y2M1LTM3OGUtZDNiMWI4YTg5OGJmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiN2U3YTg3ZTEtNzA0My00MTc5LWI4MzgtNWNhODkyMGZhYWQ3In0) and attacks on the first amendment at the University of Florida sent Rebekah a contribution, pledging his full support! UF Law professor Kenneth Nunn has officially joined Team Jones! Welcome to the movement, Mr. Nunn! Mardi Gras: Now that Christmas is over, Rebekah would say, "Mardi Gras season begins!" Rebekah will be joining nearly all of the Mardi Gras parades and as many Mardi Gras celebrations as one person can possibly attend over the next two months, so please join us when you can! Meet Rebekah, her family, our campaign team and volunteers, and let us know what you think should be a priority when Rebekah is elected! On the horizon: We have bigger things in mind for 2022 than just Mardi Gras, of course. This will be the year we fight back, we fight for good, and we fight as a community ready for real leadership. The much-anticipated documentary about Rebekah's journey will be released in spring of this year, with Academy Award-nominated director Josh Fox at the helm. The film shows the real-life consequences of disinformation and authoritarian tactics like those Rebekah and her family experienced at the hands of the monster Ron DeSantis, whose prospects of re-election continue to dwindle with every death on his hands.
---

The bill will be submitted on Rebekah's first day as Florida's next congresswoman from the 1st District! The nearest full-service VA hospital in Florida is all the way in Lake City - more than four hours away. The nearest out-of-state facility is in Mississippi. Northwest Florida needs its own VA hospital, and Rebekah will make it happen. | | | | | | | | Recap from Christmas: Rebekah delivered hundreds of presents to children in the district before Christmas, stopping by the Santa Rosa Kids House to drop off candy, gifts, books, gift cards and a check for $500. Rebekah also brought gifts for every child in DCF care through the Deliverance Tabernacle Child Development Center, and mailed gifts randomly to 50 in-need families from a list of more than 2,000 provided by local community leaders. While Rebekah brought Christmas to those in need here at home, her opponent was at an out-of-state high-dollar fundraiser where he mocked COVID-19 again- a week before Florida set a new record for cases. In a surprise Christmas endorsement, one of the faculty members and attacks on the first amendment at the University of Florida sent Rebekah a contribution, pledging his full support! UF Law professor Kenneth Nunn has officially joined Team Jones! Welcome to the movement, Mr. Nunn! Mardi Gras: Now that Christmas is over, Rebekah would say, "Mardi Gras season begins!" Rebekah will be joining nearly all of the Mardi Gras parades and as many Mardi Gras celebrations as one person can possibly attend over the next two months, so please join us when you can! Meet Rebekah, her family, our campaign team and volunteers, and let us know what you think should be a priority when Rebekah is elected! On the horizon: We have bigger things in mind for 2022 than just Mardi Gras, of course. This will be the year we fight back, we fight for good, and we fight as a community ready for real leadership. The much-anticipated documentary about Rebekah's journey will be released in spring of this year, with Academy Award-nominated director Josh Fox at the helm. The film shows the real-life consequences of disinformation and authoritarian tactics like those Rebekah and her family experienced at the hands of the monster Ron DeSantis, whose prospects of re-election continue to dwindle with every death on his hands. | | | | | Calls to action: 1\. name: Beto for Texas
subject: Reporters are starting to reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We'll have to make our fundraising numbers public with the Texas Ethics Commission for the very first time.
#
In a moment, we're going to urgently ask you for **[your first donation before Friday's end-of-year deadline to help elect Beto as Texas' next Governor.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50690?refcode=ema20211227-168859&t=27&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)**
Here's why this is so important: Friday doesn't just mark the end of 2021, it marks the end of our reporting period — after which we'll have to make our fundraising numbers public with the Texas Ethics Commission _for the very first time._
**What we're able to raise before January 1st will have an outsized impact on this race, so we've set a goal to raise an additional $500,000 in online grassroots donations before midnight on December 31st.**
Reporters have already started to reach out and ask if we're going to post record-breaking numbers, and our opponents are closely watching to see if we'll have the strength to go up against Greg Abbott's $55 million war chest.
Releasing a big number will show that we have the momentum to make history and win, but first, we need to pick up the pace to hit our $500,000 goal by Friday. [**Can you chip in $3 or more to help hit this goal and defeat Abbott once and for all?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50690?refcode=ema20211227-168859&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=28&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50690?refcode=ema20211227-168859&t=29&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)
Since we launched last month, all eyes have been on our campaign to see if Beto has what it takes to flip Texas blue, and national political pundits are just waiting for the chance to publish a story on why Democrats shouldn't waste their time in Texas.
**But we know the truth: Texans are ready for change.** We're ready to kick those who only care about themselves out of office and build a big, bold vision for Texas. And that starts with hitting Friday's goal, so we have to ask again:
**[Please, will you contribute $3 or more today? Your donation will help show Texans, our opponents, and the country that there's real momentum behind Beto and this people-powered campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50690?refcode=ema20211227-168859&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=30&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50690?refcode=ema20211227-168859&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=49&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)**
Thank you. We'll keep you updated.
— Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211227-168859-footer&t=50&refcode2=168859_444211_NJfg-M&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=51&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=52&akid=168859%2E444211%2ENJfg-M)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Team AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We did the math.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211227-2703-header&t=1&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)
7,075
That’s how many more contributions we need to reach by midnight on Friday to stay on track to hit our fourth quarter fundraising targets before we submit our final FEC report of the year.
**How did we get that number?** Based on our average donation of $15.82, it will take 7,075 contributions to close our $111,939 gap by the 31st to meet our $1.25 million goal and finish the quarter strong heading into an election year.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211227?refcode=em20211227-2703-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2703_2526796_uZHu9s&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)
7,075 is an important number to us because each donation – no matter the amount – shows that our values from Medicare for All to the Green New Deal have strong support in your state and across the country.
Here’s where we’re at for the quarter:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211227?refcode=em20211227-2703-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2703_2526796_uZHu9s&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)
[Can you be one of the 7,075 people we need to chip in to help our campaign hit this critical $1.25 million fundraising goal before the end of the month?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211227?refcode=em20211227-2703-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2703_2526796_uZHu9s&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211227?refcode=em20211227-2703-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2703_2526796_uZHu9s&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)**
**Alexandria is one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress.** Super PACs are spending tens of thousands of dollars attacking Alexandria, and Republicans are sharing violent content about her online – all while she fights to cancel student debt, extend the child tax credit, mobilize our movement to build a just transition that creates millions of good-paying jobs while saving our planet, and so much more.
A strong fourth quarter of the year would help demonstrate how much grassroots support Alexandria has beside her heading into her election in 2022.
[Each donation we receive directly translates into growing our movement, so please – if you’re able – will you pitch in any amount to help us reach our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211227?refcode=em20211227-2703-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&refcode2=2703_2526796_uZHu9s&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)
Thank you for making all of this possible.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211227?refcode=em20211227-2703-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=25&refcode2=2703_2526796_uZHu9s&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211227-2703-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=26&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=27&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=28&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=29&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=30&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=31&akid=2703%2E2526796%2EuZHu9s)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: This campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4651?t=6&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e) [Friend — it's Abby. Can I have just one minute of your time to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and VPP?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4651?t=7&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e)

There are a million reasons why this campaign is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few of the ones that are most on my mind right now:

This campaign is worth fighting for because polling has revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley.

This campaign is worth fighting for because, right now, Sen. Grassley is also facing a RECORD-LOW approval rating.

This campaign is worth fighting for because, after seven terms in the Senate, Sen. Grassley has left working families, like my own, behind.

This campaign is worth fighting for because I promise that nobody – _nobody_ – will work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority.

I know you care about this race, and your support means the world to me. Because of your belief in my campaign, we're able to truly compete. Because of you, we're going to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.

But I don't want to sugarcoat things here – we're still up against a lot ahead of our biggest public FEC fundraising deadline of the campaign. So, if you share in my belief that this campaign is worth fighting for, can you make a contribution right now?

[Split a donation between VPP and my campaign so we can defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority. Every donation gets us that much closer to hitting our most important fundraising deadline all year, so please chip in whatever you can right now.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4652?t=8&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4653?t=9&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4654?t=10&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4655?t=11&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4656?t=12&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4651?t=13&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e)
Thank you for all that you do. It means the world to me.

_–Abby_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1057%2E878179%2EP0I61e).**

subject: iCal Invite: 9:00 AM: December 30, 2021

name: MorganHarper.org
subject: Back in Cleveland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
On Fox 8 Cleveland Morgan had a lot to say
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211227-479-footer-ak&t=2&akid=479%2E90090%2ErcPUv1)
Last week, Morgan appeared on Fox 8 News in Cleveland to discuss what this campaign is really about.
**_“The old playbook is not working. What my candidacy represents, what our campaign is about, is a new vision of what we want to be about.” - Morgan Harper_**
We received a lot of encouraging messages, phone calls, and emails after this aired — because it’s clear Cleveland is ready to #Morganize with us. **[So we have to ask, could you check out what Morgan had to say and then add to our momentum by making a donation today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18846?t=3&akid=479%2E90090%2ErcPUv1)**
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18846?t=4&akid=479%2E90090%2ErcPUv1)
**[Watch + Donate »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18846?t=5&akid=479%2E90090%2ErcPUv1)**
We’re facing our end-of-year fundraising deadline this Friday at midnight, so anything you can chip in right now will directly help us run a strong campaign in 2022.
Thank you!
Team Morgan Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211227-479-footer&t=6&refcode2=479_90090_rcPUv1&akid=479%2E90090%2ErcPUv1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=479%2E90090%2ErcPUv1)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Got a minute?
body:
I hope you had a good break with friends and family over the Christmas holiday.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xfO7r21no1c1qq7BnLSj8Q/gjfmLMh9XD4wWxOMsFM40Q)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xfO7r21no1c1qq7BnLSj8Q/gjfmLMh9XD4wWxOMsFM40Q) I hope you had a good break with friends and family over the Christmas holiday.

I’m back at it with only five days left until the end of the year fundraising deadline, **and I’m in a crunch!**

I’m $16,670 short of my goal, and have been working the phones and calling donors all day. [**Will you please chip in $20, $100 or more and help me hit my goal?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xfO7r21no1c1qq7BnLSj8Q/gjfmLMh9XD4wWxOMsFM40Q)

As I mentioned in another email, my opponent, **Do-Nothing Dan Webster, was just dropped by his fundraising agency** , so I have a HUGE opportunity to catch up with his war chest that he’ll use to campaign against me.

With the Republican primary coming up in August, I’ll need every penny you can donate to get the word out about who I am, and how **I’ll put America First when I’m elected to Congress!**

[**Will you help me?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xfO7r21no1c1qq7BnLSj8Q/gjfmLMh9XD4wWxOMsFM40Q)

Unlike establishment candidates, I don’t have any PACs donating to my campaign, and all of the big fundraising firms that can raise millions of dollars have been ordered by the establishment to stay clear of me.

So it’s me, you, and a handful of patriots who will give me a victory in the GOP primary in August and the General Election in November.

[**Are you in?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xfO7r21no1c1qq7BnLSj8Q/gjfmLMh9XD4wWxOMsFM40Q)

[**If you haven’t already done so, please make an end of year donation to help me win!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/xfO7r21no1c1qq7BnLSj8Q/gjfmLMh9XD4wWxOMsFM40Q)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

With respect and gratitude,

Laura Loomer

---

The GOP is going after a familiar target, team -- the Public Broadcasting Service (PBS).

A group of far-right Republicans recently introduced a bill that would **PROHIBIT** all federal funding for one of PBS' main funders, harming a network that has brought free, educational programming into American homes for generations.

But now, GOP senators are ramping up their attacks, too. Ted Cruz just called PBS programming **_“government propaganda,”_** and others are already on-record calling for defunding.

**This is the greatest threat PBS has faced in _decades_ , so we've launched a live poll to find out where Democrats stand. _We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you!_**
**Do you support keeping PBS fully funded?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5980?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211227-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211227-NewsAlert-DefendPBS-Pros-sl1&akid=2260%2E9716520%2EeuNEqb)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: re: Marie Newman’s election
body:
This primary is going to be tougher than we thought.
#
Peter,
Last year, you helped us elect Justice Democrat Marie Newman and defeat one of the few remaining anti-abortion Democrats in the U.S. House. Since she was elected, Marie Newman has been an important voice in Congress, standing alongside AOC, Ilhan, Cori, Jamaal, and other Justice Democrats to fight for working people.
**Redistricting in Illinois has unexpectedly put Marie Newman in a competitive primary against another House incumbent, and put the strength of the Justice Democrat coalition at risk.**
[We can’t afford to lose even one Justice Democrat in Congress, Peter. Can you rush a $3 donation directly to Marie’s campaign so we can keep her voice in Congress?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88495?refcode=em20211227-21189&t=19&akid=21189%2E1203867%2EuLH5RN)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88495?refcode=em20211227-21189&t=20&akid=21189%2E1203867%2EuLH5RN)**
This primary is going to be tougher than we thought. Marie is going up against the same brutal machine politics and dark money super PACs that she’s faced before, but now as a Justice Democrat in Congress — the attacks will be even worse.
Marie’s opponent already has the endorsement of many in the Illinois Democratic Party, but we’ve challenged the establishment candidate before, and with your help, we can do it again.
Justice Democrats are a powerful force in Congress — but we can’t afford to lose one of our own in 2022. Our ability to pass critical legislation, win investments for working people, and transform the Democratic party is dependent on us winning new elections AND protecting JD incumbents. **[Help re-elect Marie with a donation right away. We need to show the power of the movement behind Marie Newman!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88495?refcode=em20211227-21189&t=21&akid=21189%2E1203867%2EuLH5RN)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=21189%2E1203867%2EuLH5RN) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=21189%2E1203867%2EuLH5RN) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211227-21189-footer&t=24&refcode2=21189_1203867_uLH5RN&akid=21189%2E1203867%2EuLH5RN)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down
subject: First deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE

**This is my FIRST End of Quarter deadline since I announced my campaign for Senate!**

And I’m nervous...

Once this deadline hits, we’ll have to make our fundraising numbers public. Everyone knows that first impressions are everything.

[**So, I NEED your support now.**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=d4b7270cd1e3473387693b0c0e2c7e3d&_e=ibKgCbxvrtjkHY3YzyZj_VvYPHqPGjj5xt7OIVZtowxJrdS3hA8PfFFWxNa_5R3YjzQ0TDBxERdsLm2Xfptzz0XU0BL18AVpHwhtPNbAl9Xbz3GQWbMrntao_Ym9B_O_ervvbxFnTgv71n0ygL1sSLDN8JuyL1PMq6SoWe2DNYIst-HyZsgfrd1t1rDNfcVrnSteudCvmTx5i46Leals98EzaFgEY9PdnLO-VG1BGUruyz2xuRpq77Z2R43aFgQhklbBbTYPscbMml5ity4a0ZyU72EDTZOpxWcaMseIMjWL-RtvUYPT8xoTwzixxYo6k4sZw9lkAfe4eYq3kKmlkOXRB6RDJPAa-GOxfD1pmXQFWYJnlMRjhys3FseMKdv5GTLrL3L_1dGIeONS8dgKzjcL03eqGP1cBB0BzWtQ84dK4U_biFNUXuzcMT1_A0omxPhBoOdsL7Zg3x9DsRkMAAOm6ivLhrZ1UOcIERJL5vw%3D)

body:
Peter, I’m truly outraged. |
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5b2643ea62564d39beba277607485018&_e=-8m_FpGgZqSFuHqoWRKRotxUEqJXC-IbZI4xPedPAie_qLLL-eQ7NSt0BZdaOo-OdT-EipULouwgjDTCkbjmw5h2o4dCvYu5eU9gYlJTxXInvkqhaUPupfG8RWqyw_QgRaaQ2qqBRTsaywjT1gd22gLUxK3xlQZpEVoOt2rWlZbpiZzKmA1Du4dB2ZTwOb4h3f3KdWoDSCATP2-aeYzp2TF7-Y5lmYhZ0-g1kf5FHo-nhRZZJx33Verghk7fcYvu94OrU7vUM9o5uEaRyo7i5yptnEYRUc28JUkLZAXIsSXp3Xo9SoMnXj_zzLf9LjBfG-xXTLSpE9N_LkAGcJytSeE-jN-TpYj1dsDST4szBIPNjQMhpkttBy6a_tz5dOR6Pxlz9thjT9VRompC8pOZ7zKLf8s_zTtlpgX6_OwDTWvzH6m3uwND-EX5eHGILaaN3MHLLAOiPQ-DmnM4XT6PZ4cXQGVc_ww-SsDPNHDeHWXWcfENVLpIvde-876N0fnCKUMLArB-HGm7_TJh0B66Bg%3D%3D)

Peter, I’m truly outraged.

**_FIRST:_** Chuck Schumer promised to keep full power in the Senate.

**_THEN:_** His donors rushed him tens of millions of dollars!

**_NOW:_** Radical Liberals are scoring high in many polls.

I watched Radical Liberals try to take control from parents in regards to education.

I watched Career Politicians finance illegal immigrants but not support our seniors and veterans.

I watched Radical Liberals put Government before God given rights.

I watched Radical Liberals cause the prices of Food and Gas go up more than 30%.

I saw Career Politicians mandating to Defund our police.

name: Team Booker
subject: Peter, do you believe we can do this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Do you believe that Kentucky deserves a brighter future? Do you believe
that justice should mean something and not just be a word? Do you believe
that we can come together from the hood to the holler to transform our
future?

We do. That’s why we’re reaching out to all 120 counties in Kentucky —
from Laurel to Livingston. From Pikeville to the Purchase. From the hood
to the holler.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14259?refcode=em20211227-1374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1374%2E346206%2EMi2Wpc ]If you’re with us, please join us as we build out our organizing
program and chip in $5 or whatever you’re able to afford
to. Your donation will go towards fueling our volunteer organizing — and
to spread our message across Kentucky, so more people can join in our
vision for Kentucky's future.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14259?refcode=em20211227-1374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1374%2E346206%2EMi2Wpc ]Contribute $5

Peter, we’re
doing this outreach because we believe that the more Kentuckians we meet,
the stronger our movement to bring a brighter future will be. And we’re
doing this the only way we know how: from the grassroots up.

We shocked the world last year when Charles ran for Senate the first time.
And take it from us: when it comes to a grassroots campaign like ours,
early investments and preparation are key. What we are able to invest from
today through 2022 will have a huge impact on our success.

We believe that change is possible. But change starts by building
relationships with Kentuckians who’ve been left behind — and doing it
early. To do it right, we need the resources to start NOW.

It’s time to come together and fight for the future we
deserve, Peter. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14259?refcode=em20211227-1374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1374%2E346206%2EMi2Wpc ]Please chip
in $5 or whatever you can afford for our campaign and help
us jump start our organizing program — and to help us reach all 120
counties in our Commonwealth.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211227-1374-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1374_346206_Mi2Wpc&akid=1374%2E346206%2EMi2Wpc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1374%2E346206%2EMi2Wpc

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

This is why they’re so desperate to strip away Florida's election security safeguards! With the end-of-year deadline rapidly approaching, I need your help to CRUSH our end-of-year goal so we have every last dollar we need to FIGHT BACK before it’s too late. This isn’t just some hypothetical situation, Peter. New York City has already passed legislation allowing non-citizens to vote next year. Their plan to keep the House majority is already in motion – and as one of Nancy Pelosi’s top targets, we MUST be ready to defend the integrity of our elections. I know all the polls and pundits are giving us a huge advantage in the battle for control of the House. But if the Left’s efforts are successful, that won’t matter. We can’t let them undermine the will of the American people and continue to force their socialist agenda on us until 2024. It’s time to act. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Wins Appeal on Release of Sally Yates’ Records on Refusal to Enforce President Trump’s Travel Ban
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that the U.S. Court of Appeals for District of Columbia Circuit ordered a lower court to directly review records withheld by the Justice Department about former Acting Attorney General Sally Yates related to her 2017 refusal to enforce President Donald Trump’s travel ban executive order.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 27, 2021

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that the U.S. Court of Appeals for District of Columbia Circuit ordered a lower court to directly review records withheld by the Justice Department about former Acting Attorney General Sally Yates related to her 2017 refusal to enforce President Donald Trump’s travel ban executive order. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 27, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that the U.S. Court of Appeals for District of Columbia Circuit ordered a lower court to directly review records withheld by the Justice Department about former Acting Attorney General Sally Yates related to her 2017 refusal to enforce President Donald Trump’s travel ban executive order ---|--- | | | | | “Unfortunately, Democrats in the legislature went beyond politics into abuse of power in setting up Maryland’s gerrymandered congressional maps,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “This lawsuit seeks to protect the rights of all voters and citizens. Simply put: politicians shouldn’t get to pick their voters.” ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch obtained the records in response to a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the State Department for non-identifying records of U.S. diplomatic personnel being subjected to invasive COVID-19 anal swab tests by the Chinese government (Judicial Watch v U.S. Dept of State (No. 1:21-cvc02111)). This lawsuit was filed after the State Department failed to respond to a June 18, 2021, FOIA request. ---|--- | | | | == | == While local law enforcement agencies around the United States weather extensive budget cuts, the federal government is dedicating $1.5 million to assist police in El Salvador with challenges and stress created by COVID-19. The goal is to help the Central American nation’s 26,966-member National Civil Police (PNC) asses its role and capacities during a crisis and efficiently provide training to manage a public health emergency like the pandemic. == ---|--- | | | == The Washington Times Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, another group that polices voter rolls, said the key moment for election integrity came a few years back, when the Supreme Court reaffirmed the requirement in federal law that states do have to take steps to clean up their lists. == Reuters The U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit gave the conservative group Judicial Watch a new shot at winning the release of drafts of a Jan. 30, 2017, statement by Yates directing officials to not defend Trump’s executive order. Judicial Watch Judicial Watch is fighting to “force the release of Joe Biden’s Senate records,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton states in the Weekly Update. “Given the public interest in these records, the public financing of the University of Delaware under Delaware law, we thought these records should’ve been public,” Fitton adds. = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |
